name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Here’s what we see on Actblue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=16728%2E3422442%2EU0VKJ8)
Derek,
Here’s what our fundraising team sees when they log on to Actblue:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230128-2?refcode=EMAF28_2_ACT_20230128_V1_F&refcode2=16728_3422442_U0VKJ8&akid=16728%2E3422442%2EU0VKJ8)
We had an incredible Launch Day, and received contributions from thousands of supporters who represent every state in the country and county in California. **But our fundraising has slowed down.** **Having such a strong start is a great sign for our campaign, but we need to keep the momentum going.[Committing to a monthly recurring donation is one of the best ways to help us do so.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230128-2?recurring=true&refcode=EMAF28_2_ACT_20230128_V1_F&refcode2=16728_3422442_U0VKJ8&akid=16728%2E3422442%2EU0VKJ8)**
**[Make a recurring gift ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230128-2?recurring=true&refcode=EMAF28_2_ACT_20230128_V1_F&refcode2=16728_3422442_U0VKJ8&akid=16728%2E3422442%2EU0VKJ8)**
Running a successful Senate campaign in the most populous state in the country will take serious resources. Katie’s proud to run a campaign free of corporate PAC and federal lobbyist money. That means we rely on supporters chipping in. **[Can you consider making a monthly donation of $5 or $10?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230128-2?recurring=true&refcode=EMAF28_2_ACT_20230128_V1_F&refcode2=16728_3422442_U0VKJ8&akid=16728%2E3422442%2EU0VKJ8)** Your consistent support will allow us to begin reaching Californians in every part of the state and help us budget our future advertisements.
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your monthly recurring contribution instantly:

name: Senator Katie Britt
subject: Gratitude
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
This isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. | | |
---
[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=7a14739350804c028ddf77f9baa54a85&_e=7rto0CNMJ314jSwCjkBtgm1I5Yo91vrvLvgpoRGeHx8BFa84pBy8UqlU_IV4IomF6s4rEVbtiT2TdgHJGZjzZjylH9axyoRaLeBNbpbwqvUG5dFotLxdzHw_4XXQkCFgYhl1IlVkrIdAvkacE0urvhb7cw0-Qa5nYboEUcl31pfvPmkAxz8AJVV54dfkOBknAIed0vTaPH0F-7GjenZebCgUMS3DnEgB9P7Up0iCSf6wlo3ueTsDWP97ynQx11OxWND_AJ-Sr98A6mAYwaut2NWxI4K4Ms-uCefQ8WDAI-R-d4Mgvlx_0PCQQnnQo75Jl9q6qIV-yiRRaWsSRyOnRUdEQ4PQtUH5FEs97OG_XraJ9-wBC_mc9cADo4s3JjgypbwI__mmXnrX_HAveM_bmXN7i068SNkOWcqFtl9POFLXBxFJX3TkuaJfYoLyIyZO)

Peter, As I wrap up my first month of service as Alabama’s Senator, I want to reflect on the gratitude I have for the office with which you’ve entrusted me. This hasn’t been easy, but it’s worth it. [**I’ll keep fighting for a secure border, for a stronger economy, and for our children’s future as long as I have the opportunity to serve you!**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=7a14739350804c028ddf77f9baa54a85&_e=7rto0CNMJ314jSwCjkBtgm1I5Yo91vrvLvgpoRGeHx8BFa84pBy8UqlU_IV4IomF6s4rEVbtiT2TdgHJGZjzZjylH9axyoRaLeBNbpbwqvUG5dFotLxdzHw_4XXQkCFgYhl1IlVkrIdAvkacE0urvhb7cw0-Qa5nYboEUcl31pfvPmkAxz8AJVV54dfkOBknAIed0vTaPH0F-7GjenZebCgUMS3DnEgB9P7Up0iCSf6wlo3ueTsDWP97ynQx11OxWND_AJ-Sr98A6mAYwaut2NWxI4K4Ms-uCefQ8WDAI-TYBtev--KOl7mc1FKIOXksc0UXhD09YWq0_7AVv3LWk_AOqG4Z_iPRg5y5wSiKz5mdXX6OAZ1CkA0a3Qhihv2sYrE--Bi7BPAqh7hGsTJx1BoEQzIZS0pur7gPk3PxkKMOTejGDfqu2AZKH_tepeFj) But Democrats aren’t letting up on their attacks. Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer are doing everything they can to stop me. [**I will not let them sell out our children’s future.**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=7a14739350804c028ddf77f9baa54a85&_e=7rto0CNMJ314jSwCjkBtgm1I5Yo91vrvLvgpoRGeHx8BFa84pBy8UqlU_IV4IomF6s4rEVbtiT2TdgHJGZjzZjylH9axyoRaLeBNbpbwqvUG5dFotLxdzHw_4XXQkCFgYhl1IlVkrIdAvkacE0urvhb7cw0-Qa5nYboEUcl31pfvPmkAxz8AJVV54dfkOBknAIed0vTaPH0F-7GjenZebCgUMS3DnEgB9P7Up0iCSf6wlo3ueTsDWP97ynQx11OxWND_AJ-Sr98A6mAYwaut2NWxI4K4Ms-uCefQ8WDAI-REB13kNeEaM87ZL6PuUFffoJvQL2Lash3WqY9sCuD2X1uskP0WLiZ6y3PqbBJrcXbWnYs-O7wO7hWvT0imf6LxcyooyS5poPS9PHfDgXd-mE7rFa_74YFZyFXDPZ9xkjpKp5Hrg_RXNZiCt21XE3fu) I’ll always be thankful for the generous support of Patriotic Americans, like you, that got me to Washington. But the fight isn’t over. Peter, I need your support to keep up the fight for Alabama & our great nation. Please, could you [**add your name to my MONTH ONE Donor List?**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=7a14739350804c028ddf77f9baa54a85&_e=7rto0CNMJ314jSwCjkBtgm1I5Yo91vrvLvgpoRGeHx8BFa84pBy8UqlU_IV4IomF6s4rEVbtiT2TdgHJGZjzZjylH9axyoRaLeBNbpbwqvUG5dFotLxdzHw_4XXQkCFgYhl1IlVkrIdAvkacE0urvhb7cw0-Qa5nYboEUcl31pfvPmkAxz8AJVV54dfkOBknAIed0vTaPH0F-7GjenZebCgUMS3DnEgB9P7Up0iCSf6wlo3ueTsDWP97ynQx11OxWND_AJ-Sr98A6mAYwaut2NWxI4K4Ms-uCefQ8WDAI-S_op0AHOOOlpT0o_qMCL8fgYnjh3155OZP4zBAOk_ll-f074yB46N-QtIwXBeWwzlcb0jIlQy70l3InYpWK-D2StMUqOal8eysPyVaX2jZvuCrT9KYfrhsuEtPVt71kxJGKEi4RA-H5oxStvZZWsvM) Sincerely,

body:
Senator Amy Klobuchar is calling grassroots Democrats into action: | | |
---
| | **Senator Amy Klobuchar is calling grassroots Democrats into action:** [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wllHyGNe2HDyIs5WdLo8tLv40GcQr5QNxgnHXd0dGMOgo8VQDWnRFHq1Qr0yIi4cRdoo2VenmakRsQeAN2YH4tVSBF2BuQWKhIWt5y0s_jxumXYajL3CLkby9qdSD3ZNLhYZPJ2cW-_Ci-zApCCxaXDubVcYC_2ZlrcELg_QKALlsrXIkv21UVxnCBvHYDpqxhBpyKxx1t_8KsIsH7fGfg0-5ZrOY2G2NvqYKbn7bgsokSfPSiEnrgp6asXSiw3RicXvWpRvE16MN5poHzxa3cRuKyfDCT_WmH2yFz1afMWJg3PzFUEZ8Wax8I-gaTJMfCg3JgVpdCuL6MkKG6eInRozFCK3PE0CEn-UHJcx-T2KZFVXtt1tAR_EGlk_GxGC4/3t9/WrFeuo3cTbetlqHlhSRv5Q/h0/gQcnMJMy6GVUFrn30Tq14201IhZqeV5aAfIDk-i-NH4) She _knows_ that building our Democratic power in the states is key to protecting our democracy from Republican attacks on abortion, our elections, LGBTQ+ rights, and so much more. After losing seats last November, Republicans are looking for _any_ opportunity to regain power. Peter,
Democracy is supposed to give every voice an equal chance to be heard. But, Ranked-Choice Voting (RCV) is a political weapon that silences voters.
By using tactics to re-engineer election systems, confuse voters, and suppress the vote, dark money-funded special interest groups are able to manipulate election outcomes.

We can stop the re-engineering of election systems.

RCV is already used in 28 states and in 2023, 14 states have introduced legislation to expand or implement RCV systems.

IF WE DON’T A**CT, THE ENTIRE U.S. ELECTION SYSTEM****IS ABOUT TO CHANGE****> >>**

clean_body: | | | | I Need Your Help. | Peter, Democracy is supposed to give every voice an equal chance to be heard. But, Ranked-Choice Voting (RCV) is a political weapon that silences voters. By using tactics to re-engineer election systems, confuse voters, and suppress the vote, dark money-funded special interest groups are able to manipulate election outcomes. We can stop the re-engineering of election systems. RCV is already used in 28 states and in 2023, 14 states have introduced legislation to expand or implement RCV systems. IF WE DON’T ACT, THE ENTIRE U.S. ELECTION SYSTEMIS ABOUT TO CHANGE> >> | | | | | | | Thank you, | | Kelly Tshibaka Preserve Democracy |

clean_body: it’s pathetic it’s pathetic | Friend, Do you want to know why Katie Hobbs refused to debate me? Because she had already “won”. The Establishment and her corrupt party completely and thoroughly sabotaged the Arizona governor's election. | The evidence is profound — and more comes out every single day. I will never concede to this pathetic hack of a candidate. She is not Arizona’s elected governor. And I will keep fighting until the truth prevails, and we can trust that our elected officials were DULY ELECTED! I am eternally grateful for your support as I fight on. I am fighting on behalf of every voter in Arizona whose vote was stolen from them. I am fighting for those who waited to vote for hours and whose ballot was not counted correctly. It could be you. Together, we will fix this. God bless, Kari Lake Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: A solemn email
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| The brutal murder of Tyre Nichols at the hands of Memphis Police Department officers is yet another terrible shock to the conscience of the nation.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1725%2E5257348%2ELVovPJ)
The brutal murder of Tyre Nichols at the hands of Memphis Police Department officers is yet another terrible shock to the conscience of the nation.
My deepest condolences and prayers are with Tyre’s family and friends in grief, and I stand in solidarity with the protesters in Memphis and across the country who are peacefully demanding transparency, accountability, and justice for this horrific crime.
**The images are unbearable, but we can’t turn away. We must all demand justice and accountability.**
And when I get to the United States Senate, I’m going to do all I can to abolish the filibuster and pass the _George Floyd Justice in Policing Act._
_Enough is enough._
Derek, while nothing we say or do can bring Tyre back to his family, there is something you can do right now that will make a positive impact amidst the grief that his family and our nation are feeling:
**[Please make a donation today to the NAACP Legal Defense and Educational Fund, Campaign Zero, and The Bail Project — organizations that are seeking justice and addressing the systemic injustices within our society in pursuit of racial justice and defense of Black lives. If you can afford it, please consider making a contribution to them today:](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=schiff-racialjustice.DdtwYC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC_20230128_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1725%2E5257348%2ELVovPJ)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to the NAACP Legal Defense and Educational Fund, Campaign Zero, and The Bail Project will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $3](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=schiff-racialjustice.LSTivb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC_20230128_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1725%2E5257348%2ELVovPJ)
---

---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $25](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=schiff-racialjustice.0PvW0F&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC_20230128_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=7&akid=1725%2E5257348%2ELVovPJ)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=schiff-racialjustice.4w_40k&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC_20230128_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=8&akid=1725%2E5257348%2ELVovPJ)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=schiff-racialjustice.JDJK8F&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC_20230128_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=9&akid=1725%2E5257348%2ELVovPJ)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=schiff-racialjustice.DdtwYC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC_20230128_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=10&akid=1725%2E5257348%2ELVovPJ)
---
Thanks for your support of these great organizations.
In solidarity,
Adam Schiff
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

body:
We need to hold him and his crooked family accountable
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdUE1v3CAU_DX4Zgs__Mqz6wc_oZ8-vPPH3-df9-w_zpdEC2-NTsQ38Gp0auXyz9kn2tqHLDZ6WIy1ZuR1qrvf6l5L3gdpSP2TAGzfALY-4e15cXF-cQ_3ue7_5G_8rzusJJzTPt0G_Hy5ixR7XUDqyztYBKjb)

| Friend,
The pieces of the Biden family corruption puzzle are coming together and it’s time to expose their fraud and hold them accountable.
**_Here’s what we know:_**
* Biden mishandled classified documents in the same garage Hunter Biden used frequently
* Biden’s lawyers and the DOJ covered it up before the midterm election
* Democrats have weaponized the DOJ to paint Trump as a villain
* **Hunter Biden rented his dad’s house for the same amount as his shared office with several Chinese business associates**

What we know already is enough to launch a full-scale investigation, **[but I need your help to put pressure on my colleagues in Congress to get moving quickly.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdUE1PrTAU_DVlBykHpPcuWOi78S00xpi4cNWU9pTb9_qBBST8ewsSTUyapp1pZ-YMtmXD6nNDT6zJVCsaoVFlpgUKFS3hTKG-qWmhALWmDLWqdAOsJDVFJ4wtRLmIGENwhQwuu7ao8Fwi07IGIZSoKCtBVx3qTp5RnSCz7XWahpFUtwTu0xpRzhGLxfiIahNJmPBq7Uzfj9u54wNOPDi-RN4Zlcs48C7yI-CJVPfz5LhDZWZHqssei0CzgWOYo8QEemm5cIM1ej0oma7C9D6RX4PmuyFPIUxEmQzt6gYjN13Bjxk3f_RchhjnYTLBpyDhP0bR40-eQz_4Cf305Z0_Yf3s_SpeVKK5t0Yl4hd4NSq1cvlw9pV29iGLrRoWY60ZG5bq7ve6t5KPQVrC7gjA_g1g7xPe3xYX53_u4W-u-sf8vXlyNxsJf9I-rQN-vzxEiqMuIOzyCV0Oq84)** | | | | [INVESTIGATE JOE BIDEN](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdUMuOnDAQ_BpzA5mGsYcDh01Gu5E2yiXKISfLj4Zx4gdrIGT-PoZFiRTJsuwqu7qqsK8ZbztGr5wVppdMDmgK2wOFhtbQUWgvLa0M4DBQjoNpBga8Ji1FL62rZL3JlGL0lY6-uPe01m098G7o1KVrQSna0vqipObXRpqrKVx_X5ZpJs0Tgee8ZtRrwmqzIaHZRTImg3koO47zflZiwkVEL7YklDWlTpNQSZwGr6R5XhcvPBq7etLcDlsE2A7OcU0aMxi0E9JPzg6Pk9L5Ku0YMvketDwGimzCJtR5oHv4yepdV4oz4z4fg9AxpXVabAzZSPyJSY74z8-pH8OCYXmfXX66beb3_BVecmImgrMmE_-Bd2tyK7df3n2jyr0WqTfTZp2zM-O57vGoey_5DNIT_oEAHN8Ajj7h7fvm0_rDv76UZvxcvrEv_rKT8DHvy2PCvy9PkeqsCwi__QEpjKot)
---
That’s why I am petitioning House Republicans to investigate and prosecute everyone involved in the coverup of Joe Biden’s mishandling of classified docs to influence elections and the Biden family’s corrupt business dealings.

There’s so much to uncover and we need to hold the Biden family accountable. Democrats have gotten away with corruption for far too long and now we have the unique opportunity to take them down.

**I’m ready to get started today**...But I’ll need your help to rally my fellow Republicans together and launch a transparent investigation to expose Biden and his Deep State friends.

**[Sign the petition right away to investigate Biden, his family, the DOJ, and everyone else involved in this scandal>>](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdUE1v3CAU_DX2zRb7bGD34EPaVXJIFUVVc-gJYXj20vDhYFxr_32xY7VSJYRgBmbmDXYnxtsLI2fOSt1JJgfUpemAQENOcCHQ0pbUGnAYCMdBNwMDfipagk4aW8vTKmMMwdUquPLWMS4B6IX3lDeMUnImnA7IqJZ8aC9AS9vdUprmonko4DGvGdUSsV6Nj6g3kYxJr--9Gcd5O_diwiSCE2sUvdGVipPoozgCnovmcUlOONRmcUVz3WMVwDZwDktUmEGvrJBusma4H5TKV2lGn8nPQavdUOQQJqLKhvbuJqM2XSmOGTd_9EKFGJcpmeBzkPCOUY74L8-hH3xCnz69q_T-9PbyY3l9_Z5p4a3RmfgPvBmdW7n-dvaN9Pa5jJ2eVmOtmRnPdY973VvJxyBdwb8UAPs3gL1P-Pi5urj8cs9PlR6_VR_sxdGNhK95T_cJ_748ROqjLij49Q_v36ma)**

Your signature means everything here, Friend because it will show Congress that the American people are sick of the lies and ready for real action to be taken.

Thank you in advance for your participation.

Yours in Liberty,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5

name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity.
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsv92trrti9u6hkoqf5c87anknfjr14litdmofc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie0o32cth2bs). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0r51ctq2lhtp1vs2shm0gk3c4brt7bcqurpfdtg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie0o32cth2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk253e606m1u9sclea6vfe4aaj51anmlj68mpr20_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie0o32cth2bs) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zavdd74q6segk43rbae80jpe6kj2d6t35d9ertco_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie0o32cth2bs) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3ethmjhc01drk7oac9st250l15dsdd3ls019bjo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie0o32cth2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr6u3pa8hvbstdembh2k7vd777tr2i2cp58amjr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie0o32cth2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqec40uccg6cpbon9afj37f6c0ki0vk4vhbbvdqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie0o32cth2bs) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews From Customers!** | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---
[**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zukfl0reu9vm7muascvjanenl6roc09f3keotieo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie0o32cth2bs)

Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see [Terms & Conditions](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z849k5e34o5qjv7p78flap7r63jdmv2os8jk4sn8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie0o32cth2bs).

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. FREE Bonus #4: You'll also get an Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library. With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... FREE Bonus #5: You also get their Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. FREE Bonus #6: You also get Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee. Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. FREE Bonus #7: You also get Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa. Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... FREE Bonus #8: You also get $25 OFF your next purchase. This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... FREE Bonus #9: You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order! It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. Look, this food tastes homemade. It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just . When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. As it stands today, it's every man for himself. In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters More Raving Reviews From Customers! | | Rory H. I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things. ---|--- | Billy H. Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup. ---|--- | Kevin S. The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start. ---|--- | Carol B. I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings. ---|--- | Ken K. I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal. ---|--- | Justin A. My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great. ---|--- | Gary M. I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed. ---|--- | John H. We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when." ---|--- Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see . name: Your America
subject: Bezos & Musk investing billions to transform America
body:
This is troubling. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7839%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=%2fA%2fBPFn%2bXCnt4%2f5zYGoDBA&sysid=1)
| Dear Reader, This is troubling. Have you heard of [COP26?](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94565%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=S4rIbOat9fRTehS6nl4Ibg&sysid=1) Almost nobody has. Amid the distractions caused by lingering health issues, conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation... Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world’s most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a $150 trillion ‘global transition’ of our economy. Since then, Bank of America has [signed this accord,](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94566%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QoTkXU6mTWmgz9zxdw1KhA&sysid=1) along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world’s biggest companies. Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this ‘transformation’ as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins has followed the money... [And what she’s found is startling. ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94567%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LzXxSCrW3dpDUwvabqMKeQ&sysid=1) She says: **“While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines calling for a stock market crash, I’ve found evidence that shows where the elites are spending $150 trillion to ‘transform’ the economy. Most Americans will be shocked when they see what happens next.”** I had to know more, so I scheduled an interview for Nomi to go deeper into the details of this ‘transformation.’ She agreed to do the interview on one condition: she wanted to record it so she could get her message in front of as many Americans as possible before it’s too late. [Go here to see how this ‘transformation’ will play out - and what it means for your money. ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94568%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tJYJB%2bu0S5KNKs3xO1RjfA&sysid=1) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, _Distortion Report_
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7839%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=%2fA%2fBPFn%2bXCnt4%2f5zYGoDBA&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7839%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=%2fA%2fBPFn%2bXCnt4%2f5zYGoDBA&sysid=1)

name: 4Patriots
subject: NEW 8-Pound Solar Generator is HERE!
body:
Our #1 Most Requested Item Finally Back In Stock, Inventory Limited!
# "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device
Could Save Your Life in a
Dangerous Blackout
**Our #1 Most Requested Item Finally
Back In Stock, Inventory Limited!** Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL, Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._ The last two years has taught us that it's not IF you need a backup plan... **it's WHEN.** A deadly pandemic, dangerous blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. It's sad, but facts are facts. Crisis mode has become the new normal. And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. So let me be clear: **One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're always fully ready, even when the power goes out.** Nothing feels more vulnerable than that split second when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout. All your critical devices are now on borrowed time. All your critical communications, comfort and protection, suddenly called into question. That's what happened after Hurricane Ida when thousands of families faced being without power... for WEEKS. **You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget.** Well now you can... Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that these next batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about...
# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that
Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3s2dqtdi6n7h987jkij262t59ufrfbei5bvl3m0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie0o36cph2bs) [**YES! There's an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3sss7quqkhsqd8khsqg8n056nl096pmnpta3t4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie0o36cph2bs) Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes. [**You also get $243.90 of FREE Gifts today!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z92f6hrkh2eqqee1aldmu1g8ga4d4qoho86o4f78_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie0o36cph2bs)
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt2kqgjd0epafekdd7psga35q2fb9897c7hikhm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie0o36cph2bs) [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu2hqp1msn3lt9fl11q0jhdksnj1dvco24lrea38_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie0o36cph2bs) _"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer
_ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjse1vkad5gadbrvd37b01ho88crkeoghbvnutn8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie0o36cph2bs) | | **Rita L.** This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price.
---|---
| **Steve G.** Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable.
---|---
| **Thomas B.** Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning.
---|---
| **Jana H.** Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it.
---|---
| **Allan D.** Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip!
---|---
| **Chris S.** Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most!
---|---
| **Richard B.** Well worth it! This is one of the items that made me a loyal customer. I never was a big fan on solar-powered anything. At the same time I've been in enough situations to know any type of a generator is necessary when you live in a more rural setting. Especially when gas prices go through the roof. I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks!
---|---
| **Frank S.** We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a test we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product.
---|---
[**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zepp2ub3kduje52eh7eubkeb86rr0f2ab0g9osbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie0o36cph2bs)
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2zl0re4pn335h06p8v4dedolndgmvj2r06k9fra98).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zge63nvv9f5q5gipneces7hgqelb8f16etfrds5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie0o36cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: 4Patriots
subject: NEW 8-Pound Solar Generator is HERE!
body:
Our #1 Most Requested Item Finally Back In Stock, Inventory Limited!
# "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device
Could Save Your Life in a
Dangerous Blackout
**Our #1 Most Requested Item Finally
Back In Stock, Inventory Limited!** Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL, Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._ The last two years has taught us that it's not IF you need a backup plan... **it's WHEN.** A deadly pandemic, dangerous blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. It's sad, but facts are facts. Crisis mode has become the new normal. And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. So let me be clear: **One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're always fully ready, even when the power goes out.** Nothing feels more vulnerable than that split second when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout. All your critical devices are now on borrowed time. All your critical communications, comfort and protection, suddenly called into question. That's what happened after Hurricane Ida when thousands of families faced being without power... for WEEKS. **You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget.** Well now you can... Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that these next batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about...
# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that
Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfstkruhnton92ru7mft1pptjf7v4daqb310lea0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie0o31clh2bs) [**YES! There's an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2es21ee7oe7ofu173u5jltliucmji5614fbc850_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie0o31clh2bs) Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes. [**You also get $243.90 of FREE Gifts today!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zssekfrdte7urt1nl7geekhfe29pavgsoc0mgc2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie0o31clh2bs)
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3gllbmbj7knh9s580ia4b7b1nmi72gon5tafjfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie0o31clh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zonotmim72uoqqp9eg8d3tb8a5bft9dlei99e0l0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie0o31clh2bs) _"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer
_ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi1ckppkigfrob1c85b172jkgv6eg1vauv2k3hd8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie0o31clh2bs) | | **Rita L.** This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price.
---|---
| **Steve G.** Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable.
---|---
| **Thomas B.** Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning.
---|---
| **Jana H.** Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it.
---|---
| **Allan D.** Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip!
---|---
| **Chris S.** Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most!
---|---
| **Richard B.** Well worth it! This is one of the items that made me a loyal customer. I never was a big fan on solar-powered anything. At the same time I've been in enough situations to know any type of a generator is necessary when you live in a more rural setting. Especially when gas prices go through the roof. I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks!
---|---
| **Frank S.** We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a test we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product.
---|---
[**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbgbelbl7omas5lls0bv6890ecn70oke7nis8ldg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie0o31clh2bs)
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2zh750cjn1cbvkcr69fhm03n01rfkg0qej4pn3oco).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu81kreop4ehhbc05arfe2vpcobv99d3m4tegdbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie0o31clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: American Defense News
subject: Bezos & Musk investing billions to transform America
body:
Have you heard of COP26? Almost nobody has. Amid the distractions caused by lingering health issues, conflicts overseas, shor
| Dear Reader, This is troubling. Have you heard of [COP26?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztb72enfb1bgeeji76bnvlfm5dumlhftgch0dcig_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie8o72cth2bs) Almost nobody has. Amid the distractions caused by lingering health issues, conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation... Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world's most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a $150 trillion 'global transition' of our economy. Since then, Bank of America has [signed this accord,](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zaujlnjoaecu7kgb2sd8ji4e91qk2fhhnm2s0hqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie8o72cth2bs) along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world's biggest companies. Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this 'transformation' as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins has followed the money... name: Trump News HQ
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmt751r76ls471jtdkdhbfb4ffiu1263v32du8qo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie9p76c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5hina7ihhab4a3jo7v2v33tdbuseavdh0rmhqv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie9p76c5h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztrrvdc7eqp9u7i57u7vf3gd0gio4ncsu2qp7a60_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cjie9p76c5h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2zr7sut8iojipptr1ins4pqv7197puhg538dbfje8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf7le28o9k806d5pfr8hfuio3m9124lls1tehbe8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c5ie9p74spgm49fg)

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, childre
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeeekrfpvr2p8lfj7lsr03e4gorjdpf9nsvsoqo0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g60o72clh2bs)
|
---

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqh09ihdde742fhbucp8u72q55u7vi96ve140h4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g60o72clh2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhcevp8oodavid8ckgnnpo1shoaag2qblc4mta18_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g60o72clh2bs) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkplggn8oefjhlibn1k1ll50kiqu74900jbq2m7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g60o72clh2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znr8qtd7p86iq8b8kh9gne1n2flc66rqm7ueurl8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g60o72clh2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can’t fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh2gua5pmhjnvdvtqslec4u4l7ul3dhghikh35po_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g60o72clh2bs)

name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zti5nci8vpdqm58mocr1jno5fce2ck9d3s13r6rg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g60o74cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfg9h9h506tu916vgsg5301oogtqr8ttrpqc4dcg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g60o74cdh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4m6g4i0c7c8ojn9vhkqimetjj33p67addfqcde8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g60o74cdh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: ConservativeFWD
subject: Biased Fact-Checker Is Targeting PragerU!
body:
This is David vs. Goliath.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z4vn1kobal7rdhg9h5mrnektllgqjcmq5th4nmr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g60o74c3h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2upg79d3me5pr0p5m6lh74t76eipr8dbgm5ir2s31cjin6ddmcso6adll6li72s77q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphheiqr0ptmc1j3cp5jchjr1db5e8iv0)
| | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvu43sm6srmhv54uch23m303keli2f9th075gjlo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g60o74c3h2bs)
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zo4b27r56huva8q41qfddfficgaa3tbkv2tv6p48_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g60o74c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear PragerU Supporter, NewsGuard--one of the largest and most influential "fact-checkers" employed by Big Tech--is targeting PragerU! After labeling PragerU as misinformation, encouraging tech platforms to cancel us, warning users to "proceed with caution" before viewing our content, damaging our reputation, and costing us hundreds of thousands--if not millions--of dollars, NewsGuard refuses to leave us alone.
---
[Support PragerU](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zcnfjuqcs5fdm0dl1kqj01rt42059q0t43q1mei8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g60o74c3h2bs)
---
| | Political and corporate elites empower third-party fact-checkers like NewsGuard to censor companies they don't like--companies like PragerU. Meanwhile, leftist, legacy media companies like the **New York Times** and **NPR** get near-perfect "credibility" ratings. So, who is behind NewsGuard, and why are they controlling what you can and cannot see? NewsGuard is partnered with Big Tech companies (like **Microsoft**), Big Pharma (like the PR firm for **Pfizer** --the maker of the COVID vaccine), government agencies (like the **Department of Defense**), and even national teachers unions (like the **American Federation of Teachers**) "to combat disinformation, especially around COVID-19 and elections" according to the **World Economic Forum.** So, it's no wonder NewsGuard doesn't want open dialogue about COVID-19 and lockdowns.

[**They want to stop PragerU from exposing the truth.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zrkm6sf8lic7dm4fguvn1at01bvvbk31s5sb2i8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g60o74c3h2bs) Advisors to NewsGuard include former Directors of the CIA and other government agencies. Their partners, advisors, and staff overwhelmingly support left-wing causes. So, how can NewsGuard claim to be "independent" and call itself "The Internet Trust Tool"? If you've seen any of our videos, you know that PragerU is fiercely committed to the truth. [**But NewsGuard slapped us with a misinformation label just because they don 't want the public to hear what we have to say.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3hl9nvt44n0nkrge9mcr0g7mm854b1mhsk699u8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g60o74c3h2bs) Here's just one of many examples of how third-party fact-checkers like NewsGuard are hurting organizations like **PragerU** , **Breitbart** , **The Daily Wire** , and **The Babylon Bee** : The company that used to host our videos, **JW Player** , informed us 18 months ago that they were not willing to work with us anymore. When we asked why, they said we had been blacklisted by NewsGuard and claimed our content was "misleading." Suddenly, we had to devote considerable time and money to find a new video host. Now, NewsGuard is back, threatening to further harm us if we don't comply with their long list of ridiculous demands.
---
[Expose NewsGuard](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z86h37hovg9nksttghh4tcbkpvh4cm5j6jgm87so_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g60o74c3h2bs)
---
| | We will not let NewsGuard and their cronies get away with this. We're not going to let them suppress free speech, conceal information, and control what you can and cannot see, all while keeping you completely in the dark. There might be severe consequences for us for pushing against NewsGuard. But if we don't do it, who will? [PragerU is taking a risk by fighting back against such powerful entities, and we need your help.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zlg6oh6brj39t9rt6gjb9fp0sl9cnuvqka3upbjo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g60o74c3h2bs) Third-party fact-checkers and their "partners" have all the money and all the power. But we have you. [**Donate now to help us expose NewsGuard.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqvr8odlcge4k6h4ggvtf5l41o0k9k90a4lckj6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g60o74c3h2bs) This is David vs. Goliath. We know that God and the truth are on our side and will prevail. But we can't do this alone. We're willing to take the risk. We're putting everything on the line. But we need your help. Please join in the fight and help us. Sincerely, Marissa Streit, PragerU CEO
---
[Donate Now](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zh3glp4u7hmc9mhlit0qubv815gcqna3f3qtjic8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g60o74c3h2bs)
---

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Worse Than Housing Crisis of ‘08?
body:
The 2008 housing collapse was among the most challenging economic downturns our country has ever been through.
| | | | | Dear Subscriber, The 2008 housing collapse was among the most challenging economic downturns our country has ever been through. But today's housing crisis could be far, far worse ... It's not just real estate, but stocks, bonds ... even the money you have sitting in banks. Most people don't realize how bad it already is. The stock market has seen trillions in value disappear ... Bonds have seen several yield curve inversions ... And real estate has seen the fastest price drops since just before the 2008 housing crisis. But unlike 2008, the government isn't coming to the rescue. In fact, their actions may make things worse. I'm writing today to give you immediate guidance on what steps you can take to protect your real estate portfolio ... **without selling a single property!** All the details are in this **[free video from Dr. Martin Weiss](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z42c2hceejo70bk12kh989ch6r270u7grd82h10o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g64or2c3h2bs)**. The free video:
* Gives you six simple steps you can take immediately to find safety in an unsafe world ...
* Names the land-mine stocks to dump with urgency ...
* Gives you immediate guidance on what kind of assets to buy to protect your stock portfolio and protect your real estate portfolio ...
* Guides you to special kinds of trades that have a consistent track record of unusual success precisely when nearly everything else is crashing -- they're called Crash Profit Trades, and, as you'll see, there are many to choose from.

**[Click here](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj82dvdvr511gul029gdfd98mririaep7cocqne8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g64or2c3h2bs)** to watch this urgent briefing now. If you own a home, have a portfolio of investment properties or rental units ... it's critical you take action now. Watch Dr. Weiss' video immediately, before the bottom truly falls out of this market. **[Watch the free video now.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbpkci9gna99b2itr1ahrejq384g5gvtvc48kuk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g64or2c3h2bs)** Sincerely, |
---

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for you
| |
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1l2v06ib1mt8q1e5iq1ml77gbbqb6nph8k8h5kg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g60o72cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlc9ehvpapqbca838tnobbekuuj8vg7o6g2sbd2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g60o72cdh2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._

_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... body:
| Dear Reader, The most fortunate Americans will join the 'new rich'... While the vast majority will fall out of the middle class... And become part of the 'new poor.' In the past... It was possible to work your way out of a situation like this. Work hard and save money. But not anymore... Today, the decisions you make with your money and investments will determine your fate. Dr. Nomi Prins sees how the middle class is being strangled... By political division... Soaring prices... And wages that just aren't keeping up. Get her "New American Era Blueprint" before January 31... To protect your wealth - and potentially profit - in 2023. **[Watch Nomi's latest video here.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38ecb19a553a41f781af91f7f037a046&_e=A7q1-PLCojnPJlBFQzaBzz-HB8vqy53Ve7aEKTCtZys6KMC6wNRpO98vTQTi4w7JtDa7Ox_g9fZiiMO5hnLB-2FNBw4x_WclCkxq0Xo-2nBGKo7UrEn3I2aZc7G9_8ITESPJGGGX3Hp5jbDRb3rulx8_QQgPocJNGcW--s6uoxIrATrJfdVicqVyoEDmkmGdVKOAtFT6yT1rDHk4_Q3Br6s7TO8nwve-xfkZ6g8e3ceH3a4887JadoRu2cuUlL9D)** Regards, Maria Bonaventura Senior Managing Editor, _Rogue Economics_
