name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42fae2524ead448999e3870b8d2969d5&_e=ch-Ax113pwwh3VLNm472iTK9Pow4keJOa97X5eT_4FvX8mgmf7YydnLcNkszfT4Go2o5sb00DUX_GBWnge77wxLyWTEVtbFCynJ3w8p_10v7UYt1YZhW20u0brTqNFSLapN7kSnBAK5ifzUrSAreC_fgNXj0b04NlBXSIlglhypmQ6BTb54TD7BzMhUmIi5m2ZhSTaynNEhx-yq6wucUu6ubB6ViNa8WQXqn_zsYnS6SS-0KJTOljhf2n25S5I9Ffz_4z-Od1135ZpagkGbh9jMlFpU2E0HqbUK_XqPpBeNgt-ve1UO4v3WbO8d6mY79WKGj0X7V86S9py9sG9Kio97-gk4fyzR69jZ_U-ySqVpnQXcQl7RRBiPGsw4Oll8vaofWI2IH9yJWP2KvgkHeQQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria."
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42fae2524ead448999e3870b8d2969d5&_e=ch-Ax113pwwh3VLNm472iTK9Pow4keJOa97X5eT_4FvX8mgmf7YydnLcNkszfT4Go2o5sb00DUX_GBWnge77wxLyWTEVtbFCynJ3w8p_10v7UYt1YZhW20u0brTqNFSLapN7kSnBAK5ifzUrSAreC_fgNXj0b04NlBXSIlglhypmQ6BTb54TD7BzMhUmIi5m2ZhSTaynNEhx-yq6wucUu6ubB6ViNa8WQXqn_zsYnS6SS-0KJTOljhf2n25S5I9FLGzkeIw_w79rBPZCBsQNeUxaLWsBabGLvLcU1NkO325GCCpByqs5ScQ5GKvkviZ5Za5YjcTbsJxAWWMspgksmg4bvpYE3-We_55-51Vb-mpq3rgi2WDdgnVpt5sbH7baj0OcZY9LE6q9Ak8dxighUA%3D%3D)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: ** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
"Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?"
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I 'm asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions. **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42fae2524ead448999e3870b8d2969d5&_e=ch-Ax113pwwh3VLNm472iTK9Pow4keJOa97X5eT_4FvX8mgmf7YydnLcNkszfT4Go2o5sb00DUX_GBWnge77wxLyWTEVtbFCynJ3w8p_10v7UYt1YZhW20u0brTqNFSLapN7kSnBAK5ifzUrSAreC_fgNXj0b04NlBXSIlglhypmQ6BTb54TD7BzMhUmIi5m2ZhSTaynNEhx-yq6wucUu6ubB6ViNa8WQXqn_zsYnS6SS-0KJTOljhf2n25S5I9FoXwws7ZU3PjYu3D5siFe-z10Au4M6YKaWe4xL6z2aBG8jyRwgqYDoHc-r7v2RNsSy6iHT3IVkea6JPYSSg29CBXtPm9Nxl-nOGobqvQBISAX-fm0TpsgCfHF4LnKUBq4RhjBJyFpVX3pBPvr4DY1DQ%3D%3D) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42fae2524ead448999e3870b8d2969d5&_e=ch-Ax113pwwh3VLNm472iTK9Pow4keJOa97X5eT_4FvX8mgmf7YydnLcNkszfT4Go2o5sb00DUX_GBWnge77wxLyWTEVtbFCynJ3w8p_10v7UYt1YZhW20u0brTqNFSLapN7kSnBAK5ifzUrSAreC_fgNXj0b04NlBXSIlglhypmQ6BTb54TD7BzMhUmIi5m2ZhSTaynNEhx-yq6wucUu6ubB6ViNa8WQXqn_zsYnS6SS-0KJTOljhf2n25S5I9FoatP6Fr5Rq31ZDExwRdn1D4a1lOve-tJBxKZDUouw-HagT-CSD3zx5sMBvgJ6AaBZr9Yk_L0A41InfT-RtGThEXejuQm_2kcUAI0J5F5OPtLOtbQOdd0yATLhgoVqhYTVqbsz4N_puKJzoMbhXfdhQ%3D%3D) Whatever amount you're able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42fae2524ead448999e3870b8d2969d5&_e=ch-Ax113pwwh3VLNm472iTK9Pow4keJOa97X5eT_4FvX8mgmf7YydnLcNkszfT4Go2o5sb00DUX_GBWnge77wxLyWTEVtbFCynJ3w8p_10v7UYt1YZhW20u0brTqNFSLapN7kSnBAK5ifzUrSAreC_fgNXj0b04NlBXSIlglhypmQ6BTb54TD7BzMhUmIi5m2ZhSTaynNEhx-yq6wucUu6ubB6ViNa8WQXqn_zsYnS6SS-0KJTOljhf2n25S5I9FjeI58BAWLa107-CNeLu9Kof7zu8zWK51nMC1g3vuOF2xx14JJiAhttcEzEHi_Rpo3cwg_M7m5-33NYGMIQINYiDMYJ2ZqkipxCDRhWlXLL57eMwtCA0F0jV7auaLV10fP_gOGM4cAr8zXlgdNHVwTw%3D%3D)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe's landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these "physicians" abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42fae2524ead448999e3870b8d2969d5&_e=ch-Ax113pwwh3VLNm472iTK9Pow4keJOa97X5eT_4FvX8mgmf7YydnLcNkszfT4Go2o5sb00DUX_GBWnge77wxLyWTEVtbFCynJ3w8p_10v7UYt1YZhW20u0brTqNFSLapN7kSnBAK5ifzUrSAreC_fgNXj0b04NlBXSIlglhypmQ6BTb54TD7BzMhUmIi5m2ZhSTaynNEhx-yq6wucUu6ubB6ViNa8WQXqn_zsYnS6SS-0KJTOljhf2n25S5I9Fx2Mm-KRcVemZa0GvWTQEP82TBFA_-M_A0fbsYWeD1bY3bHKoPFahQHAzl29TCX0KRhaeonHOB3xRGLAIRANGa3-Bq4kSfCS9gNXo5O69mWswjVNhfO0jl8xivNtez37CohLeFS58g686ChGEMuMEFg%3D%3D) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole's landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42fae2524ead448999e3870b8d2969d5&_e=ch-Ax113pwwh3VLNm472iTK9Pow4keJOa97X5eT_4FvX8mgmf7YydnLcNkszfT4Go2o5sb00DUX_GBWnge77wxLyWTEVtbFCynJ3w8p_10v7UYt1YZhW20u0brTqNFSLapN7kSnBAK5ifzUrSAreC_fgNXj0b04NlBXSIlglhypmQ6BTb54TD7BzMhUmIi5m2ZhSTaynNEhx-yq6wucUu6ubB6ViNa8WQXqn_zsYnS6SS-0KJTOljhf2n25S5I9F91iTY7IlZeu5rGQHxHykMmpgcEEyheiqu1yXoaF5j-fr1B39SfFWb_wqG6OJZkYvlvFpiLrlh1hWGHi72ICgjsA29k2VlII6Aj83XBUfTa_xScPot1viD-YbWwytsRCZxYc_lWu1NjAZQThk9RPJxg%3D%3D)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42fae2524ead448999e3870b8d2969d5&_e=ch-Ax113pwwh3VLNm472iTK9Pow4keJOa97X5eT_4FvX8mgmf7YydnLcNkszfT4Go2o5sb00DUX_GBWnge77wxLyWTEVtbFCynJ3w8p_10v7UYt1YZhW20u0brTqNFSLapN7kSnBAK5ifzUrSAreC_fgNXj0b04NlBXSIlglhypmQ6BTb54TD7BzMhUmIi5m2ZhSTaynNEhx-yq6wucUu6ubB6ViNa8WQXqn_zsYnS6SS-0KJTOljhf2n25S5I9FM5B6gBJMNIHd4DZBQfMlmmSq4HJdcZMM571n3W1jr_4P6LEzKaPKkSZKKlNuDTkYPiy_DwlmnZXY_L3zuS0UDlWn2_sGMYW5bWSEu5Y6wsBT2njDEYmE_zk8MW9w0ivJfpI_l4ri5nq8JvV42foCXA%3D%3D)

body:
Over 100 anti-LGBTQ bills have already been brought before state legislatures across the country. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57954795/389630995/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDc3NTVjZS1lZTlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8j6LlXtngHTKj2IXEE2kodr9_jwYPSsRFVLoUEa3BZQ=&emci=8bc188dc-f898-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=ed7755ce-ee9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter, 2023 is now on pace to be one of the worst years for anti-LGBTQ legislation in American history.
* In **Wisconsin,** Republicans just voted to overturn a ban on “conversion therapy.”
* In **Texas,** Republicans have introduced multiple bills to limit and ban gender-affirming health care for trans kids.
* In**Iowa,** Republicans have introduced their own version of Florida’s “Don’t Say Gay” bill, which would limit curriculum around LGBTQ history in classrooms.

We’re still only in January, but over 100 anti-LGBTQ bills have already been brought before state legislatures across the country – with the majority of them targeting trans and LGBTQ youth. **It’s only a matter of time before we see bills aimed at restricting the rights and dignity of LGBTQ youth come to the House floor – and we need to be prepared to fight back.[Pitch in $5 or more today to help us build our defenses and prepare to protect LGBTQ freedom in 2023.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57954796/389631002/1063445104?refcode=E20072-20230122-LGBTQrights-SL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDc3NTVjZS1lZTlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8j6LlXtngHTKj2IXEE2kodr9_jwYPSsRFVLoUEa3BZQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57954797/389631010/1063445104?express_lane=true&refcode=E20072-20230122-LGBTQrights-EL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDc3NTVjZS1lZTlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8j6LlXtngHTKj2IXEE2kodr9_jwYPSsRFVLoUEa3BZQ=)** | **[$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57954798/389631018/1063445104?express_lane=true&refcode=E20072-20230122-LGBTQrights-EL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDc3NTVjZS1lZTlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8j6LlXtngHTKj2IXEE2kodr9_jwYPSsRFVLoUEa3BZQ=)**

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Watch the new free course now
body:
Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgqp8tjb8uhnm8mt9ijjvui6plllu86453ut7gt0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g61o34clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkhiavm3vuggoht48iecfjcoh1c2ju1qrsihig6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g61o34clh2bs)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7r0n07m1eh17tmguf48abq3h5trfec24p4gjpa0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1g61o34clh2bs)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

name: Shift WA
subject: Top news: Liar appointed to Veteran Affairs Committee
body:
A slap in the face to all truthful veterans, Democrat Speaker of the House Laurie Jinkins appointed fellow Democrat and admitted liar Representative Clyde Shavers to the State House Committee for Veterans Affairs. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61435520:W01u7VDXN:m:1:2610672541:F4F83CA05CA1232D4E3EF7784CBA9DFF:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

The 2023 legislative session is in full swing, with Democrats pushing bad bills in every committee! As always, we here at Shift WA have you covered with some of this week's most read stories and insights into what is going on in your own political backyard! Read on...

**This week 's Newsmaker Interview...**
Second-term Republican Representative Cyndy Jacobsen (25th LD) joined us to discuss her bill to allow the state to rehire state workers fired by Jay Inslee when he abused his emergency powers by dictating the firing unvaccinated state employees COVID. She also discussed her bill to improve safety in our schools and the proposal to provide more educational options to families by having the state fund the student and not the schools. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61435521:W01u7VDXN:m:1:2610672541:F4F83CA05CA1232D4E3EF7784CBA9DFF:r)**.**

**This week 's Guest Editorial...**
Representative Mary Dye (R - Pomeroy) wrote an insightful editorial on her proposal for to improve the lives of boys and men in our state. Rep. Dye outlined how the percentage of boys and men struggling with homelessness, suicide, and drug addiction far outweighs girls and women. She explained how her legislation creating a Washington State Commission on Boys and Men - the first of its kind in the nation - could help stop this destructive pattern and help lift "our male population toward better, happier, and successful lives." [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61435522:W01u7VDXN:m:1:2610672541:F4F83CA05CA1232D4E3EF7784CBA9DFF:r)**.**

**This week 's top story...**
In a slap in the face to all truthful veterans, Democrat Speaker of the House Laurie Jinkins appointed fellow Democrat and admitted liar Representative Clyde Shavers to the State House Committee for Veterans Affairs. The ethically challenged Shavers made headlines late in the 2022 election cycle for lying about his military service, among other things. Mainstream media outlets made sure to sit on the story long enough to ensure it would not impact his election. It now appears the Democrat machine is further rewarding this miscreant for his appalling lies - and the media doesn't see a problem. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61435523:W01u7VDXN:m:1:2610672541:F4F83CA05CA1232D4E3EF7784CBA9DFF:r)**.**

**In case you missed it ... **
In seriously under-reported news, legislative leaders from both the Republican and Democrat caucuses in Olympia recently participated in a press event to answer questions that should be front-and-center for Washington State residents. Jay Inslee even showed up to share his "wisdom." The press conference made it clear that Democrats believe voters gave them a mandate to implement their terrible ideas and irresponsible policies - all of which culminate into tax increases. Is that what you read in the mainstream media? [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61435524:W01u7VDXN:m:1:2610672541:F4F83CA05CA1232D4E3EF7784CBA9DFF:r)**.**

P.S. Have you signed up for our Daily Briefing? If not, please take a moment to sign up now by [**clicking here**.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61435525:W01u7VDXN:m:1:2610672541:F4F83CA05CA1232D4E3EF7784CBA9DFF:r)

AND with Twitter under new ownership, and if that's a news source for you, we hope you will take a moment to follow us today by **[clicking here](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61435526:W01u7VDXN:m:1:2610672541:F4F83CA05CA1232D4E3EF7784CBA9DFF:r)**! | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61435527:W01u7VDXN:m:1:2610672541:F4F83CA05CA1232D4E3EF7784CBA9DFF:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14123817&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oW01u7VDXN).

The ethically challenged Shavers made headlines late in the 2022 election cycle for lying about his military service, among other things. Mainstream media outlets made sure to sit on the story long enough to ensure it would not impact his election. It now appears the Democrat machine is further rewarding this miscreant for his appalling lies - and the media doesn't see a problem. . In case you missed it ... In seriously under-reported news, legislative leaders from both the Republican and Democrat caucuses in Olympia recently participated in a press event to answer questions that should be front-and-center for Washington State residents. Jay Inslee even showed up to share his "wisdom." The press conference made it clear that Democrats believe voters gave them a mandate to implement their terrible ideas and irresponsible policies - all of which culminate into tax increases. Is that what you read in the mainstream media? . P.S. Have you signed up for our Daily Briefing? If not, please take a moment to sign up now by AND with Twitter under new ownership, and if that's a news source for you, we hope you will take a moment to follow us today by ! | | This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com and sent from Shift Washington. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: backstory on my campaign debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Hi there –
It is the honor of my lifetime to serve in the Senate. Working to make life better for Granite Staters is something that deserves my full attention.
That’s why I’m sending you this email. Our (victorious!) campaign has some debt to pay off, and we’re under a time crunch to fill the gap. If you could split $20 right now -- between my campaign and Serve America -- to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
The backstory is this:
GOP spending against us SKYROCKETED in the last few weeks of the campaign. Polls tightened to within a point or two, and pundits doubted whether we could win.
My team was laser-focused on making strategic decisions that would allow us to win. We made last-minute investments with the information we had, hoping that the funding we needed would come through.
Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid.
Will you please give $20 or as much as you can to my campaign and Serve America to help us retire our debt? Every dollar you give helps me spend less time fundraising and more time fighting for hardworking families, and I’m grateful for anything you can give. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
Thank you so much.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57958068/389641801/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzQ0MWJiMy1mNzlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OGkSyDpzul-DUMSLNsAyAjs6eQtuQt_sFhtQYgWH-FM=&emci=b63da9bd-729e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=33441bb3-f79f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)

Friend, In case you didn’t know, this is my mom, Joy: | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57958071/389641826/2067913297?refcode=fl_email_pt_20230129joysbirthday_wm_odca90ds_SLA_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzQ0MWJiMy1mNzlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OGkSyDpzul-DUMSLNsAyAjs6eQtuQt_sFhtQYgWH-FM=&emci=b63da9bd-729e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=33441bb3-f79f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)
---
When I was just 3 years old, we lost my dad to a treatable illness. Despite this shocking and heartbreaking tragedy, my mom carried on and raised my sisters and me, doing everything in her power to give us the opportunity to achieve our dreams.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57958074/389641864/2067913297?refcode=fl_email_pt_20230129joysbirthday_wm_odca90ds_SLA_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzQ0MWJiMy1mNzlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OGkSyDpzul-DUMSLNsAyAjs6eQtuQt_sFhtQYgWH-FM=&emci=b63da9bd-729e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=33441bb3-f79f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)
---
She believed in me before I believed in me, and I wouldn’t be where I am today — a U.S. Army combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations, and Governor of Maryland — if it wasn’t for her love and support along the way.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57958078/389641898/2067913297?refcode=fl_email_pt_20230129joysbirthday_wm_odca90ds_SLA_img3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzQ0MWJiMy1mNzlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OGkSyDpzul-DUMSLNsAyAjs6eQtuQt_sFhtQYgWH-FM=&emci=b63da9bd-729e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=33441bb3-f79f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)
---
**Everything I am, I am because of her.** She embodies strength, selflessness, and love, and I’m forever blessed by all she has given me, and the lessons she has taught me.
**[Today is my mom’s birthday, and I want to show her how special she is. Will you add your name to sign my mom’s virtual card and wish her a happy birthday?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57958082/389641912/2067913297?refcode=fl_email_pt_20230129joysbirthday_wm_odca90ds_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzQ0MWJiMy1mNzlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OGkSyDpzul-DUMSLNsAyAjs6eQtuQt_sFhtQYgWH-FM=&emci=b63da9bd-729e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=33441bb3-f79f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)**

| We’ll be quick.

In just 48 hours, our team will face our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of 2023. Unfortunately, we are falling short of where we need to be. Our finance director set a $5,000 goal to get us back on track, and we’re relying on folks like you to pitch in and help us catch up.

Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead.

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Worse Than Housing Crisis of ‘08?
body:
| | | | | Dear Subscriber, The 2008 housing collapse was among the most challenging economic downturns our country has ever been through. But today's housing crisis could be far, far worse ... It's not just real estate, but stocks, bonds ... even the money you have sitting in banks. Most people don't realize how bad it already is. The stock market has seen trillions in value disappear ... Bonds have seen several yield curve inversions ... And real estate has seen the fastest price drops since just before the 2008 housing crisis. But unlike 2008, the government isn't coming to the rescue. In fact, their actions may make things worse. | We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13.

| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: ** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...

_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
"Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?"
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I 'm asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions. **](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=351d6110fb304da49c224f87f6441d8e&_e=b9neVul7auEd8IP51ixyRMpa2Dk9XCMfOr7Ew7uq3vgt4XJW5t1mZCGn0mwI5hkizl-ijnN8ALCpMQdXgjI0keOXuFtbWKelwV85dIvECgt7wEb_WTUQQdLQfGG1oDKJyzsYpD4bjMrITaLJb6KoyPUsi-BxcYaHQcex9mht0y6JVEOA5Aj9r6UgkKnxtdbdFeqUsjAXlUW7kxAflciOdVvHvIDGZrVT6PBuUIpGN04Zdv_yhgWVuggjqACMRdpBdyb8yehHustD3QJJpD0rLGD7xLo3iDfQVSumbTyJRyr2CNUXFfBtdpDvdKbO8H71hsZF3d6G1xzWm7H9obxvtI7c4rky0JO-hRFBew13QmyYRq-f0Za5fLXi5Qjh7Aqdk5pzcz_yiZ9gssfVsBIQBw%3D%3D) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole's landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. | 2023 Session Update Week 3
---
|
---
| Governor Youngkin "Compete to Win"
---
|
---
| Governor Glenn Youngkin discusses teamwork "Getting it Done Together", and his major tax cut policies in Virginia including my bill to lower taxes on Virginia retired Veterans [HB 1436](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00196qQNxmUtWEOuCytK4FrDz0Y2qh00Csq2P-angvMZJaNx2pYhK-Lx0n2J_s60eYkmpLPpZOPrbzXdLkuylFKYCMn6rnuV_KjIOrRnaiybursWaqjYjhrN6nFe8vu4eRSS2rH21mHXCbj_tO_yW5WzsClvpv-y7ejM2ExwAbCpHsSD7ipVwFD3rkSdfUmIu9Pz6QEQq6Yi6M=&c=ig8CMkX1Fd2BLLWY4XIz0EvOtV7Dlg25FQ1sloFrPwonEAqJ00DeUA==&ch=Z5jxqGfq7mAES_x3kwp08O0_hvMzb9BBGlKFnTgfL9SjlCvbLVV0YA==).
---
|
---
| I had the honor of addressing the crowd, leading the pledge of allegiance, and introducing my friend, and our caucus tax expert, Delegate Joe McNamara.

|
---
Finance Sub-Committee chair on State Taxation, Delegate Joe McNamara, speaking about how he eliminated the grocery tax in Virginia, and his two 2023 tax reducing bills, HB 2138 & HB 2319.

|
---
Congressman Rob Wittman seen here, speaking on Republicans working together, at all levels, to improve Virginia.

| It was a huge honor to speak at Governor Youngkin's, "Compete to Win", event at the Carole and Marcus Weinstein Jewish Community Center ([JCC](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00196qQNxmUtWEOuCytK4FrDz0Y2qh00Csq2P-angvMZJaNx2pYhK-LxyEwFEl1k_jxoUbXQWpJDcE9C4xRyfraTGY00Dy5lMndM_Tzu_cRFMoTYpNtzSyI49VnbWR88Il64LWf9e_la4-GqFc6gAmfBA==&c=ig8CMkX1Fd2BLLWY4XIz0EvOtV7Dlg25FQ1sloFrPwonEAqJ00DeUA==&ch=Z5jxqGfq7mAES_x3kwp08O0_hvMzb9BBGlKFnTgfL9SjlCvbLVV0YA==)) in Richmond. It was good to see Senator Siobhan Dunnavant, Delegates A.C. Cordoza, constituents, and many other friends there as well!

| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00196qQNxmUtWEOuCytK4FrDz0Y2qh00Csq2P-angvMZJaNx2pYhK-LxyEwFEl1k_jxLzg8FnSn6gCvQ5ZrEhopcVONK1gzk-daINXTma4uDiyvnxgemct9Wvv_LKYcNA2nks2oJHyE8c-kXkvduUun9RJgadj08pjukgXeRaRrxK-PuoN8GmNq-fozgEq0l7dOF9ArC8qgiHY=&c=ig8CMkX1Fd2BLLWY4XIz0EvOtV7Dlg25FQ1sloFrPwonEAqJ00DeUA==&ch=Z5jxqGfq7mAES_x3kwp08O0_hvMzb9BBGlKFnTgfL9SjlCvbLVV0YA==)

| The General Assembly convened on Wednesday, January 11th marking the beginning of the 403rd legislative session of the House of Delegates.
We begin week four Monday. [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00196qQNxmUtWEOuCytK4FrDz0Y2qh00Csq2P-angvMZJaNx2pYhK-LxyEwFEl1k_jxLzg8FnSn6gCvQ5ZrEhopcVONK1gzk-daINXTma4uDiyvnxgemct9Wvv_LKYcNA2nks2oJHyE8c-kXkvduUun9RJgadj08pjukgXeRaRrxK-PuoN8GmNq-fozgEq0l7dOF9ArC8qgiHY=&c=ig8CMkX1Fd2BLLWY4XIz0EvOtV7Dlg25FQ1sloFrPwonEAqJ00DeUA==&ch=Z5jxqGfq7mAES_x3kwp08O0_hvMzb9BBGlKFnTgfL9SjlCvbLVV0YA==) for a list of legislation on the agenda brought to me by constituents, and sponsored by me, to improve Virginia.
---
| Delegate Buddy Fowler
---
|
---
| Please support my friend and fellow Delegate Buddy Fowler for re-election to the Virginia House of Delegates. Due to redistricting, his district now includes Louisa County, western Hanover County, and part of Henrico County. https://www.buddyfowler.com
---
| Amelia World Series Champions
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Amelia County Delegate Tommy Wright recognized and congratulated the Amelia Dixie Youth Major League All-Star boys Baseball Team for winning the Dixie Youth Division II Majors World Series in 2022! [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00196qQNxmUtWEOuCytK4FrDz0Y2qh00Csq2P-angvMZJaNx2pYhK-LxyEwFEl1k_jxu7Sv6TO_w1eDU72PAs1OTNnE0mMb_snY7kHgjzQFVeDSSwLgAgzMZukh04Mfvr7cS15iAlCJfdR9wnahzWtz7cvfqkRZ2zsh20A1Z7w-I1ehVwVBjFslftvAliqzhNJ4sJeOTqINQqo=&c=ig8CMkX1Fd2BLLWY4XIz0EvOtV7Dlg25FQ1sloFrPwonEAqJ00DeUA==&ch=Z5jxqGfq7mAES_x3kwp08O0_hvMzb9BBGlKFnTgfL9SjlCvbLVV0YA==) to read Delegate Tommy Wright's resolution.
Over the summer while campaigning for State Senate District 10 in Amelia County, I met the Dixie Youth Major All-stars players, coaches, and parents. They were doing a car wash to raise money so the team could go to South Carolina and compete in the World Series. Congratulations for winning the championship!

| Eliminate Drop Box Success!
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00196qQNxmUtWEOuCytK4FrDz0Y2qh00Csq2P-angvMZJaNx2pYhK-LxyEwFEl1k_jxCDs7oVMl_fxO-43xuOb5tpbKxEdMCnjbDbHKtGeD0NAID7wQCjZ8qVUGENm5XVP232uzef4t3Dqfmi4al7xORQ==&c=ig8CMkX1Fd2BLLWY4XIz0EvOtV7Dlg25FQ1sloFrPwonEAqJ00DeUA==&ch=Z5jxqGfq7mAES_x3kwp08O0_hvMzb9BBGlKFnTgfL9SjlCvbLVV0YA==)

| We need to restore confidence in our elections. Im excited to inform you my bill to remove drop boxes has passed the house. This will save, money, time, and improve confidence in our elections. [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00196qQNxmUtWEOuCytK4FrDz0Y2qh00Csq2P-angvMZJaNx2pYhK-LxyEwFEl1k_jxCDs7oVMl_fxO-43xuOb5tpbKxEdMCnjbDbHKtGeD0NAID7wQCjZ8qVUGENm5XVP232uzef4t3Dqfmi4al7xORQ==&c=ig8CMkX1Fd2BLLWY4XIz0EvOtV7Dlg25FQ1sloFrPwonEAqJ00DeUA==&ch=Z5jxqGfq7mAES_x3kwp08O0_hvMzb9BBGlKFnTgfL9SjlCvbLVV0YA==)
---
| Happy Birthday, Dale Hargrove Alderman of Hanover
---
|
---
| I stopped by Lola's Farmhouse Bistro and crashed former Hanover GOP Chair Dale Hargrove's Birthday Party. Her father Republican Delegate Frank Hargrove represented Hanover County in the House of Delegates and is the father of the modern Republican Conservative movement in Virginia. It is hard to believe, the last time my opponent ran at the state level in Virginia State Senate District 10, he ran as a Democrat against beloved Republican Conservative Frank Hargrove.
---
| Support Local Business
---
|
---
|
---
| Please support local businesses. Lola's Farmhouse Bistro is a great restaurant for a date night with your significant other. It was good to catch up with the owner Ronnie as well!
---
| On The Campaign Trail
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| We are making friends, and signing folks up to be delegates for the convention, all across State Senate District 10. Please go to www.john4va.com and pledge your support to be a delegate at our convention on May 6 at Buckingham County High School!
---
| Buckingham Farm Bureau
---
|
---
| Thank you to members of the Buckingham Farm Bureau, for stopping by and sharing concerns for farmers in Buckingham County. I'm glad to hear you are very much in support of the Ag bill I am working on with Delegate Michael Webert. This bill gives Virginia Farmers more time by extending the effective date of the Chesapeake Bay Watershed Implementation Plan.
---
| Farm Bureau Provided Cheese Burgers for Lunch
---
|
---
| Thank you, to The Farm Bureau, for providing a delicious lunch, with Virginia Angus Cheese Burgers, to remind legislators that agriculture is the largest industry in Virginia. Thank you for all you do to support Virginia Farmers!
---
| Volunteers Wanted
---
|
---
|
---
| Volunteers Wanted! Our team of staff and volunteers is growing. Thank you for helping us improve Virginia. If you want to volunteer on my campaign for State Senate, please email john@mcguireforvirginia.com. Please put, "volunteer", in the subject line.
---
| Success
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Success! My bill, [HB 1891](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00196qQNxmUtWEOuCytK4FrDz0Y2qh00Csq2P-angvMZJaNx2pYhK-Lx80fP95C7bhYLwA0diMUGLqm81HUHauAnyMqoahj2LO0-wlgVkPJg1s2SUclqszLQbGElMvUWj_SAbZ63Iz1_J-wCQIpdBoqIgQaROrYITaiWNVvwuTX61nllldzPdTJnzbQwid95MC-BO4rcSNh_Lk=&c=ig8CMkX1Fd2BLLWY4XIz0EvOtV7Dlg25FQ1sloFrPwonEAqJ00DeUA==&ch=Z5jxqGfq7mAES_x3kwp08O0_hvMzb9BBGlKFnTgfL9SjlCvbLVV0YA==), a groundbreaking treatment ([Learn more here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00196qQNxmUtWEOuCytK4FrDz0Y2qh00Csq2P-angvMZJaNx2pYhK-LxyEwFEl1k_jxB73dEKKrT16z-D1XBQPJ5Hyeh9PJpPYd0uV-_-rB6N0KvuCA9WCF7zYASvtHyHNxBsVYiwNiRhZXbmi3o0TCkmaZESOH0lyYdwz6aPM9c0Ob061c2Li0javvj0BMNpEdkk6-S5s0SESgcsOpbb8vOvEUifD0WXpbWIkJS_okbMA=&c=ig8CMkX1Fd2BLLWY4XIz0EvOtV7Dlg25FQ1sloFrPwonEAqJ00DeUA==&ch=Z5jxqGfq7mAES_x3kwp08O0_hvMzb9BBGlKFnTgfL9SjlCvbLVV0YA==)) that helps those with traumatic brain injury, mental health, addiction, and autism, by establishing a Trans-cranial Magnetic Stimulation pilot program in Virginia. Thank you, to Brandon Soleau, a medically retired Army Ranger from the Ranger regiment, for sharing your expertise to help pass this bill in the General Assembly.
This bill will help people struggling with mental health, and I am excited it passed Health Welfare and Institutions Sub Committee this week, unopposed! I've been working on this legislation all summer with State Senator John Cosgrove. His Senate version [SB1234](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00196qQNxmUtWEOuCytK4FrDz0Y2qh00Csq2P-angvMZJaNx2pYhK-LxyEwFEl1k_jxeVMUFoqXvUqAmV-CGzwYEs_c4ZEThfh1FmpcP51_9_FleWKvItukOU5JDxfDQJO2KtPyXgRtPu8IrvHGjL2IBPVNjQ9NEmtj-oPCIrGJG5KA-4WkKdybYXRhRA9vAWsBi4XsK_pedYI=&c=ig8CMkX1Fd2BLLWY4XIz0EvOtV7Dlg25FQ1sloFrPwonEAqJ00DeUA==&ch=Z5jxqGfq7mAES_x3kwp08O0_hvMzb9BBGlKFnTgfL9SjlCvbLVV0YA==) has already passed the Senate floor 40-0!

| Virginia State Capitol Art
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Much of Virginia's history is depicted through art that is displayed in, and around, the Capitol. I highly suggest you sign up for a tour!
---
| The "Teebow bill"
---
|
---
|
---
| Unfortunately, the Teebow Bill, a bill I chief co-partroned with Delegate Marie March to allow home school students to participate in public school sports died in committee again this year. I am a big proponent of Home School and I believe this is great bill for Virginia youth. We will keep pushing!
---
| American Veterans Vote (AVV)
---
|
---
| I am proud to be a founding member of "American Veterans Vote". Thank you COL Mike Flanagan USA (RETD) for delivering my official AVV T-shirt. [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00196qQNxmUtWEOuCytK4FrDz0Y2qh00Csq2P-angvMZJaNx2pYhK-LxwzmNF0fFRkn0GqbPVLMDNeUnkf8yYKGLByQ7yRXoib5YcvLGYtiPkyOQqJcOpH-V0BxZCuyWyjnpa8sIUX9uZyneWS0rsgdmBLHD4j2OVIh&c=ig8CMkX1Fd2BLLWY4XIz0EvOtV7Dlg25FQ1sloFrPwonEAqJ00DeUA==&ch=Z5jxqGfq7mAES_x3kwp08O0_hvMzb9BBGlKFnTgfL9SjlCvbLVV0YA==) to learn more about AVV and why veterans should sign up and get involved. It is more important than ever for veterans to vote.

| Each day, individuals and groups visit legislators and share their concerns, which help us make the best decisions for Virginia. It is an honor to work on legislation for you. Thank you, for sharing your insight!

---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|

| Virginia National Guard Senior Leaders, public servants within the gubernatorial administration, and members of the Virginia General Assembly, including Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears, attended the Virginia National Guard Reception. The evening event included a catered buffet meal by Mission BBQ, complementary beverage service, and brief comments from the Virginia National Guard leadership, and leaders of the Commonwealth of Virginia.

| Fluvanna SD10 Candidate Forum
---
|
---
| I really enjoyed talking with constituents in Fluvanna County about legislation I'm working on in the General Assembly, and my campaign to be your next State Senator. Together we will un-California Virginia!
---
| Louisa Tea Party SD10 Candidate Forum
---
|
---
| I really enjoyed talking with constituents in Fluvanna County about legislation I'm working on in the General Assembly, and my campaign to be your next State Senator. Together we will un-California Virginia!

| Senate District 10 Update:
---
| We will have a convention for State Senate District 10 at 10am on May 6th, at Buckingham H.S. The address is 78 Knights Rd., Buckingham, VA 23921. Please [click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00196qQNxmUtWEOuCytK4FrDz0Y2qh00Csq2P-angvMZJaNx2pYhK-Lx25DKlJlCuDPHj1gu_1M2bACW5qcslK2OCtLrW6Basbnlke1nbog_4wZmFPrz2RTPFbe0ElK77uZloFjv5aE1a1JXgGQqxPni26zFkNHyVHpUzPKH_amr8hGKFQNFriHu6Ue2Xq-b4AAW2sq7HAQ55MW30ITjC6rYD_B1l4UGrTkBBFhY6ycJ0EFVuth0iPOROyaf3Yjfnct&c=ig8CMkX1Fd2BLLWY4XIz0EvOtV7Dlg25FQ1sloFrPwonEAqJ00DeUA==&ch=Z5jxqGfq7mAES_x3kwp08O0_hvMzb9BBGlKFnTgfL9SjlCvbLVV0YA==), and fill out the form to submit your commitment to being a delegate for John McGuire at the Senate District 10 convention. By signing up now, we can provide you with details as they come in.

| I am committed, as your Representative, to adhering to the principal duties of government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, i.e., the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.
I look forward to seeing you around the district. In the meantime, please continue the teamwork, and let me know what you are thinking. You can reach me during session through my Legislative Aid, Archer McGiffin, at deljmcguire@house.virginia.gov, or 804-698-1056.
Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Endorsement List == | | | | == | == | | | | Reminder: I cannot accept donations until I get out of session February 25. | | | | 2023 Session Update Week 3 | | Governor Youngkin "Compete to Win" | | Governor Glenn Youngkin discusses teamwork "Getting it Done Together", and his major tax cut policies in Virginia including my bill to lower taxes on Virginia retired Veterans ==. | | I had the honor of addressing the crowd, leading the pledge of allegiance, and introducing my friend, and our caucus tax expert, Delegate Joe McNamara. | Finance Sub-Committee chair on State Taxation, Delegate Joe McNamara, speaking about how he eliminated the grocery tax in Virginia, and his two 2023 tax reducing bills, HB 2138 & HB 2319. | Congressman Rob Wittman seen here, speaking on Republicans working together, at all levels, to improve Virginia. | | | | | | | | | | | | | It was a huge honor to speak at Governor Youngkin's, "Compete to Win", event at the Carole and Marcus Weinstein Jewish Community Center (==) in Richmond. It was good to see Senator Siobhan Dunnavant, Delegates A.C. Cordoza, constituents, and many other friends there as well! | 2023 McGuire Legislative Agenda | == | The General Assembly convened on Wednesday, January 11th marking the beginning of the 403rd legislative session of the House of Delegates. We begin week four Monday. == for a list of legislation on the agenda brought to me by constituents, and sponsored by me, to improve Virginia. | Delegate Buddy Fowler | | Please support my friend and fellow Delegate Buddy Fowler for re-election to the Virginia House of Delegates. Due to redistricting, his district now includes Louisa County, western Hanover County, and part of Henrico County. | Amelia World Series Champions | | | | | | Amelia County Delegate Tommy Wright recognized and congratulated the Amelia Dixie Youth Major League All-Star boys Baseball Team for winning the Dixie Youth Division II Majors World Series in 2022! == to read Delegate Tommy Wright's resolution. Over the summer while campaigning for State Senate District 10 in Amelia County, I met the Dixie Youth Major All-stars players, coaches, and parents. They were doing a car wash to raise money so the team could go to South Carolina and compete in the World Series. Congratulations for winning the championship! | Parental Rights Success! | == | Parental Rights Success! == to watch me present my bill in K12 Subcommittee to return power back to parents in Virginia! | Eliminate Drop Box Success! | == | We need to restore confidence in our elections. Im excited to inform you my bill to remove drop boxes has passed the house. This will save, money, time, and improve confidence in our elections. == | Happy Birthday, Dale Hargrove Alderman of Hanover | | I stopped by Lola's Farmhouse Bistro and crashed former Hanover GOP Chair Dale Hargrove's Birthday Party. Her father Republican Delegate Frank Hargrove represented Hanover County in the House of Delegates and is the father of the modern Republican Conservative movement in Virginia. It is hard to believe, the last time my opponent ran at the state level in Virginia State Senate District 10, he ran as a Democrat against beloved Republican Conservative Frank Hargrove. | Support Local Business | | | Please support local businesses. Lola's Farmhouse Bistro is a great restaurant for a date night with your significant other. It was good to catch up with the owner Ronnie as well! | On The Campaign Trail | | | | We are making friends, and signing folks up to be delegates for the convention, all across State Senate District 10. Please go to www.john4va.com and pledge your support to be a delegate at our convention on May 6 at Buckingham County High School! | Buckingham Farm Bureau | | Thank you to members of the Buckingham Farm Bureau, for stopping by and sharing concerns for farmers in Buckingham County. I'm glad to hear you are very much in support of the Ag bill I am working on with Delegate Michael Webert. This bill gives Virginia Farmers more time by extending the effective date of the Chesapeake Bay Watershed Implementation Plan. | Farm Bureau Provided Cheese Burgers for Lunch | | Thank you, to The Farm Bureau, for providing a delicious lunch, with Virginia Angus Cheese Burgers, to remind legislators that agriculture is the largest industry in Virginia. Thank you for all you do to support Virginia Farmers! | Volunteers Wanted | | | Volunteers Wanted! Our team of staff and volunteers is growing. Thank you for helping us improve Virginia. If you want to volunteer on my campaign for State Senate, please email john@mcguireforvirginia.com. Please put, "volunteer", in the subject line. | Success | | | | Success! My bill, ==, a groundbreaking treatment (==) that helps those with traumatic brain injury, mental health, addiction, and autism, by establishing a Trans-cranial Magnetic Stimulation pilot program in Virginia. Thank you, to Brandon Soleau, a medically retired Army Ranger from the Ranger regiment, for sharing your expertise to help pass this bill in the General Assembly. This bill will help people struggling with mental health, and I am excited it passed Health Welfare and Institutions Sub Committee this week, unopposed! I've been working on this legislation all summer with State Senator John Cosgrove. His Senate version == has already passed the Senate floor 40-0! | Virginia State Capitol Art | | | | | Much of Virginia's history is depicted through art that is displayed in, and around, the Capitol. I highly suggest you sign up for a tour! | The "Teebow bill" | | | Unfortunately, the Teebow Bill, a bill I chief co-partroned with Delegate Marie March to allow home school students to participate in public school sports died in committee again this year. I am a big proponent of Home School and I believe this is great bill for Virginia youth. We will keep pushing! | American Veterans Vote (AVV) | | I am proud to be a founding member of "American Veterans Vote". Thank you COL Mike Flanagan USA (RETD) for delivering my official AVV T-shirt. == to learn more about AVV and why veterans should sign up and get involved. It is more important than ever for veterans to vote. | Session Visits | | | | | | | | Each day, individuals and groups visit legislators and share their concerns, which help us make the best decisions for Virginia. It is an honor to work on legislation for you. Thank you, for sharing your insight! | Virginia National Guard Reception | | | | | | | | Virginia National Guard Senior Leaders, public servants within the gubernatorial administration, and members of the Virginia General Assembly, including Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears, attended the Virginia National Guard Reception. The evening event included a catered buffet meal by Mission BBQ, complementary beverage service, and brief comments from the Virginia National Guard leadership, and leaders of the Commonwealth of Virginia. | Fluvanna SD10 Candidate Forum | | I really enjoyed talking with constituents in Fluvanna County about legislation I'm working on in the General Assembly, and my campaign to be your next State Senator. Together we will un-California Virginia! | Louisa Tea Party SD10 Candidate Forum | | I really enjoyed talking with constituents in Fluvanna County about legislation I'm working on in the General Assembly, and my campaign to be your next State Senator. Together we will un-California Virginia! | Senate District 10 Update: | We will have a convention for State Senate District 10 at 10am on May 6th, at Buckingham H.S. The address is 78 Knights Rd., Buckingham, VA 23921. Please ==, and fill out the form to submit your commitment to being a delegate for John McGuire at the Senate District 10 convention. By signing up now, we can provide you with details as they come in. | == | I am committed, as your Representative, to adhering to the principal duties of government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, i.e., the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. I look forward to seeing you around the district. In the meantime, please continue the teamwork, and let me know what you are thinking. You can reach me during session through my Legislative Aid, Archer McGiffin, at deljmcguire@house.virginia.gov, or 804-698-1056. Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you. | | | | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life Pro-Gun America 1st Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 NFIB 100 Endorsement List == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == Past Newsletters: Week 2 2023 == Week 1 2023 == 2022 Newsletter Links == Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | McGuire for Delegate | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene: “We will IMPEACH BIDEN!!”
body:
She really means it.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4e873fab-5ac7-4153-876b-b9a085e996d7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_She said it. She means it: "Impeach Joe Biden"_** _These words are the obsession of clownish security threat and holder of Kevin McCarthy's leash, Marjorie Taylor Greene. Why? She doesn't know, she'll work that part out later. _ **_The President has presided over a term that must be mentioned in the same breath as FDR's. We just learned we had 2.9% economic growth the last quarter of 2022, unemployment is at a 50 year low, and in some states such as Wisconsin, Georgia, Arizona, Montana, West Virginia and more, it is the lowest it has EVER been. Biden has lowered the Trump Deficit by $1.8 Trillion--yep, that's with a T._** But the corporate media won't tell you this, except in passing before the move onto Hunter Biden's laptop, because they're scared of the right-wing owners of their outlets, feel the need to *both sides* everything or are just looking for clicks on their story, no matter the cost to our democracy. So We must share the truth about what Joe Biden has done. _**For example, he got Republicans to support bipartisan measures, passing a huge, job-creating infrastructure bill and the first gun-safety bill in a generation. ****But, he also wasn't scared to push ahead by himself when Republicans acted in bad faith. The historic Inflation Reduction Act, CHIPS legislation, bringing high-paying manufacturing jobs back home, helping students in debt to predatory lenders, funding historically Black universities, reauthorizing the Violence Against Women Act and much more.**_ [_**Please join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to fight for Joe Biden's presidency. **_**_There will be never be a more important race in our lifetimes than this one._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1d7ca7e3-03c9-4512-bae7-22bf3cac3bbc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**When the midterm approached, The President--in an important rhetorical move--called out MAGA "semi-fascists."** The result? **Per historian Michael Beschloss, President Biden had the strongest midterm congressional showing of any President in 88 years. **Yet, again, you'd think Republicans would be happy with a stronger more prosperous America. But you'd be wrong. This was the response from the real leader of the GOP House Caucus, who takes Kevin McCarthy for his dog walk eveyr while telling him "good boy," and making her demands:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T45a6acee-6e1e-4f4f-8e06-b348366d79ed/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Watch the new free course now
body:
It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementa

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=714fa1fe806746128778486c6718b647&_e=Ackw9aAS_dHpKqMyrOefbdccQrq73cnkuFamuZyw5E86nsxYuz9qPHM0lgB3zwRMknuM-1G8sweq7iC8uQPo8LayGoyK6n5OY1cY0Cy-hfFnv4NxWjxmIiO3yC9TclkEBy3GA8GxqEa2NQZUAjJ3l03uTCTSSlrPMmIuH3WLUov-X2chtLzBh0Ipu848e93V8-oxyBu2L2b1StW_gxBYN89ssldl1rEVueznVZDJ1tkhqGgcs3A6MxLwKuJ-JfWf3t10pmLlde1k_xSrd_sq3HRTi8jQHpDkeXazj7GqN3mgwbRfl4JESZdtiPJrJIx_zUmf6bmniBWiSelBm0XE2Szf7vbyBTZsiB3TIfKlVWmRoZcol177DQbOTMLfUySMj_f_1uT6wgLBaZF1JJXlzg%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we’ve produced the new online course, **“The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism.”**
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=714fa1fe806746128778486c6718b647&_e=Ackw9aAS_dHpKqMyrOefbdccQrq73cnkuFamuZyw5E86nsxYuz9qPHM0lgB3zwRMknuM-1G8sweq7iC8uQPo8LayGoyK6n5OY1cY0Cy-hfFnv4NxWjxmIiO3yC9TclkEBy3GA8GxqEa2NQZUAjJ3l03uTCTSSlrPMmIuH3WLUov-X2chtLzBh0Ipu848e93V8-oxyBu2L2b1StW_gxBYN89ssldl1rEVueznVZDJ1tkhqGgcs3A6MxLwKuJ-JfWfDfv4SSkIfsZud6lJ5bafafAvj4riI6NyFi3cOpUThCvI8hINJEM0srznEF1asgBDKzQV3bYtwnidd45wGWEy1A1zRASpOzNxZamUwUd5a_qVnRLb_-S1vxGRfi-BTFbpQdcrIbA26l9OhkRHKxDPeg%3D%3D)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You’ll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you’ll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today’s global elite; and, you’ll explore how these movements overtook America’s key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=714fa1fe806746128778486c6718b647&_e=Ackw9aAS_dHpKqMyrOefbdccQrq73cnkuFamuZyw5E86nsxYuz9qPHM0lgB3zwRMknuM-1G8sweq7iC8uQPo8LayGoyK6n5OY1cY0Cy-hfFnv4NxWjxmIiO3yC9TclkEBy3GA8GxqEa2NQZUAjJ3l03uTCTSSlrPMmIuH3WLUov-X2chtLzBh0Ipu848e93V8-oxyBu2L2b1StW_gxBYN89ssldl1rEVueznVZDJ1tkhqGgcs3A6MxLwKuJ-JfWf5awCOgmup2B8S4mXA-H5C0VptuE4Xju3nFVIl3MOoip9VL_nn0cxXlbn7EmDjwyTAAQtDvePBZl5jJTvN5mQHEJD5jqB-u0DA8DqcuWK4_0Cpz8Ps8FAxaKZfOyrEMQ_G8xvMg-3oyiNLabFuM7cpA%3D%3D)**

I hope you’ll join us to better understand—and learn how to confront—the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[**unsubscribe**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_s=714fa1fe806746128778486c6718b647&_t=IFyBpmhQIH2Imi26xlg2nzZdUvVo4Oe3031RsKJhSc3IkDfikNKpn1JJYwNcZvWk1mEJesZ1ii62gLeTqyWZJ-zdDbBBuH-lvEW-ul_X6SA%3D)

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: It's time to break up the FBI
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz**
body:
Peter,

**FIRST -** The FBI invented the Russian collusion hoax to stage a coup against President Trump.

**NEXT -** Whistleblowers stepped forward with evidence the FBI covered up Joe and Hunter Biden's crime spree.

**THEN -** One of the FBI agents investigating Donald Trump got indicted for colluding with Russia.

**I appeared on Sean Hannity's Fox News show with Congressman Jim Jordan to discuss the rot inside the FBI.**

**[Please watch and sign your"Break up the FBI" petition for a few moments](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61438974:WcJacVDNQ:m:1:2365227053:CDC124BADAAEC589D00DFE6407B4A64A:r).**
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61438974:WcJacVDNQ:m:1:2365227053:CDC124BADAAEC589D00DFE6407B4A64A:r) | | [ CLICK HERE TO WATCH](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61438974:WcJacVDNQ:m:1:2365227053:CDC124BADAAEC589D00DFE6407B4A64A:r)
---
**Crooked FBI agents tired to undermine out last two presidential elections.**

The perpetrators of the Russian collusion hoax were raking in corrupt cash from Russia.

The FBI rigged the 2020 election by leaning on Big Tech to censor the Hunter Biden story.

And the FBI will rerun this playbook in 2024.

Shadowy Deep State operatives cannot shape the presidential field.

_The top levels of the FBI know Joe Biden is senile and can't beat President Trump_.

So, the Bureau is trying to run Joe Biden out of town to help the Democrats roll with another candidate to steal the next presidential.

That's why Congressman Jordan and I will hold hearings, issue subpoenas, and demand answers to see just how deep Trump Derangement Syndrome at the FBI runs.

The FBI's taken illegal foreign cash and run illegal domestic political operations here at home.

It's time to break up the FBI and assign FBI agents who are patriotic Americans across the county and **get them out from under the spell of the swamp in D.C.**

Spread them out across the country under the direction of U.S. Attorneys nominated by the president and confirmed by the Senate.

I'm leading the fight in Congress to end the weaponization of the government against Donald Trump and the MAGA movement.

Congressman Jim Jordan and I appeared on Sean Hannity's show to lay out our game plan for victory.

**[Please watch my interview and sign your"Break up the FBI" petition](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61438974:WcJacVDNQ:m:1:2365227053:CDC124BADAAEC589D00DFE6407B4A64A:r).**

**And after you sign,[please chip](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61438974:WcJacVDNQ:m:1:2365227053:CDC124BADAAEC589D00DFE6407B4A64A:r) in to help me drain the swamp and defend President Trump.**

_Sincerely,_

Matt Gaetz (R-FL)

* * *
| **Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz**

name: Conservatives Give
subject: “What happened to my country?”
body:
It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0078079c9dd34a6e8bb039de0c2b4cc1&_e=U74QO_2cYrRrxxeAS_A4_85EOx4k_z1-znhbyq1chTcYyVqF7rETC7FUiXptL3JbMSMTzdztXuqYeZZhuHvSQl_Y6cPjTl4g88lPiJ86VCIZergiSIWRVX4vs2DC3EeqaxgzDnrDe6B9THEUrdgv_dX2ypX0ecd4itg4-panVwRq701KlxQ6kZj9kl57drpFub1-z50NiMfmE0jBN-AGh_f_HAsIdWASZm_FN-lZ8q44eQRYQqLNQxQ2cAcK9V8oeFnXjhqiTtqCHJQ0Y0WlCC6PYUJyXUZc37iQqeEwQs17lZKXdYXwBNOtWkmuR-6wnO01USVze2l5da3jsKoM4vF_jj73oZNlRRCCjKnLIH1oyhypZKDl_xfHVzQzCl6vgdQoEmmHH6RQNmT3PJAuVQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0078079c9dd34a6e8bb039de0c2b4cc1&_e=U74QO_2cYrRrxxeAS_A4_85EOx4k_z1-znhbyq1chTcYyVqF7rETC7FUiXptL3JbMSMTzdztXuqYeZZhuHvSQl_Y6cPjTl4g88lPiJ86VCIZergiSIWRVX4vs2DC3EeqaxgzDnrDe6B9THEUrdgv_dX2ypX0ecd4itg4-panVwRq701KlxQ6kZj9kl57drpFub1-z50NiMfmE0jBN-AGh_f_HAsIdWASZm_FN-lZ8q44eQRYQqLNQxQ2cAcK9V8o-b80MtsADhHMheHhbyt_2AYhFHsn_nl24jR44eBer8KdmvXiI1xfyuUPE78RnUchRUSTIXfCilrrfH9IuZJyCzT2PIga6CUrZEa4gXvWcB0FFgUB9XHtTfsVyvdQZCN8JjmTKreZJn43YPADKBcJsQ%3D%3D)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0078079c9dd34a6e8bb039de0c2b4cc1&_e=U74QO_2cYrRrxxeAS_A4_85EOx4k_z1-znhbyq1chTcYyVqF7rETC7FUiXptL3JbMSMTzdztXuqYeZZhuHvSQl_Y6cPjTl4g88lPiJ86VCIZergiSIWRVX4vs2DC3EeqaxgzDnrDe6B9THEUrdgv_dX2ypX0ecd4itg4-panVwRq701KlxQ6kZj9kl57drpFub1-z50NiMfmE0jBN-AGh_f_HAsIdWASZm_FN-lZ8q44eQRYQqLNQxQ2cAcK9V8o-W9sh0bWunZAxoeT8DrjfucS8-AE1UL-fmCcWgc5uZnn3R4yEMAhSySFRrUxTOGMYqk8OE_5cfyvD1Cz7yUBx7E46sExXnHfaDjdZ9mMMJ6gWJPkMC4m7Tn5usEE4WklqKVEqcFz21cab7FG5xT1vA%3D%3D)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Your America
subject: “What happened to my country?”
body:
Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?” [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7831%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=BQBxHdgxcnhT1Fd5LV8G0A&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94501%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IjIXFUx1ZCQvXFnbwUBYtg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we’ve produced the new online course, **“The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism.”**
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94502%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3rqWVa3ANjIBv384imZB6g&sysid=1)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You’ll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you’ll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today’s global elite; and, you’ll explore how these movements overtook America’s key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94503%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MbsZhqIeUXJDqd5vywJ8yA&sysid=1)**

I hope you’ll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7831%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=BQBxHdgxcnhT1Fd5LV8G0A&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7831%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=BQBxHdgxcnhT1Fd5LV8G0A&sysid=1)

name: Grace Jo
subject: One story every high school student needs to hear
body:
I have a story that every high school student in America needs to hear. I escaped North Korea and the horrors of socialism.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztgiaphqcifq30cichqsv0dfq728650usspeo9m8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1i6eo34clh2bs)
Hello Friend,

I have a story that every high school student in America needs to hear.

I escaped North Korea and the horrors of socialism.

Most Americans today don't understand what socialism does to you -- especially the younger generation.

High school students don't know how it steals your humanity by starving your soul, mind, and stomach of all that freedom provides.

_**That 's why I want to tell my story to high school students across America. **_

**Young Voice 's Dissident Project brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell their stories. **

We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure.

[_**Friend, can you help sponsor a student for just $15, so they can hear my story --the story of a survivor? Click here to donate $15, $45, $90, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuj2vfaq195jt2ua5ogkf3lf67or4skga5s8qkl8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1i6eo34clh2bs)

**This is my story.**

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb6eq29n13ejok6h4ng1o5arjpiires83rb1ipl0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1i6eo34clh2bs)

During the 90s, North Korea suffered one of the world's worst famines.

During that time, I only ate about one meal a week--a little rice, maybe some vegetables. Sometimes even mice that we caught.

In 1998, my grandmother and younger brothers all passed away because of starvation. The food situation was very bad. My younger brother and I were starved for 10 days straight. We only drank cold water because there was no food we could find.

My father was tortured and starved to death, he passed away when North Korean agents transferred him from a detention center to jail, and his "crime" was that he left his country in search of food for his family.

That was when my mother, sister, and I first escaped. It became the first of many, as we were caught, repatriated, and escaped again.

Some of my family escaped, but the regime murdered most of them.

This is just a small part of my story, Friend.

**Coming to America changed my life. **

That's why I want to help preserve the freedom and prosperity in America by sharing my story and experiences with high school students across this wonderful country.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjpa6llf5cgc94b0mt09h7fhj874use0ep9k4cd0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1i6eo34clh2bs)

That's why I'm asking for your support, Friend. Can you help sponsor the Dissident Program so I can share my story?

Click any button to send your donation.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1oiot8uk2uu7dhvc8314f1ccuftr536ciaj8a5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1i6eo34clh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zio1nuqtkgmtqt4b6l39brakg6rv43tte9tqc7so_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1i6eo34clh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zalhv6k6jrm01bmh9epddg7qvnunmv9fp9h0q1oo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1i6eo34clh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoaudn3f5vck2021ip55q1vu4cijdunhrccmifig_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1i6eo34clh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1s8bh263bl43u34cqdl5od5vg77d82v463d2qt0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1i6eo34clh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpotn9gqd6pjtag8u9ktb2voltel2hd80i7aep7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1i6eo34clh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo5mqc5q88t3cdld3s0v0kdhk0s1rgh9gke29q7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1i6eo34clh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqbuf605tpnmk7apem8rl96fjljs7k1021jtdkrg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1i6eo34clh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zai1h2s4rkskbqfg2f1tlsj0daf9fnf2m1jrcj40_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1i6eo34clh2bs)

Thank you,

Grace Jo

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2301-q1-wn?refcode=230118-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2301-q1-wn?refcode=230118-email]Team,
We are coming up on the two year mark since President Biden’s inauguration. Since then, the President and House Democrats have delivered on their campaign promises. From the American Rescue Plan to the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill, Democrats said they were going to make progress for American families, and they have.
Now that I am in Congress, and Democrats have lost the House Majority, we are going to have to keep up the hard work for the next two years to continue moving the needle forward. Your support is a critical part of this plan. Can you chip in to support my campaign and help me do my part to push Democratic priorities forward? name: Team Andy Kim
subject: A complete disregard for the people who elected them
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
National Republicans' first month can be described as chaotic, tumultuous, disorganized... that's us trying to be polite.

From the days-long Speaker fight to the flood of pointless, and often hateful, culture war legislation, House Republicans have struggled to meet this moment. More concerning, though, is that they have shown complete disregard for the people who elected them.

We're building up our movement of people who believe our representatives should actually represent us . We are coming up on the first key fundraising deadline of the new year, and we're counting on people like you. Will you join the movement and chip in $3? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-01-29-partisaneom&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=9c490c62-dc9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73]

In this their first month with the majority, Republicans have

Spent days fighting to elect a speaker, crippling every congressional office's ability to help constituents.
Gutted the House Ethics Office, making it harder to hold members accountable at a time when Americans are most concerned about corruption and conflicts of interest.
Placed election deniers and insurrectionist sympathizers in powerful positions, jeopardizing our democracy.
Attacked women's rights with cruel and unnecessary abortion legislation.
Sided with wealthy tax cheats over the rule of law with a vote to defund the IRS.
Proposed a 30% sales tax, which would raise the price of necessities, hurting low-income families the most.

Their cruelty and dysfunction will continue as extremists gain more power within the Republican party. That's why we're building up our grassroots movement now. Will you chip in now before our first end-of-month deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-01-29-partisaneom&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=9c490c62-dc9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73]

Amidst all this chaos, one thing is certain: Andy Kim will stand firm in his principles . He will continue finding common ground where he can as he advocates for the American people.

Together, we will create an America where democracy, civility, and respect flourish.

Team Andy

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: TAKE ACTION! Ban ESG Investments NOW
body:
|
---
| | |
---
| [TAKE ACTION NOW](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/MmKTovAmRCfoZDzeBI_0ow)Earlier this year, the Mississippi Freedom Caucus alerted you of the dangers of ESG investments and how they were harmful to Mississippi taxpayers. In an article by steering committee member John Williams, [ESG - Woke or Broke ](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/eJdG5dQ0XZyzT1JAV6Pr4w)John explained how investments in ESG funds were a threat to your retirement income. John wrote,
> Many Americans save for their retirement through a tax-deferred investment account such as an IRA or 401(k). Most of the time, this money is placed in various mutual fund companies, and their funds are then invested in the stocks of individual companies chosen by the asset managers of those funds. The goal for these investments is simple: invest in companies that make a profit, so your retirement assets grow as much as possible. Less profit means less money for retirement.
Because of that article and **your action** to demand Mississippi take action to protect your retirement investments, State Treasurer David McRae took a stand against ESG investments.In an article published by Magnolia Tribune, McRae listed several reasons for his stand against ESG, including;
1. ESG standards are being applied subjectively, often according to perceived political ideology rather than hard facts.
2. ESG policies contribute to inflation and higher costs for working Mississippians.
3. ESG will do generational harm to Mississippi’s economy and our leading job creators.
4. ESG scores will create bubbles in favored industries – and bubbles burst.
5. BlackRock and other ESG investors are knowingly failing to uphold their fiduciary responsibility to PERS members by prioritizing ESG above all else.

Now we need your help again. Rep. Dana Criswell has authored a bill that would prohibit investments by the state of Mississippi in ESG funds. But it is in danger of dying in committee because the deadline of January 31 is quickly approaching and Chairman John Reed has not allowed a vote on this bill.[House Bill 1099](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/QzvSL2G4f3Aj74g3IV68uQ) must be passed or your retirement income could be lost.[TAKE ACTION NOW](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/MmKTovAmRCfoZDzeBI_0ow)Complete the form and send an email demanding House Bill 1099 pass the Appropriations Committee and your retirement be protected from the liberal WOKE agenda designed to take your money. You may also call **601-345-1211****and leave a message for Chairman John Reed.**
---
| You are receiving this email because you signed up for alerts from Mississippi Freedom Caucus.
Click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/p6lC7qX50tC8iSjBO6lJBQ) to unsubscribe from this mailing list.

---
| | [ ](https://www.votervoice.net)
---

name: Speaker Kevin McCarthy
subject: FOR YOUR EYES ONLY:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | **FOR YOUR EYES ONLY: MESSAGE FROM SPEAKER MCCARTHY**
Friend, thanks to YOUR SUPPORT, Republicans have taken back the House and are ready to get to work for Americans across the nation.

But Biden has the White House & Schumer has the Senate. We are now the ONLY thing standing between the elitist radical agenda of Biden and hardworking Americans like you.

Whether or not we reach our fundraising goal by midnight tonight will define what happens for the next two years.

**We need 100 patriots from every zip code in the nation to step up by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**

If we fail, the last two years will just look like a warmup when the devastating consequences of their radical policies hit home.

We can still come together to address these common-sense issues – that’s what I’ve done my entire career.

Friend, this will only take a minute of your time:
Tomorrow marks our first big fundraising deadline since I officially launched my reelection campaign. **But right now, we're falling way short of our $30,000 end-of-month goal, so I'm counting on your help to close this gap ASAP.**
Republicans only need to win two more seats to deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. And here in New York, they just had their best election cycle in _two decades —_ winning enough seats to deliver the House majority to the GOP. Now, they're zeroing in on my seat to flip the Senate next.
**Missing our first major goal would send a message to McConnell and the GOP that this seat is vulnerable — plus, it would mean starting this campaign at a serious fundraising disadvantage.
