name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=53bb4d474d7f47ffa7ec6eb0c6d7b90d&_e=sK5rfnTapbItq0-Mq_tDwgduGB2LIby27k63AEOh_LTP7Q4WfkZGFiidN2AR0msFidybvqEMtsHfMgEzxjZZn4rf0ZF4_jojs3GSGvTHNvX5oWExND7MAGcVoFbuJ7t4up1ZCQEJNexCrTbDfeqmK3EADeXA0yRb4fuqX8KnYfE_R9N_Cv4FGr1J8OEuYTvcYT0XVmDvCGuY0i6DAg9lvHI9V-2Bs_frl7vioCIr8a4m7b2cnrJShBvCnp79g_mKJTYopx9gce9cM6_IaHxHf8QkHJciawdoZcPFNSpJIw1Mt4Y9kX60gXsshGf33eOs4gSaZydA-Eg8AidnOl8nr3ezKB_4pJzBco4V31UEBaqX2loz0yBc0IZ5KnUNaux4hSXNIKiyWNWvLZIAtzMqUw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=53bb4d474d7f47ffa7ec6eb0c6d7b90d&_e=sK5rfnTapbItq0-Mq_tDwgduGB2LIby27k63AEOh_LTP7Q4WfkZGFiidN2AR0msFidybvqEMtsHfMgEzxjZZn4rf0ZF4_jojs3GSGvTHNvX5oWExND7MAGcVoFbuJ7t4up1ZCQEJNexCrTbDfeqmK3EADeXA0yRb4fuqX8KnYfE_R9N_Cv4FGr1J8OEuYTvcYT0XVmDvCGuY0i6DAg9lvHI9V-2Bs_frl7vioCIr8a7UgmVtf34IkY-Bp0HXJirDp7Gy1-nnvnLfppPkHQqhvciNdQf5S1PrQgzpVD9BrFlI5CkVq9V38l3NQVbGHaH7xpRa41DNwNUQ6sQxbKWsr1mT_UZ8r-MIheqNA3ViE6sK4WnjpNTugbQqJwam5boBAa4RcBoKl37FiEiVda58sg%3D%3D)**
For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=53bb4d474d7f47ffa7ec6eb0c6d7b90d&_e=sK5rfnTapbItq0-Mq_tDwgduGB2LIby27k63AEOh_LTP7Q4WfkZGFiidN2AR0msFidybvqEMtsHfMgEzxjZZn4rf0ZF4_jojs3GSGvTHNvX5oWExND7MAGcVoFbuJ7t4up1ZCQEJNexCrTbDfeqmK3EADeXA0yRb4fuqX8KnYfE_R9N_Cv4FGr1J8OEuYTvcYT0XVmDvCGuY0i6DAg9lvHI9V-2Bs_frl7vioCIr8a7VypiU-26Eot-Ar5k7NzyFPSih117_6G70lbp_3mABUb5RkalIMZveAHu8IaJzAmwm46eF9GCmXHq4qbDRqK84vOFhfcpqmfjizMaK__igWgzJAyDYq5jbdRKne9Hl6gIyTNd076acD0Ddf87nExkbekqSEWuzMK6OSrFijI7I5A%3D%3D)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=53bb4d474d7f47ffa7ec6eb0c6d7b90d&_t=Xg6KkRylLT3RB2SpNVADHhJAEDkuIrOF_HXQ7iR163j64oG1tJbuFgltaaS-RygY9-VQcdbEqX0LM00J0iCFgciPnJgnZjHH_g9auR5pr5F5l5UZPO8ZJ9KnJ4soA5gfEG6ETZh-txDJpOiHyjEFdmcWsZ0sXwTv59PfkCt_-Rg%3D)

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | **“McCarthy’s concessions spur fears of potential default, government shutdown” -_The Hill_** Derek, In order to become Speaker of the House, Kevin McCarthy made a number of concessions to hardline Republicans – one of them being that any move to raise the debt ceiling must be accompanied by drastic spending cuts. Extreme Republican chaos is putting us at risk of a catastrophic default. **Let’s be frank: if the debt ceiling is not raised and we default, there will be dire consequences for our country.** The Treasury Department may not have enough money to cover military and federal workers’ salaries – or even Social Security – and our doctors who treat patients enrolled in Medicare won’t get paid. The result will be nothing short of economic carnage, with instability roiling the markets... skyrocketing interest rates... turbo-charged inflation... and long-lasting damage to our country’s standing in the world. This is what Mark Warner is facing in the Senate right now, and to top it off, the first monthly fundraising deadline of the year is just days away. That’s why it’s crucial Democrats at the House, Senate, and Grassroots level stand together right now. _**[Mark needs you to step up and have his back while he’s working to prevent this Republican chaos. Can you chip in $5 right now before our critical end-of-month deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57972819/389656250/-473032319?refcode=mw_em_230129_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYThiMTRjOC0wOWEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8jHOID7JUIT5V80iGwY4Ht33kJf2moBfS7WzeEbuoZQ=)**_ We can’t allow the American people to be held hostage by the Republican agenda, or by a handful of right-wing extremists who managed to derail the swearing-in of the House of Representatives for days. _**[So please, we’re asking: Donate anything you can afford so we can hit our end-of-month goal and keep fighting for progress>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57972820/389656251/-473032319?refcode=mw_em_230129_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYThiMTRjOC0wOWEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8jHOID7JUIT5V80iGwY4Ht33kJf2moBfS7WzeEbuoZQ=)**_ Thank you for your support, Team Warner _ _ **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57972825/389656252/-473032319?refcode=mw_em_230129_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYThiMTRjOC0wOWEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8jHOID7JUIT5V80iGwY4Ht33kJf2moBfS7WzeEbuoZQ=)** _ _

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: What do you think about higher education today?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and govern
| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7e5008e780b148e3b274c25db5e31245&_e=A4YjGvYz8DzO6FSj-NFGf--8ZPEp5NoP-1DkqKB7zahMOIGLQv2hcW_7ez4eDBfbfRG2ITIxMOy8lsI2As8_I_9KEQv4gHD_kM23xk6TkNzjG3_p3mXvtPbKmLqlrD-6EmrrDN0j7082hJjBuvfwiO4364325TJTj4JtNOiwtckEKd0nz9wKT23VKrKcN7Fy9q1bASFAg7HOBX-l4SmTjyGIwzTeY7sqzAMlf2cd6t7T88Qj0Q69OoR2_EeeQWssvz-L6piG3-feBVmRBk6-WaBX897r2vM_6iO-oC2onfOT6GldmbY81KzMWh2jfLhKpYJHfDG9hnrPdtsa5L_WxFUWdrriaiajX5iCpW1OlX16AdJnG5qfT3GIz7p_wMM0)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government—including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we’d like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here »**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7e5008e780b148e3b274c25db5e31245&_e=A4YjGvYz8DzO6FSj-NFGf--8ZPEp5NoP-1DkqKB7zahMOIGLQv2hcW_7ez4eDBfbfRG2ITIxMOy8lsI2As8_I_9KEQv4gHD_kM23xk6TkNzjG3_p3mXvtPbKmLqlrD-6EmrrDN0j7082hJjBuvfwiO4364325TJTj4JtNOiwtckEKd0nz9wKT23VKrKcN7Fy9q1bASFAg7HOBX-l4SmTjyGIwzTeY7sqzAMlf2cd6t4T4CakatoYbQ_Sbpol49bexAxdylpNNZSVVz35mGEBFOgTGR7QqlNti-yS8bNa36Ndk1owcHnIEbTvXJXJwxXYS4bDhs7wBpOw2A35TljDtrKbVwXi0c4WjzSBGQHg-livL8RjwWOL38B8-VGz22KT) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation’s great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding—even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today »**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7e5008e780b148e3b274c25db5e31245&_e=A4YjGvYz8DzO6FSj-NFGf--8ZPEp5NoP-1DkqKB7zahMOIGLQv2hcW_7ez4eDBfbfRG2ITIxMOy8lsI2As8_I_9KEQv4gHD_kM23xk6TkNzjG3_p3mXvtPbKmLqlrD-6EmrrDN0j7082hJjBuvfwiO4364325TJTj4JtNOiwtckEKd0nz9wKT23VKrKcN7Fy9q1bASFAg7HOBX-l4SmTjyGIwzTeY7sqzAMlf2cd6t4H5_TMn1mlSX9PDgpEx8XOS80BnuXiihig_6_SC3dr8YgT6GOx_JCILhmIj3e35IcYWLzC9pQoe_wzxB2rmtfNwWftftZRJiIHKTWpNGhTvtACEw2vJlGlKlGFM_K1m2Yf6igxxUAshW_vWnz5ZebX) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8295?t=1009&akid=3940%2E5885482%2EfW0VTQ ]Axios Pro: Drug companies brace for Bernie

Peter Willis,

With Bernie Sanders taking over the HELP Committee, he now has oversight
over Big Pharma, and the industry is gearing up for war.

Axios is reporting that drug companies are preparing to attack Bernie and
stop him from holding them accountable.

Big Pharma knows that its price gouging of sick Americans is indefensible,
so it plans to send an army of lobbyists and allies in the corporate media
to slander Bernie Sanders.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8295?t=1010&akid=3940%2E5885482%2EfW0VTQ ]That's why we need your help to fight back. Pitch in $10 or more to
have Bernie's back, and we'll send you this limited-edition new Bernie
sticker celebrating his new role!

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: TIME TO REVERSE THE GUN GRAB OF 2020: THIS MONDAY at 8am Senator Chase Will Present 2 Bills to Reverse Gun Control Passed in 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
It's Time to Reverse Unconstitutional Red Flag Laws & End Localities Ability to Create Gun Free Zones
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kwrNOEfQmkZKBZN_b-khhAkrsLcYZxiox-vWrh99RbgK3LIcV91kkPGmAG1n6YVqGrnuAu4fveFjPD2wRBhC_fYfBXcUvbBXbWERdkyah3S6ofvamopC9Ul5foI_WSWiFTyCYxtGMKyvl6tFp2RuBK6Zq7QOsc1xESSIbQsPtIo=&c=JuXTJ7rWmxJP9ORAnT677zw5AsD4sMaQwqndBkwuorajX7U1YcWEmg==&ch=WB6PvJHkXkGtNNnGF6-QpqvTjCpvEs1VvZf35G3yUoMgzn7hYGVHHQ==)

|
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
January 29, 2022

Press Contact:
Jody Pyles
jody@chaseforva.com
804 912 6007

Scheduling Press Interview:
Debbie Gwynn
debbie@chaseforva.com
804 393 2715

It's Time to Reverse the
2020 Virginia Gun Grab

SB1488 Reverse Unconstitutional "Red Flag" Laws
SB805 Reverse Locality Control of Gun Free Zones

Senator Chase will present both SB1488 to Reverse Unconstitutional "Red Flag" Laws and SB805 to Reverse Locality Control of Gun Free Zones before the Senate Judiciary Committee Monday morning at 8am . Both bills seek to reverse the Gun Grab that took place in 2020.

CHESTERFIELD, VA. Virginia Senator Amanda Chase will present both SB1488 to Reverse Unconstitutional and Unamerican "Red Flag" Laws and SB805 to Reverse Locality Control of Gun Free Zones before the Senate Judiciary Committee Monday morning at 8am in the Senate Judiciary Committee, located in the Pocahontas Building in Senate Room A. Both bills seek to reverse the Gun Grab that took place in 2020.

SB1488 is a Chase sponsored bill to Reverse Unconstitutional "Red Flag" Laws which fail to recognize that the government should NOT seize weapons from people who haven't been convicted of a crime.

"Individuals have a Constitutional right to protect the health and well being of both themselves and their family from violence that has overtaken many peaceful Virginia communities. Many suburban moms refuse to be victims in our crime ridden neighborhoods and choose to conceal carry to protect both themselves and their family. When seconds matter, we will do whatever it takes to protect our children from criminals. Once again, the Virginia Democrat Party violates the Constitution, restricts our gun rights and in 2020 passed unconstitutional laws. It's time to draw a line in the sand and take back what is ours." stated Senator Chase.

Even the New York State Supreme Court agrees. Red Flag laws are unconstitutional. They allow the government to take away our guns without any due process for up to 14 days and potentially longer, placing the burden on the unsuspecting individual who has not committed a crime. This is unamerican. What happened to innocent until proven guilty? Red flag laws allow individuals who are not medically trained to deny an individual their basic fundamental right to protect themselves despite the fact that the person hasn't committed a crime," continued Senator Amanda Chase.

The State Supreme Court judge in Rochester, New York ruled this past December that Red Flag laws are unconstitutional.

"The Courts agreed with Colorado local district attorney Michael Allen who when the Democrats came after our gun rights in 2020 said, "Red flag laws are not only unconstitutional, they are a poor excuse to take people's guns and not designed in any way to address real mental health concerns.'"

"It's time to honor the U.S. Constitution and strike these unconstitutional laws that are mischievous at best, allowing individuals to take away another individual's rights based on speculation and hearsay," stated Senator Chase.

Senator Chase is also presenting SB805 to reverse a Virginia law that was passed in 2020 by the Democrat controlled General Assembly which allows a locality to create gun free zones.

Gun free zones disarm law abiding citizens who can no longer legally protect themselves. Democrat controlled cities across the state of Virginia have now passed a confusing and burdensome patchwork of regulations and ordinances which vary from city to city and county to county. This makes traveling difficult for even the most conscientious conceal carry holder to follow, increasing the risk that they could unintentionally and inadvertently violate the ordinance while traveling across the Commonwealth. We should not make it more difficult for law abiding citizens to follow the law.

Gun free zones empower criminals and increase gun violence as criminals take advantage of disarmed law abiding citizens. Gun free zones increase the risk of guns being stolen from vehicles when conceal carry holders are forced to disarm and store their weapon in their vehicle to enter an event. Even guns locked in cases and stored in a vehicle can be stolen from an unattended vehicle. It is better for the conceal carry holder to be in possession of their weapon.

"Gun free zones do nothing more than make law abiding citizens sitting ducks or fish in a barrel. Gun free zones make law abiding citizens more vulnerable and unable to protect themselves from criminals who have no regard for our laws. It doesn't matter how many gun control bills the legislature passes, they only embolden and empower criminals who don't follow restrictive gun laws, " stated Senator Amanda Chase.

Senator Chase continued, "Over the past nearly two years, we have seen a troubling trend take place with Democrat controlled legislatures and localities across Virginia, who have mistreated and abused law enforcement while coddling violent murderers and criminals, while simultaneously misusing their authority to override both the U.S. Constitution and the Virginia Constitution to allow law abiding citizens to protect their family. Both state "'the people have the right of to keep and bear Arms, and that right shall not be infringed.'"

Laws that infringe upon our federally protected Constitutional rights should be struck down. Virginia's very own Constitution protects the rights of Virginian's to protect themselves.

The U.S. Constitution clearly states, "A well regulated Militia, being necessary to the security of a free State, the right of the people to keep and bear Arms, shall not be infringed."

The Virginia Constitution in Article I of the Bill of Rights in Section 13 states,
"That a well regulated militia, composed of the body of the people, trained to arms, is the proper, natural, and safe defense of a free state, therefore, the right of the people to keep and bear arms shall not be infringed; that standing armies, in time of peace, should be avoided as dangerous to liberty; and that in all cases the military should be under strict subordination to, and governed by, the civil power."

"The Gun Grab of 2020 must be reversed. It violates our basic fundamental 2nd Amendment right to protect ourselves and I will work diligently until the Gun Grab of 2020 has been completely reversed," stated Senator Chase.

Virginia Senator Amanda Chase will present both SB1488 to Reverse Unconstitutional "Red Flag" Laws and SB805 to Reverse Locality Control of Gun Free Zones to the Senate Judiciary Committee, tomorrow, Monday, January 30 at 8am in the Pocahontas Building in Senate Room A.

Please reach out to the Senators who serve on the Judiciary Committee and ask them to please reverse the gun grab of 2020.

Public comments can be made in person or online at:
[https://virginia-senate.granicus.com/ViewPublisher.php?view_id=3](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kwrNOEfQmkZKBZN_b-khhAkrsLcYZxiox-vWrh99RbgK3LIcV91kkKp6S6vaNf_jJfeG_E2sfANwo_WaT3uaeLYJGGRRQqlzhUaZ8Xww9BGYsIFYc2F4V80xU7W0VkrV3W0phSmnpXzPIeGfC2ndQyvrwhY4YjRLUJqkH4vKYL5HdqlohKrvGNUOmE11wIprjFRQq4IryoE=&c=JuXTJ7rWmxJP9ORAnT677zw5AsD4sMaQwqndBkwuorajX7U1YcWEmg==&ch=WB6PvJHkXkGtNNnGF6-QpqvTjCpvEs1VvZf35G3yUoMgzn7hYGVHHQ==)

Democrat controlled cities across the state of Virginia have now passed a confusing and burdensome patchwork of regulations and ordinances which vary from city to city and county to county. This makes traveling difficult for even the most conscientious conceal carry holder to follow, increasing the risk that they could unintentionally and inadvertently violate the ordinance while traveling across the Commonwealth. We should not make it more difficult for law abiding citizens to follow the law. Gun free zones empower criminals and increase gun violence as criminals take advantage of disarmed law abiding citizens. Gun free zones increase the risk of guns being stolen from vehicles when conceal carry holders are forced to disarm and store their weapon in their vehicle to enter an event. Even guns locked in cases and stored in a vehicle can be stolen from an unattended vehicle. It is better for the conceal carry holder to be in possession of their weapon. "Gun free zones do nothing more than make law abiding citizens sitting ducks or fish in a barrel. Gun free zones make law abiding citizens more vulnerable and unable to protect themselves from criminals who have no regard for our laws. It doesn't matter how many gun control bills the legislature passes, they only embolden and empower criminals who don't follow restrictive gun laws, " stated Senator Amanda Chase. Senator Chase continued, "Over the past nearly two years, we have seen a troubling trend take place with Democrat controlled legislatures and localities across Virginia, who have mistreated and abused law enforcement while coddling violent murderers and criminals, while simultaneously misusing their authority to override both the U.S. Constitution and the Virginia Constitution to allow law abiding citizens to protect their family. Both state "'the people have the right of to keep and bear Arms, and that right shall not be infringed.'" Laws that infringe upon our federally protected Constitutional rights should be struck down. Virginia's very own Constitution protects the rights of Virginian's to protect themselves. The U.S. Constitution clearly states, "A well regulated Militia, being necessary to the security of a free State, the right of the people to keep and bear Arms, shall not be infringed." The Virginia Constitution in Article I of the Bill of Rights in Section 13 states, "That a well regulated militia, composed of the body of the people, trained to arms, is the proper, natural, and safe defense of a free state, therefore, the right of the people to keep and bear arms shall not be infringed; that standing armies, in time of peace, should be avoided as dangerous to liberty; and that in all cases the military should be under strict subordination to, and governed by, the civil power." "The Gun Grab of 2020 must be reversed. It violates our basic fundamental 2nd Amendment right to protect ourselves and I will work diligently until the Gun Grab of 2020 has been completely reversed," stated Senator Chase. Virginia Senator Amanda Chase will present both SB1488 to Reverse Unconstitutional "Red Flag" Laws and SB805 to Reverse Locality Control of Gun Free Zones to the Senate Judiciary Committee, tomorrow, Monday, January 30 at 8am in the Pocahontas Building in Senate Room A. Please reach out to the Senators who serve on the Judiciary Committee and ask them to please reverse the gun grab of 2020. Public comments can be made in person or online at: == | | | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811, Midlothian, VA 23112 | | Sent by mailto:amanda@chaseforva.com powered by

subject: I don’t know how else to say this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
I emailed you Friday.
I emailed you Saturday.
And now I’m emailing you again - because I’m falling dangerously behind. Peter, I hate to bother you on a Sunday morning, but with just 48 hours left, I’m still $2,384 short of my first End of Month Goal of 2023. McCarthy and his extreme allies have been waiting for us to fall short of our fundraising goals -- so they can claim the House is theirs to keep. [_**I refuse to give them the satisfaction -- and that’s why I need to close this fundraising gap ASAP. So I’m personally asking: Peter, will you make your first donation before my first End of Month Deadline in 48 hours? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57949711/389613838/-1810142053?refcode=20230129_em_fr_b1_raja_30_v2&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGNiNWU5YS1lNTlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=egYovhJgUpj7CQ8tCfpaICXfX2LvQaaqmAHASt7Tifw=) Peter, it’s been devastating to see McCarthy push his far-right agenda as Speaker -- especially when it comes at the cost of vital social programs, like Medicare and Social Security. But I refuse to throw in the towel -- not when so much is at stake. I know that I can help Democrats take back the House, but I need your help [**If I can raise $2,384 by my first End of Month Deadline in 48 hours, I will be able to close this fundraising gap, start this new election cycle off strong, and take back the House for Democrats.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57949712/389613841/-1810142053?refcode=20230129_em_fr_b1_raja_30_v2&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGNiNWU5YS1lNTlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=egYovhJgUpj7CQ8tCfpaICXfX2LvQaaqmAHASt7Tifw=) Peter, this is a crucial make-or-break moment, and I need you to step up and make your first donation to my campaign today. [_**Even a few extra dollars could help me reach my goal, so I’m personally asking: Peter, will you chip in before my first End of Month Deadline of 2023? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57949713/389613843/-1810142053?refcode=20230129_em_fr_b1_raja_30_v2&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGNiNWU5YS1lNTlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=egYovhJgUpj7CQ8tCfpaICXfX2LvQaaqmAHASt7Tifw=) Thanks for your support, Raja | | Raja represents Illinois in Congress. The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day. Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy. But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja. He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong. Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress? | [**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57949714/389613844/-1810142053?refcode=footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGNiNWU5YS1lNTlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=egYovhJgUpj7CQ8tCfpaICXfX2LvQaaqmAHASt7Tifw=)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for you
| |
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9l05fq20erleepeh89a6vk27gsi8705nu7u4b8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1h64ob6clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z35sejeerltmfd6ofjp166c26qctjqb9b4c41kgo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1h64ob6clh2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvd5i99uq2jnc17hhce395hosdpn0744989b7dn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1h64ob6clh2bs) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zr19iaa116bvkbh5o7sg4vhsgj502o9cfuua85rg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1h64ob6clh2bs) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z34j6ho9h1dl86jsvv9al8i9k6s6c5aalsar65hg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1h64ob6clh2bs)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2a3oi4psvlllk5veos4qkhveiv4ujd5jc5dnqrg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1h64ob6clh2bs) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zr59f10tv335mptjd7i6d5t80icdn6onp9vpgt3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1h64ob6clh2bs)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfpa9nle4eg90nmq9bh3omabjo1juef9g9ejfioo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1h64ob6clh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zihefu3smoqi3i760bs8pn04q23b67cik1tpmbg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1h64ob6clh2bs)
---
The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
---

---

name: America First Policy Institute
subject: They’re coming for your country.
body:
| | | **They 're trying to indoctrinate your children.**
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259932:6n3q2HGNq:m:1:3334294963:88D67D4E90843045150D5A668BFAC993:r)
---
**This Teacher Says Left Has Turned Public Schools Into 'Indoctrination Centers'**
---
**They 're coming for your country.**
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259932:6n3q2HGNq:m:1:3334294963:88D67D4E90843045150D5A668BFAC993:r)
---
Report: Schools Are Teaching Kids To Hate America Under The Guise Of 'Civics'
---
**They 're determined to destroy your religion.**
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259932:6n3q2HGNq:m:1:3334294963:88D67D4E90843045150D5A668BFAC993:r)
---
**Teacher says he will 'summon Lucifer' into the classroom.**
---
**And if we don 't stand up TODAY, they could transform America as we know it.**
---
Peter, the radical Left has fully infiltrated our schools. Now, we're running out of time to stop them before they indoctrinate an entire generation of Marxist, Anti-American foot soldiers to push their cause. [_**That 's why the team at the American First Policy Institute needs your help to fight back...**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259932:6n3q2HGNq:m:1:3334294963:88D67D4E90843045150D5A668BFAC993:r) The radical Left started working toward this more than 40 years ago. They flooded higher education with disciples of the radical left who wanted to fundamentally transform America and turn it into another failed socialist experiment. Once they'd filled colleges and universities nationwide with leftist professors and administrators, it was only a matter of time before it trickled down all the way to the preschool level. That's why today, you can hardly turn on the news without hearing horror stories about school leaders and teachers encouraging students to come out as transgender or teaching them that America is an evil, fundamentally racist country. **The good news is that it 's NOT too late.** The America First Policy Institute has just released a POWERFUL new web-based tool to use in the fight against the leftist assault on our children. **Peter, today we 're honored to introduce to you the America First Parent Platform.** Here's our plan to empower parents to take back control of their children's education from radical leftist indoctrination: 1\. The America First Parent Platform provides a robust selection of model policies for state legislatures to enact that will empower parents to take back their local school boards. 2\. We created and are constantly updating the only NATIONWIDE database of school board members so that concerned parents, grandparents, guardians, and concerned citizens can easily find and contact the school board member(s) who dictate the policies that affect the children they love. 3\. Our platform gives parents a way to report radical leftist curricula and indoctrination in their local schools! Our team is working around the clock to ensure that we continue to expand the America First Parent Platform and ensure it reaches everyone who needs it... [_**But we can 't do that without your help... That's why we hope that you'll consider supporting the America First Parent Platform with a TAX DEDUCTIBLE gift of $25 or more today!**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259931:6n3q2HGNq:m:1:3334294963:88D67D4E90843045150D5A668BFAC993:r) Peter, at every turn, the radical Left is trying to ensure that they keep the power they've worked so hard to acquire in our schools. They're dumping millions of dollars into local school board campaigns. They have the teachers' unions on their side. Their buddies in big tech are censoring and suppressing information that would shine transparency on their efforts. And they'll stop at NOTHING to put America LAST and corrupt the minds of our children. [_**Peter, PLEASE use this opportunity to get in your last-minute tax deductible donation and help save our country from left-wing indoctrination.**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259932:6n3q2HGNq:m:1:3334294963:88D67D4E90843045150D5A668BFAC993:r) Sincerely, America First Policy Institute
---
[DONATE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62259932:6n3q2HGNq:m:1:3334294963:88D67D4E90843045150D5A668BFAC993:r)
---

subject: I’m reaching out to you with a request before Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
While there's still time, will you chip in a few bucks to the DNC? Whatever you can afford to give will go a long way in safeguarding our progress and electing more Democrats in the years to come. | |
---
Derek -- I woke up this morning grateful. Grateful for this team, for the American people, and for the progress that we’ve made together. You’ve heard me say it before, but I’ll say it again now: _I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of our nation._ **I mean it.** Last November, we secured our Senate majority and lost fewer seats in the House of Representatives than any Democratic President’s first midterm election in the last 40 years. And we had the best midterms for governors since 1986. Voters made clear that they wanted to elect leaders who would address the climate crisis, gun violence, and protect personal rights and freedoms. But we’re not done yet. We have a whole heck of a lot more to do to build a better America. **This team and the DNC have done a world of good to elect Democrats who are committed to making America work for everyone. And they’re coming up on their first deadline of 2023.** **[While there's still time, will you chip in a few bucks -- or even $7 -- to the DNC? Whatever you can afford to give will go a long way in safeguarding our progress and electing more Democrats in the years to come.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wACnsPEIiRS7LuVBOIrplrAHg97kztwb4FNDbT87ndBwi5AAkPH5VD71HYHg2eYv6zAYenlw2wTrhaz8zmbPnl1VFavffkOMCWAh0V1Di8YQdlmD_YP4Hu0H9dD5tGQ9m1WU8omkEqJet8qkh0--xpiPHX_UAT7RQN2VlyCJxTtApoxB2uTTssKgTnbvcpdLEY3YFvskjzZWhcSboYHXRqxi65crdEeT1oSw9MOOjSC86YH9mr7trr3AHcV_L5O46meQDC0kQJwKTCPtpObdOZW47WbxLK5mt6Az6jdYDzYNNoohhhx3GhZnTuGvQIv4LewFrH6VTKbK6Tuykbofm1o6hxyqnztCRQbI6dpGmTnkiqfhj2w06Z7KIYOxb1JWMiHXdAsQQCX5_gi7ornutdsfumgELaidwQC9CzJ2veJLkaqBtEZRNHD4GZ0v1jN_czr2k5gFMIlp2_2tEQYveZ/3t9/MUQPZEjcQOGT52l0-UznSQ/h0/kwm46qejfwqhOWM9iQE1srtNBLBRfQE07MLrZoicysQ)**

name: The Giffords Team
subject: If you knew...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The best $3 you could ever contribute
#

Friends -
If you knew that your $3 could help get the next major gun safety law passed, wouldn’t you donate it right away?
If you knew that your $3 went directly towards organizing, lobbying, education, advertising, research, and supporting gun safety candidates—all with a mission to end our nation’s gun violence epidemic—wouldn’t you chip in $3 right away?
If you knew that your $3 had the power to save someone’s life, wouldn’t it be the best $3 you could ever spend?
We know that may sound like an exaggeration, but it’s the honest truth. People are alive today because of the lifesaving laws we at Giffords have helped pass in states across the country.
But obviously, there’s still far more to be done. Too many people are dying every day from preventable acts of gun violence.
Now by the time you read this, a few people have already chipped in their $3 to help us in the fight to end gun violence. Now they’re hoping you do the same.
[**Our first monthly fundraising drive of the year comes to a close on Tuesday, and we need your help to reach our goals. Please, contribute $3 today. Your support directly fuels our work toward a future free from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230129-1-15&t=1&akid=4175%2E3935704%2E9kQea5)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f3da8ce179b4f38bb2dba90bc85cfae&_e=1JlcJ_PsAvqKK9z2CybL2bJV3DFkiD2o1DrLeYxmiBlSY2jdDsWCoTnHX2YfJKnodQjYELAdUDJhKyHAH2G69iW4-NZ0lNfFEXCrP39msewnI0z_CeHr48mDN3bLfxxdfYhlAFK0eqKM-1TAwPZNIHv2aDJuSsTSEOFGbJvyx3dyzQKb1afA9ZQ2HKAs8fRoJX1ZSdN2ljYQjPe532bMLh0P76VB4R900cBm-MGz-v1tBS0v4eYX1jAYogT4qFZ6CPQ3CnBYi7H2VBYmscoFHQIVs1pdrJWFGAu1nil034PJI8QclrmUPxszXhmmeIguwcBsbQFUFHs8CLtwSNGJHzlaXq_uzPzVY88SnasiVge-5MPHXxt4LC8foh3CG_QAu-vKXv82RsULHFxarf-NWA%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria."
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f3da8ce179b4f38bb2dba90bc85cfae&_e=1JlcJ_PsAvqKK9z2CybL2bJV3DFkiD2o1DrLeYxmiBlSY2jdDsWCoTnHX2YfJKnodQjYELAdUDJhKyHAH2G69iW4-NZ0lNfFEXCrP39msewnI0z_CeHr48mDN3bLfxxdfYhlAFK0eqKM-1TAwPZNIHv2aDJuSsTSEOFGbJvyx3dyzQKb1afA9ZQ2HKAs8fRoJX1ZSdN2ljYQjPe532bMLh0P76VB4R900cBm-MGz-v1tBS0v4eYX1jAYogT4qFZ6gLjTuIT5oU9v65rXb9egG_2FghFBkE5IVMIIhVxCq_Uw__CaM7dpCtkKaBJhC-e8yPFgpGOjhQ27_gCV_7SpNFyG3gp_e_a-_KYHUTFu_fSOEMeAdD0ZsOXmKr-z0ArJHaJj83tib-2TCK3zrcvWgw%3D%3D)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: ** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
"Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?"
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I 'm asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions. **](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f3da8ce179b4f38bb2dba90bc85cfae&_e=1JlcJ_PsAvqKK9z2CybL2bJV3DFkiD2o1DrLeYxmiBlSY2jdDsWCoTnHX2YfJKnodQjYELAdUDJhKyHAH2G69iW4-NZ0lNfFEXCrP39msewnI0z_CeHr48mDN3bLfxxdfYhlAFK0eqKM-1TAwPZNIHv2aDJuSsTSEOFGbJvyx3dyzQKb1afA9ZQ2HKAs8fRoJX1ZSdN2ljYQjPe532bMLh0P76VB4R900cBm-MGz-v1tBS0v4eYX1jAYogT4qFZ6h00L7V9dAdfvdFxTBC_hH0nnqZI7W4oyLGrpNAgp2zJYdOCptN2AYesLbXsxyJs8gKdwjhPLivsgfU9ShBslh3kLmIYe3GI8s1weXbbvudPAwcdtMIy3WO7BXPeu4SkIuK3TKCGYBubuUyE_EcbTOw%3D%3D) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f3da8ce179b4f38bb2dba90bc85cfae&_e=1JlcJ_PsAvqKK9z2CybL2bJV3DFkiD2o1DrLeYxmiBlSY2jdDsWCoTnHX2YfJKnodQjYELAdUDJhKyHAH2G69iW4-NZ0lNfFEXCrP39msewnI0z_CeHr48mDN3bLfxxdfYhlAFK0eqKM-1TAwPZNIHv2aDJuSsTSEOFGbJvyx3dyzQKb1afA9ZQ2HKAs8fRoJX1ZSdN2ljYQjPe532bMLh0P76VB4R900cBm-MGz-v1tBS0v4eYX1jAYogT4qFZ6yLYiHkZrWr7ezwpPB8Tc9x1a0HNNh4E33gdALW8nX4b5W-OM3r6WTyezptP2qmU6Bh4QoRXR7b_0EZOfZReBXH4JArbJYMYYIHSzn29xYu_zmsNTuH1zBTpeJsR16zTSthFDF_jQA4JQdgEzetdrkw%3D%3D) Whatever amount you're able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f3da8ce179b4f38bb2dba90bc85cfae&_e=1JlcJ_PsAvqKK9z2CybL2bJV3DFkiD2o1DrLeYxmiBlSY2jdDsWCoTnHX2YfJKnodQjYELAdUDJhKyHAH2G69iW4-NZ0lNfFEXCrP39msewnI0z_CeHr48mDN3bLfxxdfYhlAFK0eqKM-1TAwPZNIHv2aDJuSsTSEOFGbJvyx3dyzQKb1afA9ZQ2HKAs8fRoJX1ZSdN2ljYQjPe532bMLh0P76VB4R900cBm-MGz-v1tBS0v4eYX1jAYogT4qFZ6nqwEtTPpwIgC3c-g5Pz-HtuJ-u3FWtPvJabaAjdo2P5u2QOKgRuvF-ejb-y3pCp3JSCvpzU19Pvru-ZIB9d4blffAMNhFXEHI_ZYisXZuLHQeX_jz47xmYcpo3XD5GtSp1i8gSwxol5G7hLimD1I3w%3D%3D)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe's landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these "physicians" abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f3da8ce179b4f38bb2dba90bc85cfae&_e=1JlcJ_PsAvqKK9z2CybL2bJV3DFkiD2o1DrLeYxmiBlSY2jdDsWCoTnHX2YfJKnodQjYELAdUDJhKyHAH2G69iW4-NZ0lNfFEXCrP39msewnI0z_CeHr48mDN3bLfxxdfYhlAFK0eqKM-1TAwPZNIHv2aDJuSsTSEOFGbJvyx3dyzQKb1afA9ZQ2HKAs8fRoJX1ZSdN2ljYQjPe532bMLh0P76VB4R900cBm-MGz-v1tBS0v4eYX1jAYogT4qFZ6leeMR5_kL63j16jbZ9nFDsxFclQoHM7TmFJ-dEzFfiw9FvYGz-Uv0Ame3zkgNIP0H0h2xVbpG9S1MvuogE37hEJ75E9QOnc-hI9yGql8syRdT8hdgaX88rKtrlixdqTnRlm0sl2y2S2DRBgjpkq55g%3D%3D) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole's landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f3da8ce179b4f38bb2dba90bc85cfae&_e=1JlcJ_PsAvqKK9z2CybL2bJV3DFkiD2o1DrLeYxmiBlSY2jdDsWCoTnHX2YfJKnodQjYELAdUDJhKyHAH2G69iW4-NZ0lNfFEXCrP39msewnI0z_CeHr48mDN3bLfxxdfYhlAFK0eqKM-1TAwPZNIHv2aDJuSsTSEOFGbJvyx3dyzQKb1afA9ZQ2HKAs8fRoJX1ZSdN2ljYQjPe532bMLh0P76VB4R900cBm-MGz-v1tBS0v4eYX1jAYogT4qFZ6k87P0kIOMh3SxbXUql0fUaes-nT9dNdSuMycd5xMpPzZ9_ToqUeBTRG9fQ1uNykV9DMI6QRZtgFZgeXne8ZzTE84bc-OvWR5p7glwAG95FdHgewJcsm5aRgufOESvmf0_jueA7_-4vn7LbivlEUDIg%3D%3D)

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria." | | | We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13. | | In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy... This included putting her on experimental drugs likeLupron , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders... ... Giving her constant testosterone injections... ... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15. How was this allowed to happen? It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation: "Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?" This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. Whatever amount you're able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. | | | So please, do not delay. Chloe's landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these "physicians" abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's. | | Sincerely, | | | | | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole's landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. (C) The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 {\\optouturi} Sent to Full Mag News subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
| Hi — Just bumping Sharice’s email for you. Our first big test of 2023 is coming up and we need to hit our monthly fundraising goal to keep up our early organizing in KS-03.

**National Republicans won’t waste any time fielding an extremist candidate to run against Sharice and we need to be prepared for whatever comes our way.**

**[Click here to chip in,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57952923/389624392/-1716626802?amount=20&contactdata=SpUNPJ5Qvw07TR14lSKTd3lujGRo3rKJmKm/e1jA6diuTnrrZsl9EyW5K8locsVlMNATr0rQjcbkUAr7SdNJMiz9prNsj2IJi7WIkspOCAY/gfFrXl+fIKwfbqDtt6upPg4W7GRBcmbDjjK2cNUrrQ==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230128_FR_1.2_0_6MO_website_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmZiZTljOC1lOTlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1EoMI3zWFBu9XBcDndpo0wYjcnyjJnbFfoifikygH3o=)** then read Sharice’s note.

* * *
**_Begin Forwarded Message:_**

Hi there,

In their first month in the majority, House Republicans have shown us exactly how they plan to govern the House.

After a protracted and embarrassing Speaker election, they’ve passed legislation that offers tax breaks to their rich friends and donors and attacks reproductive freedom nationwide.

Instead of addressing inflation, cutting costs, or creating jobs, they’re putting their energy into baseless political “investigations”.

You and I both know that people are sick and tired of negativity in politics... They want leaders who focus on governing, not scoring petty political points. That’s what I’m dedicated to doing every day. As our new Leader, Hakeem Jeffries put it, I’m in Congress to champion normalcy instead of negativity, democracy instead of demagogues, and economic opportunity instead of political extremism. That’s what I want to see Congress get back to.

That’s why it’s critically important to retake the House majority in 2024, so we can get back to delivering for the American people.

**We’re up against our first big test of 2023: The end-of-month fundraising deadline on Tuesday.** We need to raise another $14,000 by the end of January to stay on track with our goals, and I’m asking you to step up.

**[Can you contribute $20 or any amount before the end of the month so we can hit our goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57952925/389624395/-1716626802?amount=20&contactdata=SpUNPJ5Qvw07TR14lSKTd3lujGRo3rKJmKm/e1jA6diuTnrrZsl9EyW5K8locsVlMNATr0rQjcbkUAr7SdNJMiz9prNsj2IJi7WIkspOCAY/gfFrXl+fIKwfbqDtt6upPg4W7GRBcmbDjjK2cNUrrQ==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230128_FR_1.2_0_6MO_website_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmZiZTljOC1lOTlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1EoMI3zWFBu9XBcDndpo0wYjcnyjJnbFfoifikygH3o=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: | Hi — Just bumping Sharice’s email for you. Our first big test of 2023 is coming up and we need to hit our monthly fundraising goal to keep up our early organizing in KS-03. National Republicans won’t waste any time fielding an extremist candidate to run against Sharice and we need to be prepared for whatever comes our way. = then read Sharice’s note. Begin Forwarded Message: Hi there, In their first month in the majority, House Republicans have shown us exactly how they plan to govern the House. After a protracted and embarrassing Speaker election, they’ve passed legislation that offers tax breaks to their rich friends and donors and attacks reproductive freedom nationwide. Instead of addressing inflation, cutting costs, or creating jobs, they’re putting their energy into baseless political “investigations”. You and I both know that people are sick and tired of negativity in politics... They want leaders who focus on governing, not scoring petty political points. That’s what I’m dedicated to doing every day. As our new Leader, Hakeem Jeffries put it, I’m in Congress to champion normalcy instead of negativity, democracy instead of demagogues, and economic opportunity instead of political extremism. That’s what I want to see Congress get back to. That’s why it’s critically important to retake the House majority in 2024, so we can get back to delivering for the American people. We’re up against our first big test of 2023: The end-of-month fundraising deadline on Tuesday. We need to raise another $14,000 by the end of January to stay on track with our goals, and I’m asking you to step up. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = We know that seats like mine will be targeted in 2024 and our race will be just as difficult as it was in the midterms. But if we can protect swing seats like mine and flip just a handful of seats, we will retake control of the House so we can get back to work. = Thank you so much, Sharice | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1fcc7d6e6e1b480dac0f4d46593bfc68&_e=_8hv3wx86PXw9LrOQh4n8P9xdu8r28reDfItAxwkdeFHX6oYR5XAeVlvkv3D1wZKGs4DzSYRM4Oec44jbmpa-23kLeHdR0Sfj12NT5JWcbQQKIMiHSGn9MCESHv0kOwprGEu0_isPYmaXftSNFlRXeiMOwXWohqhPK-KNmnytKfN84t14LU-sA-EdNUziayfywNF0JI0yS0uD0z4gx5kFp-HWuHKgN-DRfiMzSKJ9HJhP4HEzd-PtHyWniwceVV2vATwF6W_0S5a-g08Ur7EfMtCv-8Y__hPwf8BWHabzjEWANElerB6PYCjQEg2Or0kcRTIH8xJceuIcuAdTkTXSQ%3D%3D)

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1fcc7d6e6e1b480dac0f4d46593bfc68&_e=_8hv3wx86PXw9LrOQh4n8P9xdu8r28reDfItAxwkdeFHX6oYR5XAeVlvkv3D1wZKGs4DzSYRM4Oec44jbmpa-23kLeHdR0Sfj12NT5JWcbQQKIMiHSGn9MCESHv0kOwprGEu0_isPYmaXftSNFlRXeiMOwXWohqhPK-KNmnytKfN84t14LU-sA-EdNUziayf8NLrtugWxo6bcbMxUr4mt-ymsuZcan77SXxF358Ju6qbhoWywoQkJAWOz1huSEX_S7BOFuVQ0OzUZ1YC__d1Z1N99MfjFL8Bc_GBebvnfuyT-Mb8RJJysDZG9yNiQ0nDGtyW1AaTAixFOLcmVmAeSg%3D%3D) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1fcc7d6e6e1b480dac0f4d46593bfc68&_e=_8hv3wx86PXw9LrOQh4n8P9xdu8r28reDfItAxwkdeFHX6oYR5XAeVlvkv3D1wZKGs4DzSYRM4Oec44jbmpa-23kLeHdR0Sfj12NT5JWcbQQKIMiHSGn9MCESHv0kOwprGEu0_isPYmaXftSNFlRXeiMOwXWohqhPK-KNmnytKfN84t14LU-sA-EdNUziayfaqjSYT_LmWNEiReM4hwV3KocW_faK-eVvoipMlH3AV-2K5EQoyKZWPhCIlDB2Kg_f_fkVPmxSStjQCEKf0Az1kEdHemEFXuBnIIhR2pNAHwlLst8eyGE_X1Hk3ARU60W2BFa4txuW27b0Nh87dPGdw%3D%3D) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can 't help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who've been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang ...while hoping that the guards wouldn't show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they're being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn't even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he's been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven 't held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1fcc7d6e6e1b480dac0f4d46593bfc68&_e=_8hv3wx86PXw9LrOQh4n8P9xdu8r28reDfItAxwkdeFHX6oYR5XAeVlvkv3D1wZKGs4DzSYRM4Oec44jbmpa-23kLeHdR0Sfj12NT5JWcbQQKIMiHSGn9MCESHv0kOwprGEu0_isPYmaXftSNFlRXeiMOwXWohqhPK-KNmnytKfN84t14LU-sA-EdNUziayfnCIOu6JVnClEab6lKNkb4pOPLR203mHXJHfxKTIEuTstHGHgb35payMCx5ouF-R-ALQWM5_hQO7Gh558Qu5ACw3m-mB53KFSikNxLnYep6kWaItihYOBv9RzMxJJgm84Zv3FoQlKCbMtabKYCRj4Sg%3D%3D)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1fcc7d6e6e1b480dac0f4d46593bfc68&_e=_8hv3wx86PXw9LrOQh4n8P9xdu8r28reDfItAxwkdeFHX6oYR5XAeVlvkv3D1wZKGs4DzSYRM4Oec44jbmpa-23kLeHdR0Sfj12NT5JWcbQQKIMiHSGn9MCESHv0kOwprGEu0_isPYmaXftSNFlRXeiMOwXWohqhPK-KNmnytKfN84t14LU-sA-EdNUziayfHmZHdt3I2GnvL-fXL-kGgXy36unAjIfPzRcEnXtbW0g6ZLlWn2YKgEjmoRXkP6wQsTCvPEojxucl_GxQeeHRZye_wdjImN-tuQaBWfx2X2l4RdSEUxMJInXUmYE33-6PHNWUrGOR74w-GexJSC0brA%3D%3D)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can 't fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1fcc7d6e6e1b480dac0f4d46593bfc68&_e=_8hv3wx86PXw9LrOQh4n8P9xdu8r28reDfItAxwkdeFHX6oYR5XAeVlvkv3D1wZKGs4DzSYRM4Oec44jbmpa-23kLeHdR0Sfj12NT5JWcbQQKIMiHSGn9MCESHv0kOwprGEu0_isPYmaXftSNFlRXeiMOwXWohqhPK-KNmnytKfN84t14LU-sA-EdNUziayfby6GPl6HnGhMvIjOq_4cxvYR5vS5oU3bH5Wf-Uch08vN7gFCCMqFG7zZWFSQvwEALjs-RiZw0yMpmg5Ud_Y8_S4EJ0iP4-tig0U6UjGmh1k-Mpr5ucJ7QnbrUHB8bGxIbJFkAl1eoM-ZZ5PCIhQY2A%3D%3D)

body:
An inside look at our ActBlue homepage...
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57953836/389627811/823540626?refcode=ea.2f13def7-ed9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.2f13def7-ed9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjEzZGVmNy1lZDlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NrqL4Kv1_BVlRX2nXkF2Tr1ruftB1QGAorBov82z2e8=&emci=dfc86544-809e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=2f13def7-ed9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter, by now, you’re used to our emails asking for money _(and we do need to**[request your support](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57953838/389627815/435245919?amount=5&refcode=ea.2f13def7-ed9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.2f13def7-ed9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjEzZGVmNy1lZDlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NrqL4Kv1_BVlRX2nXkF2Tr1ruftB1QGAorBov82z2e8=)** today, too)._ But this email is a little different than usual. We want to give you an inside look at our ActBlue data for the past year and explain exactly what this graph means: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57953840/389627817/435245919?amount=5&refcode=ea.2f13def7-ed9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.2f13def7-ed9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjEzZGVmNy1lZDlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NrqL4Kv1_BVlRX2nXkF2Tr1ruftB1QGAorBov82z2e8=) **Political fundraising is incredibly cyclical, as you can see from our data above. Fundraising picks up the closer you get to an election — but then, it takes a sharp drop.** **[Can you help turn our numbers around? Chip in right now to support Roy’s work for North Carolina!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57953842/389627819/435245919?amount=5&refcode=ea.2f13def7-ed9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.2f13def7-ed9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjEzZGVmNy1lZDlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NrqL4Kv1_BVlRX2nXkF2Tr1ruftB1QGAorBov82z2e8=)** Peter, Roy’s achieved a lot in his tenure as governor, but there’s still work to do on issues from climate change to health care access. If we want to keep building on our successes and fulfilling Roy’s agenda, we can’t let our funds run dry. We’re also _already_ thinking about what comes next. We firmly believe we can flip North Carolina blue in the 2024 general election — but only if we lay the groundwork now. **[Peter, we need to raise $10,000 before the end of the month to get our budget back on track, and we need YOUR help to do it. name: Katie Porter
subject: Why I’m running for the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

I just announced: I’m running to represent California in the U.S. Senate.

I’m running for the U.S. Senate because “better than the way things were”
isn’t good enough.

It’s not “good enough” that huge corporations are making record profits
while more and more families can’t afford necessities.

It’s not “good enough” that my kids had to ask me if they were safe at
school after a shooting in a nearby church.

It’s not “good enough” that extremist politicians could ban abortion
nationwide if they win just a few more Senate seats.

Our country isn’t working for the majority of working people. Republicans
funded by big corporate interests have rigged the game against families,
making it difficult to get ahead. The elected leaders we send to
Washington must be accountable to the people they represent, and they must
prove to voters that democracy can work for them. That’s why I’m running
for the Senate, and I want you on my team. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18875?t=1001&akid=2936%2E346206%2En6nrGF ]Can you make a donation
today that will support my campaign for Senate and Charles Booker’s
progressive movement?

CHIP IN →

I’ve spent my career—both before and after being elected to the
House—delivering for working people and protecting taxpayers. In the
House, I was the only Democrat to oppose “earmarks,” which are a way to
fund Members' pet projects. I’m leading the fight to ban congressional
stock trading, and the whiteboard you may have seen me bring to hearings
is more than a fun prop—my questioning of witnesses in congressional
hearings secured free COVID testing for every American, helped us pass
bills that lower costs for families, and showed how corporate profits are
driving inflation.

Before I ran for office, I was a consumer protection advocate, and I
worked directly with California families who were cheated by the five
biggest Wall Street banks prior to the 2008 mortgage crisis. I held the
banks’ feet to the fire and won thousands of victories against the banks,
forcing them to pay California families billions.

I wouldn’t be running if I didn’t know we have what it takes to win, and
more importantly, to serve the people of California. But as Elizabeth
Warren taught me, nobody wins alone. This will be a competitive and
expensive race, and I’d be so honored to have your support. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18875?t=1002&akid=2936%2E346206%2En6nrGF ]Can you
make a split contribution today and become a Founding Donor to our Senate
campaign?

Katie Porter

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230129-2936-footer&t=1003&refcode2=2936_346206_n6nrGF&akid=2936%2E346206%2En6nrGF

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2936%2E346206%2En6nrGF

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I know this might sound corny
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Sherrod Brown - Senator from Ohio [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87645/images/brown_2018_logo-outlined.png]
The first big deadline of 2023 is the day after tomorrow and we have a big goal ahead of us and little more to go to reach it.
But here is the thing -- I have all the confidence that this community of dedicated supporters can make it happen. After all, there’s a reason why our average online contribution is $26. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230129]
This community is made up of people who are passionate about our shared values -- like bringing back jobs that have been shipped overseas, making sure no one goes broke just to afford their family’s health care, and protecting people’s hard-earned pensions.
Everyone on this team gets involved and pitches in when they can to ensure those values are represented in Washington.
When everyone contributes -- whether it’s $26, $100, or just $5 -- it adds up to a powerful movement that has what it takes to compete in one of the most competitive races on the map. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230129]
I’m focused on what’s best for working Ohioans. Special-interest groups and Wall Street are focused on what’s best for their stakeholders and bottom lines.
That’s how you end up with Republican leaders in Congress advocating for policies like gutting Social Security and Medicare, criminalizing reproductive health care, and raising taxes on everyday Americans while the wealthiest corporations get away with not paying their fair share.
This community believes in a populism that lifts up everyone -- not just the privileged few at the top.
While it might sound corny, I really do rely on the generosity of people like you to power our campaign so I can continue fighting for our values in Congress. It’d mean a lot if you contributed a few dollars before Tuesday’s deadline. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230129]
With gratitude,
Sherrod
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.
Friends of Sherrod Brown
3867 West Market Street
Ste. 289
Akron, OH 44333
United States

| | **The brazen disregard for the law by the Virginia Parole Board brought to light by this investigation must never again be repeated.**

---
---
**AG Miyares announced that Virginia is joining a bipartisan coalition suing Google for allegedly undertaking illegal acts to obtain and preserve its monopoly in the online advertising markets. These anticompetitive practices impacted consumers nationwide by driving up the price of online advertising and decreasing innovation and efficiency in the industry. ** _“Corporations like Google wield an enormous amount of power and influence over the internet and our daily lives. Google is the primary search engine, host, and advertising vessel for hundreds of millions of consumers and producers, while also competing directly against those same producers and consumers. Google single handedly controls what consumers see – and, more significantly – what they do not see. They also control what advertisers can say, and at what price. My office is dedicated to protecting Virginia consumers from unlawful monopolization of free markets. Virginia consumers deserve a free marketplace for products, services, and ideas – not a censored, curated monopoly from a multinational corporation like Google.” _ **– Attorney General Miyares**
---
[**READ MORE ABOUT THE LAWSUIT HERE**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=28b1f2a911dc4361bf29079f9466026c&_e=8jK9D6T4UZq5ijNMNkvaiG3tL6YuCe0C2XrVTv9xjw_-T7bxadUNpMCz55pBbyyVZlKuPGQ2l1QorYjtH6i_hw55cmY8aAUfmJ1LMWkEQ9U4fcDImTVs6Bg1bZLNQIe0fFOzZMW7RKKE_I1pLmSEStbqdKE0YDhI7FZ0pNzsj_VUEjKF4LNceqL0pluCpdSNWOmZexff0Kga84_1R0hhzBt-dAWUITZFRmEOIvBriaQGSK_OF-05WYUIxkTTHXnBsChcTDj9v1AKnO6icO-sILLjLRfJIialfqWTVMBA4pr447fPoLDtTWXFqC2FRC3UaAcvz12WFJ-nRCpXzWdmGJY6BP5vk6Ve0Us-Flyd1Ox2Trj38jQdOhZCTniDXkKH4rm_ksIiHbb_Cwq2IwFZxPfsBvMR7PgWeGvD5IMucD99kVn3AT_D5X6mK-qARxt7WVT-XcNLtcHaTVpi2cypJKfL_iyz5FX4rHluLzE9jT8QnOtJungHydaLoQda_pKg)
---
| | [](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=28b1f2a911dc4361bf29079f9466026c&_e=8jK9D6T4UZq5ijNMNkvaiOijzJGdWOEHIu94AQFAFvGtDNi_ouqZkvKVDVC43TMSgjv_ZBt2UB8u44UrV_SI8j2muvv-DGaueS7qbx8HpOuiiy-i3uKCdGFSM2xBEFg-o2gdHRU28jo0TZ_04hwSfmp5bZt9SftEa2Zh4hZucfXn5eXAjlSOPsdS3V3QxHQi-_iLI83JY2AZ6xuEew4BOoFzXZfyQEj73Cb_0qq9WJ9vjyV0VA_jBc-sTbKweHYYSIKkbxluLJ9uXwjeE7tFKZmwwrTD_fP9j84cVVUDdL8%3D)
---

**Contraband cell phones in prisons are a nationwide problem. AG Miyares joined a coalition of 22 attorneys general urging Congressional leaders to pass legislation giving states the authority to jam contraband cell phones. ** _“Contraband cell phones are already illegal and pose a significant threat to safety and security at correctional facilities – but the reality is that they exist and are prevalent in our prison system. They allow willing inmates a way to continue running and organizing criminal activity while incarcerated, threatening the public safety of Virginians. I encourage Congress to swiftly pass legislation permitting states to implement a contraband cell phone jamming system to put a stop to this illicit activity and protect our communities.” _ **– Attorney General Miyares**
