name: Halina Bennet
subject: 🎶Feeling 22 🎶
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
22 years ago today I became the third official member of the OG Team Bennet. | Hi folks, it’s Michael’s daughter, Halina. 22 years ago today, I came into the world and became the _third_ official member (after my mom and older sister) of Team Bennet! Let me tell you a little bit about life as the "accidental Senator's" daughter: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57978046/389668314/-1188936832?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230129_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzljMzFjNi0xY2EwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wwnQg0JsKDLyRPCNGyezXAMygL49TkijqxbFUI5dPYQ=) Since we were little, my sisters and I knew our dad was special. After all, we've shared him with the people of Colorado all our lives. **He’s always fighting as hard as he can for what matters to our generation — like protecting the environment, defending reproductive rights, and making college and healthcare more affordable.** But Dad’s work never stops him from being present in our lives. He has _always_ been there for us: cooking breakfast; sending us the best book recommendations; helping us with our homework; and always answering our calls, even when it’s late. clean_body: 22 years ago today I became the third official member of the OG Team Bennet. | Hi folks, it’s Michael’s daughter, Halina. 22 years ago today, I came into the world and became the third official member (after my mom and older sister) of Team Bennet! Let me tell you a little bit about life as the "accidental Senator's" daughter: = Since we were little, my sisters and I knew our dad was special. After all, we've shared him with the people of Colorado all our lives. He’s always fighting as hard as he can for what matters to our generation — like protecting the environment, defending reproductive rights, and making college and healthcare more affordable. But Dad’s work never stops him from being present in our lives. He has always been there for us: cooking breakfast; sending us the best book recommendations; helping us with our homework; and always answering our calls, even when it’s late. = We’ve traveled the country together, supporting his campaign, talking to people, sharing our thoughts – even taking over his Insta to post great pictures of ourselves. = I’m so grateful to have a dad working to make the world better for me and my generation. He loves Colorado more than anyone I know, and he’s taking care of our state just like he’s looked after me for 22 years. My dad’s team just told us we’re only two days away from our first fundraising deadline of the 2024 election cycle — and knowing you chipped in to help hit our goal would be a pretty cool birthday gift. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Cheers to 22, Halina P.S. Mom and Dad spent all of last year teasing each other about whose emails raised more. 🙄 = = Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27388?refcode=em20230129-2789&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2789%2E614464%2Ez8RxWD)
**Top election watchers recognize we really can flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat in 2024 — but only if we start preparing now.[Will you chip in $10 or more today so we’ll have the resources to stand up to Josh Hawley, elect Lucas Kunce, and take this seat back for the people?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27388?refcode=em20230129-2789&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2789%2E614464%2Ez8RxWD)**

* * *
Peter,
Lucas isn’t running for U.S. Senate to make a point. **This is a race he can win.**
In 2018, Missourians elected Democrat Auditor Nicole Galloway statewide by more than a 6% margin — and that same year, rejected anti-union “Right-to-Work” + voted to raise the minimum wage to nearly $5 more than the federal level.
In 2020, voters approved Medicaid expansion through the Affordable Care Act.
And just last year, Missourians legalized recreational marijuana.
Missouri voters know how to take back their power at the ballot box — and if we start preparing now, we have a real shot to do it again by flipping this U.S. Senate seat and defeating Josh Hawley in 2024. **That’s why we’re asking you now:**
**[Can you chip in $10 or more to our grassroots campaign today? body:
need your thoughts on this:
| Sen. Sinema has sided with MAGA Republicans time and time again –

subject: There are two options. One is chaos.

* * *
**A.G. HOLDER:**
**“We’ve seen extreme Republicans go to great lengths to manipulate maps and overturn election results.** Now they are asking the Supreme Court to give unchecked power to state legislatures -- including those that remain heavily gerrymandered.”
* * *
This year, the Supreme Court will decide _Moore v. Harper_. The case will directly impact the congressional map in North Carolina -- but extreme Republicans are already scheming how to leverage the Independent State Legislature (ISL) theory to further their anti-democracy agenda.

What do you want 2023 to look like?

**PRO-DEMOCRACY**
🗳 A fair and competitive congressional map in states like North Carolina
🗳 Voters advocating for redistricting reforms
🗳 State legislatures protecting and expanding access to voting

**ANTI-DEMOCRACY**
⚠️ Another decade of a gerrymandered maps like in North Carolina
⚠️ Extremists using ISL theory to challenge commission-drawn maps
⚠️ Gerrymandered state legislatures unilaterally restricting voting rights and installing election deniers to run federal elections
[PRO-DEMOCRACY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57978206/389669200/742344613?refcode=20230128_AOTL_F_EOY3-Resend_RedLiteXopeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1YjAyNTQ3LTIwYTAtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5hvcEcAlaFYetvO3DW3iN_Gm60ngMjKwjhraPErrcWI=)

In the _Moore v. Harper_ oral argument, the lawyer representing the North Carolina voters said: [**“The blast radius from their theory would sow elections chaos.”**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57978208/389669202/742344613?refcode=20230128_AOTL_F_EOY3-Resend_RedLiteXopeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1YjAyNTQ3LTIwYTAtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5hvcEcAlaFYetvO3DW3iN_Gm60ngMjKwjhraPErrcWI=)

Regardless of the SCOTUS decision, we need to be prepared. ISL theory, if adopted, might let extremists cause chaos. But even if SCOTUS knocks down this anti-democratic theory, we know that extremists will continue their more insidious tactics to undermine democracy.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Will you contribute a small amount every month to my campaign?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1727%2E5257348%2E1ZC2Ku ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, I can’t tell you how much I appreciate all of the support
and kind words I’ve received since we launched our Senate campaign. This
team has had my back through thick and thin, and as we embark on a new
challenge, I can’t help but reflect on all that we’ve accomplished until
now.

Over and over again, this grassroots team has shown up for me, for our
democracy, and for our country during the most pivotal moments in modern
history. In 2020, you raised millions to help elect President Biden,
protect our majority in the House, and secure the Senate by the slimmest
margin possible.

You did that.

Then in 2021, you helped raise over $500,000 to stop the Republican-led
recall of California Governor Gavin Newsom. And whenever Donald Trump,
Kevin McCarthy, or their Fox News mouthpieces launched a new attack
against me, you have stood at the ready to help me respond. You did that.

Derek, I’ll never take your support for granted because I know
how lucky I am to have a grassroots team as passionate and courageous as
this one backing me and our democracy every step of the way.

As my Senate campaign gets up and running, I’m going to be counting on you
more and more. I’m not taking a dime in corporate PAC money, and
Republicans are going to do everything in their power to keep me away from
the Senate. It’s only a matter of time before Donald Trump and his cronies
go after me.

With all that in mind, I wanted to ask if you’ll consider becoming a
Founding Monthly Donor to my Senate campaign. Knowing we can count on your
gift coming in at the same time every month will make all the difference
as we prepare for the challenges ahead.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.WzdlEl&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230129_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1004&akid=1727%2E5257348%2E1ZC2Ku ]So, Derek, I’m personally asking — can you take the next step
and make a small monthly recurring donation to my campaign? Becoming a
Founding Monthly Donor will fuel our people-powered movement.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Derek, I can’t tell you how much I appreciate all of the support and kind words I’ve received since we launched our Senate campaign. This team has had my back through thick and thin, and as we embark on a new challenge, I can’t help but reflect on all that we’ve accomplished until now. Over and over again, this grassroots team has shown up for me, for our democracy, and for our country during the most pivotal moments in modern history. In 2020, you raised millions to help elect President Biden, protect our majority in the House, and secure the Senate by the slimmest margin possible. You did that. Then in 2021, you helped raise over $500,000 to stop the Republican-led recall of California Governor Gavin Newsom. And whenever Donald Trump, Kevin McCarthy, or their Fox News mouthpieces launched a new attack against me, you have stood at the ready to help me respond. You did that. Derek, I’ll never take your support for granted because I know how lucky I am to have a grassroots team as passionate and courageous as this one backing me and our democracy every step of the way. As my Senate campaign gets up and running, I’m going to be counting on you more and more. I’m not taking a dime in corporate PAC money, and Republicans are going to do everything in their power to keep me away from the Senate. It’s only a matter of time before Donald Trump and his cronies go after me. With all that in mind, I wanted to ask if you’ll consider becoming a Founding Monthly Donor to my Senate campaign. Knowing we can count on your gift coming in at the same time every month will make all the difference as we prepare for the challenges ahead. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: This was my view when I was stationed in Iraq...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
A message about burn pits — and how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me.

| Hi Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to [**split a donation of any amount between my campaign and Mark Takano.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57958291/389642612/720253296?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=MTFC_20230129_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjgyNDcyYS1mODlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qDb-DJEbnjTHAUUQ6vUWX_fPc6wXXhHxwd4SKVJBGr4=) **But first, I wanted to take a moment to talk to you about the burn pit I lived next to in Iraq — and how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57958294/389642613/720253296?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=MTFC_20230129_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjgyNDcyYS1mODlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qDb-DJEbnjTHAUUQ6vUWX_fPc6wXXhHxwd4SKVJBGr4=) It was 2009. I was stationed at the Al Taqaddum Airbase where I was a Marine Captain leading a police training team. Twelve Marines and a Navy Corpsman. Running missions through Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Ramadi.

It was my first of three tours of duty during the War on Terror. And from our camp, the base’s burn pit loomed over us.

Smoke columns filled the sky and blew through our living space. We ran through it, joking about how we should be doing gas mask runs. For three months that pit bathed us in toxic fumes. We accepted it and focused on our duty.

For me, that was planning our routes and pouring over intel to avoid the immediate danger: IEDs on all the convoys and missions we were running outside the wire. I was so proud to bring every member of that team home safely.

**Or so I thought — because, as it turns out, we couldn’t protect ourselves from our own country.**

When I got back from Iraq, I developed a persistent tickle in my throat. Constant irritation. I never had allergies before and annoyed myself with the constant throat clearing. Eventually, I was so embarrassed by it that I went to the base clinic. They said it was postnasal drip and that they could give me allergy medicine. There was no formal diagnosis. But over 10 years later, it’s still there.

Bothersome. Uncomfortable, but certainly manageable. And that’s about the best story you’ll hear about a vet who’s been exposed to burn pits. Many struggle with chronic respiratory issues. Migraines. Cancer.

So imagine how we all felt, watching all these Republicans like Josh Hawley, most of whom have never even worn the uniform, throw us a giant middle finger?

I know that’s harsh language, but it has to be. Because what they did was about as anti-American as it gets. Patriots don’t attack veterans who suffered injuries or illness from being around those toxic pits.

Many of these same Republicans spent years voting to keep us in these forever wars, lying to the American people about what was really going on over there, and getting rich off their defense contractor stocks that skyrocket when we’re at war.

These people profited off of sending us over there only to screw us when we came back messed up. **It’s criminal — and I’m ready to do something about it.**

I served my country for 13 years in the United States Marine Corps. I’d give anything for this country — and that’s exactly why I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.

**We deserve leaders who are willing to make even an ounce of the sacrifice our veterans have.** [**If you’re with me, please split a donation of $10 or anything at all between my grassroots campaign and Mark Takano today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57958296/389642614/720253296?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=MTFC_20230129_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjgyNDcyYS1mODlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qDb-DJEbnjTHAUUQ6vUWX_fPc6wXXhHxwd4SKVJBGr4=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Lucas Kunce and Mark Takano will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57958299/389642615/720253296?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20230129_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjgyNDcyYS1mODlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qDb-DJEbnjTHAUUQ6vUWX_fPc6wXXhHxwd4SKVJBGr4=)

clean_body: A message about burn pits — and how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me. | Hi Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce. In a moment, I’m going to ask you to = But first, I wanted to take a moment to talk to you about the burn pit I lived next to in Iraq — and how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me. = It was 2009. I was stationed at the Al Taqaddum Airbase where I was a Marine Captain leading a police training team. Twelve Marines and a Navy Corpsman. Running missions through Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Ramadi. It was my first of three tours of duty during the War on Terror. And from our camp, the base’s burn pit loomed over us. Smoke columns filled the sky and blew through our living space. We ran through it, joking about how we should be doing gas mask runs. For three months that pit bathed us in toxic fumes. We accepted it and focused on our duty. For me, that was planning our routes and pouring over intel to avoid the immediate danger: IEDs on all the convoys and missions we were running outside the wire. I was so proud to bring every member of that team home safely. Or so I thought — because, as it turns out, we couldn’t protect ourselves from our own country. When I got back from Iraq, I developed a persistent tickle in my throat. Constant irritation. I never had allergies before and annoyed myself with the constant throat clearing. Eventually, I was so embarrassed by it that I went to the base clinic. They said it was postnasal drip and that they could give me allergy medicine. There was no formal diagnosis. But over 10 years later, it’s still there. Bothersome. Uncomfortable, but certainly manageable. And that’s about the best story you’ll hear about a vet who’s been exposed to burn pits. Many struggle with chronic respiratory issues. Migraines. Cancer. So imagine how we all felt, watching all these Republicans like Josh Hawley, most of whom have never even worn the uniform, throw us a giant middle finger? I know that’s harsh language, but it has to be. Because what they did was about as anti-American as it gets. Patriots don’t attack veterans who suffered injuries or illness from being around those toxic pits. Many of these same Republicans spent years voting to keep us in these forever wars, lying to the American people about what was really going on over there, and getting rich off their defense contractor stocks that skyrocket when we’re at war. These people profited off of sending us over there only to screw us when we came back messed up. It’s criminal — and I’m ready to do something about it. I served my country for 13 years in the United States Marine Corps. I’d give anything for this country — and that’s exactly why I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate. We deserve leaders who are willing to make even an ounce of the sacrifice our veterans have. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Lucas Kunce and Mark Takano will go through immediately: | = = = = = I’m proud to have you on this team, Peter. Thanks for hearing me out, — Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. subject: All eyes on Wisconsin

body:

#
Hi there, Peter — It might feel like Election Day just passed, but it won’t be long before Wisconsinites head to the polls for another important election. In April, just a few months away, voters will be casting ballots once again. **On the line? The judicial seat that will determine the balance of power on the Wisconsin Supreme Court.** Wisconsin’s Supreme Court has several important cases coming up — from reversing Wisconsin’s out-of-touch abortion laws from 1849 to redistricting battles that could determine the partisan make-up of the state legislature, the stakes couldn’t be higher. Peter, we already knew Wisconsin would be a top target for the GOP with the White House and my Senate seat on the line in 2024, but the Supreme Court race means Republicans will be paying attention even sooner — and spending lots of money to tilt the scales in their favor. **Can you help us shore up support and turn out voters in the critically important Wisconsin Supreme Court race? name: Katie Porter for California
subject: Big Pharma’s vaccine price gouging
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Big Pharma wants to quadruple the price of the COVID shot.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=16763%2E3422442%2ElH9Uq4)
Big Pharma is trying to quadruple the price of the COVID vaccine.
Taxpayer dollars went into every aspect of COVID vaccine development and production, and for good reason. But now Big Pharma wants to _quadruple_ the price of the vaccine, even after they’ve made tens of billions in profit.
Just two vaccine manufacturers control 97% of the market. The lack of competition in the industry allows corporations to pull BS like this: ripping off taxpayers and preventing Americans from accessing lifesaving drugs. **That’s why Katie has worked on legislation to prevent this type of price gouging.**
In better news: Katie’s bill to punish drug companies if they raise drug prices faster than the rate of inflation**was signed into law last year and took effect on January 1st.** But if it would have been law earlier, it would have saved taxpayers $3.7 BILLION from 2018-2020.
**[We’ve made progress holding Big Pharma accountable, but there’s so much more to be done. Can you sign on to show your support for Katie’s work to stop Big Pharma’s BS?](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kp4s-em-big-pharma?source=EMAF29_1_PHA_20230129_V1_F&t=2&akid=16763%2E3422442%2ElH9Uq4)**
**[Sign the petition ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kp4s-em-big-pharma?source=EMAF29_1_PHA_20230129_V1_F&t=3&akid=16763%2E3422442%2ElH9Uq4)**
Thanks for being a part of Team Porter.
P.S. We have our Senate campaign’s first ever end of month deadline on Tuesday at midnight. **[Can you chip in today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230129-1?refcode=EMAF29_1_PHA_20230129_V1_F&refcode2=16763_3422442_lH9Uq4&akid=16763%2E3422442%2ElH9Uq4)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230129-1?refcode=EMAF29_1_PHA_20230129_V1_F&refcode2=16763_3422442_lH9Uq4&akid=16763%2E3422442%2ElH9Uq4)**

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF29_1_PHA_20230129_V1_F&t=4&refcode2=16763_3422442_lH9Uq4&akid=16763%2E3422442%2ElH9Uq4)**

body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57958807/389643927/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjg5OGUzMi1mYTlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=acgg_i5irVYkNAS-Mzir2Y6g3CTzDdhzrjjUwkJR_s0=&emci=0aca9cec-f69f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=cf898e32-fa9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)

| | Just days after taking back power, we're seeing House Republicans' priorities on full display. Unsurprisingly, their to-do list doesn't include helping level the playing field for working families or addressing any of the challenges facing the American people. **[We must stand tall against the dysfunctional authoritarianism Republicans call legislating. Democracy is a powerful tool, and together, I know we can win this fight. But we've got to start now. Will you join in today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57958808/389643928/-2044921950?refcode=2023-01-29-extremismeom&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=cf898e32-fa9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjg5OGUzMi1mYTlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=acgg_i5irVYkNAS-Mzir2Y6g3CTzDdhzrjjUwkJR_s0=)** So far, their agenda has read like a laundry list of conservative extremism:
* Waste time on political infighting, struggling to elect a Speaker.
* Give liars and election deniers powerful committee assignments.
* Gut the House Ethics Office.
* Vote to defund the IRS and make it easier for the rich to cheat on their taxes.
* Pass oppressive anti-choice legislation.
* Propose a 30% national sales tax.

And it's only January. **[This chaotic dysfunction will continue and is only a fraction of the dangerous legislating they will try to get away with if they're able to retake power in the Senate and White House in 2024. That's why we're building up our progressive movement now. We're nearing the end of January, our first deadline of the year, and we need you FIRST. Can you give $3 and join our progressive movement?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57958809/389643929/-2044921950?refcode=2023-01-29-extremismeom&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=cf898e32-fa9f-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjg5OGUzMi1mYTlmLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=acgg_i5irVYkNAS-Mzir2Y6g3CTzDdhzrjjUwkJR_s0=)** Extremism now defines the Republican Party. The MAGA cult has ensured that there are no moderates left. Thanks to our grassroots movement, the Senate remains blue – for now. There I promise to keep up the fight to protect Social Security and Medicare, lower costs for families, defend reproductive rights, ensure data privacy, and make sure everyone pays their fair share. name: Secretary Mike Pompeo
subject: This is exciting news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Would you like a SIGNED copy of my new book?

|
---
| | | |
---

Friend,

I'm excited to release a new book about my time as President Trump's CIA Director and Secretary of State.

_**Never Give An Inch**_ contains dozens of untold stories you don't want to miss, including negotiations with North Korea's Kim Jong Un, rescuing American hostages, eliminating Qassem Soleimani, and much more!

**[I'm granting you SPECIAL ACCESS to your very own SIGNED copy before the book's release to the general public. Will you claim your book before they run out?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhl7dvg2cb2is125cfudo3spbv08b42hch4hlp6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1j68ob6cph2bs "I’m granting you SPECIAL ACCESS to your very own SIGNED copy before the book’s release to the general public. Will you claim your book before they run out?")**

---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqof3andj5f8n8lg86cvrv4nqes6m8bp336auqo0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1j68ob6cph2bs)
---
| | | [Claim Your Signed Copy](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zp3jq86uj7j91jr8hjlne967710v57uo52ohgk3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1j68ob6cph2bs "Claim Your Signed Copy")
---
I understand you're one of the top Republican patriots in the country, so I want to make sure you get a signed copy! But there are only a limited number available and supplies are quickly running out.

**[My new book _Never Give An Inch_ will be yours with a $45 donation to help Republicans take back America.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8enubsnu22tok8nluqn8enhsqa3r2ik5bn99u10_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c1j68ob6cph2bs "My new book Never Give An Inch will be yours with a $45 donation to help Republicans take back America.")**

Please hurry to order today.

Unapologetically American,

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: SIGN ON: Ban ALL congressional stock trading!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Peter, will you sign our petition so we can prohibit politicians from trading stocks?
#
Peter,
In a healthy democracy, politicians should be serving their constituents, not their own wallets. But right now, members of Congress can still buy, trade, and sell stocks — literally profiting off of confidential, insider knowledge.
Does that seem right to you? [**If you think it’s time to draw the line and ban ALL congressional stock trading now, sign onto Pramila’s petition >>**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/sign-ban-congress-stock-trading/?source=em20230129-2101&t=1&akid=2101%2E420207%2EzTuQgS)**
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/sign-ban-congress-stock-trading/?source=em20230129-2101&t=2&akid=2101%2E420207%2EzTuQgS)**
Members of Congress shouldn’t be able to use their positions to enrich themselves instead of delivering for their constituents. It’s corruption, and it’s unacceptable. That’s why Pramila co-sponsored the TRUST Act to prohibit members of Congress from trading stocks -- period.
Voters are looking to progressive leaders like Pramila to give them a reason to trust in our government and democracy again. That’s why we need to enact strict rules on stock trading and ensure that members of Congress aren’t profiting at the expense of the American people.
[**Every signature will help make Pramila’s case for banning all congressional stock trading once and for all. Will you add your name to our petition right now?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/Oppose-GOP-Abortion-Ban/?source=em20230129-2101&t=3&akid=2101%2E420207%2EzTuQgS)
**[Sign the Petition](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/Oppose-GOP-Abortion-Ban/?source=em20230129-2101&t=4&akid=2101%2E420207%2EzTuQgS)**
Thank you for your continued support!
In solidarity,
-- Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230129-2101-footer&t=5&refcode2=2101_420207_zTuQgS&akid=2101%2E420207%2EzTuQgS)**

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
It’s time for us to fight back against these voter suppression efforts, and we want you on the front lines with us. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57978836/389671196/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230129_e_champ_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDIwYzhmYi0yNmEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=01XLuQLRo1LoI3I_rmp1PFoaOLzjiWDX_JjBI8CEmQc=&emci=1380e408-a39e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=a020c8fb-26a0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | Our fight doesn’t slow down after Election Day. **Regardless of the day, month, or year, Fair Fight’s mission remains the same** — to ensure every eligible voter can make their voice heard at the polls and have their vote counted. As we face voting rights challenges ahead, we want to know that you’re still in this fight with us. [**_We need to show that voting rights champions from your area and across the country are not letting up in the fight to protect our rights and our democracy. Add your name to pledge to be a voting rights champion in 2023 and support Fair Fight’s crucial mission today:_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57978840/389671199/-1004102973?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230129_e_champ_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDIwYzhmYi0yNmEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=01XLuQLRo1LoI3I_rmp1PFoaOLzjiWDX_JjBI8CEmQc=&emci=1380e408-a39e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=a020c8fb-26a0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277) | [**SIGN YOUR NAME**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57978842/389671202/-1004102973?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230129_e_champ_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDIwYzhmYi0yNmEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=01XLuQLRo1LoI3I_rmp1PFoaOLzjiWDX_JjBI8CEmQc=&emci=1380e408-a39e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=a020c8fb-26a0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)
---
Fair Fight was founded after the 2018 election, when voter suppression in Georgia left many young voters and voters of color disenfranchised within the electoral process. And since then, we’ve been able to hold bad actors accountable and expand access to the ballot box for voters in Georgia and across the country.
Anti-voter politicians and their allies haven’t given up their fight to restrict our freedom to vote — so we have to push back even harder and prove the strength of this movement. Let’s show the world just how many voting rights advocates we have on our side.
[**_With so much at stake, it couldn’t be more clear that we need you in this fight. Take the next step in protecting our democracy by adding your name as a Fair Fight voting rights champion below._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57978845/389671205/-1004102973?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230129_e_champ_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDIwYzhmYi0yNmEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=01XLuQLRo1LoI3I_rmp1PFoaOLzjiWDX_JjBI8CEmQc=&emci=1380e408-a39e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=a020c8fb-26a0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

clean_body: It’s time for us to fight back against these voter suppression efforts, and we want you on the front lines with us. | | | Our fight doesn’t slow down after Election Day. Regardless of the day, month, or year, Fair Fight’s mission remains the same — to ensure every eligible voter can make their voice heard at the polls and have their vote counted. As we face voting rights challenges ahead, we want to know that you’re still in this fight with us. | Fair Fight was founded after the 2018 election, when voter suppression in Georgia left many young voters and voters of color disenfranchised within the electoral process. And since then, we’ve been able to hold bad actors accountable and expand access to the ballot box for voters in Georgia and across the country. Anti-voter politicians and their allies haven’t given up their fight to restrict our freedom to vote — so we have to push back even harder and prove the strength of this movement. Let’s show the world just how many voting rights advocates we have on our side. Thank you for everything, The Fair Fight Team | * = 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. | February is going to be a big month, Fellow activist.

As the PA GOP has made abundantly clear through their continued disgrace in the state legislature, turnout for the upcoming Special Elections on February 7th in Allegheny county is absolutely critical to the progress of a reflective democracy in Pennsylvania. Our organizing team started GOTV efforts on Friday in McKeesport, West Mifflin, Clairton, Duquesne, Whitaker, Homestead, West Homestead and Port Vue by making sure voters know the stakes of these important elections. If Democrats win the three vacancies that they are expected to, they will have a constitutional majority in the state house which would bring progressive policies to the forefront in Harrisburg. This could finally mean movement on raising the minimum wage, adequate and equitable funding for education and even expanding voting rights.

Our January end-of-month deadline is almost here, and this will be our **last** major fundraising deadline before next week’s Special Elections.

**[Your support is the backbone of our success, and we need you on our team. clean_body: Every single election is critical for progress. = | February is going to be a big month, Fellow activist. As the PA GOP has made abundantly clear through their continued disgrace in the state legislature, turnout for the upcoming Special Elections on February 7th in Allegheny county is absolutely critical to the progress of a reflective democracy in Pennsylvania. Our organizing team started GOTV efforts on Friday in McKeesport, West Mifflin, Clairton, Duquesne, Whitaker, Homestead, West Homestead and Port Vue by making sure voters know the stakes of these important elections. If Democrats win the three vacancies that they are expected to, they will have a constitutional majority in the state house which would bring progressive policies to the forefront in Harrisburg. This could finally mean movement on raising the minimum wage, adequate and equitable funding for education and even expanding voting rights. Our January end-of-month deadline is almost here, and this will be our last major fundraising deadline before next week’s Special Elections. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Special Elections happening 2/7/2023 for three PA House districts in Allegheny County only: HD32, HD34, HD35 Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: SB849 Homeowners Should Consent Before Dominion Installs Smart Meters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-VCxR_9JGt4W0WLgv7MIxe_zk7I3BdslEyrwGYuIZA9e80SpiKcsGqXDPrlaCgouGLCTYaFDBwvBaOxug35V-kwzJxmJU3m_XsQan5b_68Cs2_64zYlXZ7LyPnWoGm5PH096IBxLdhernwBZEX65uV6cIziyT1BIYAWkpemLlDI=&c=k3PEqVYazzQKbswHPU8LozLV7l_EhST_PvjPLJSE_a3K3hrO4BZSxw==&ch=0l5HCTkPqXG9A6VzqXWWrnD4x0qpH5wR_PscqsMk2mHHpDULLp9VeA==)

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
January 29, 2022

Press Contact:
Jody Pyles
jody@chaseforva.com
804 912 6007

Scheduling Press Interview:
Debbie Gwynn
debbie@chaseforva.com
804 393 2715

Are Homeowners Being Fully Educated and Informed about the Potential Dangers of Smart Meters that Dominion Is Installing on Homes; Many Homeowners Are Saying Without Permission?

SB849 Chase Bill Requires Dominion Energy to Receive Written Homeowner Consent Before Installing Smart Meters

Senator Amanda Chase will present SB849 Relating to Public Utilities, Customer Consent to Install Wireless Smart Meters Monday Afternoon Before A Senate Commerce and Labor Committee

CHESTERFIELD, VA. Virginia Senator Amanda Chase will present [SB849](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-VCxR_9JGt4W0WLgv7MIxe_zk7I3BdslEyrwGYuIZA9e80SpiKcsGsu1r9GSlagkMk7UbeFXLgRtKAWrDsX3tLNhs0GIAtJWkBkkmFJ22aUN52hvUWodkxGEhSDzkoebEQYO7Mn0YNmQnub7NYYJ9OXbTYiVVFc8q8Zc7Dfp37cRINM6CbfFrCvSH9sD9l-AqwWOHe-MCj4=&c=k3PEqVYazzQKbswHPU8LozLV7l_EhST_PvjPLJSE_a3K3hrO4BZSxw==&ch=0l5HCTkPqXG9A6VzqXWWrnD4x0qpH5wR_PscqsMk2mHHpDULLp9VeA==) before the Senate Commerce and Labor Committee, Monday afternoon in an effort to ensure consumers reserve the right to decline without penalty wireless Smart Meters being installed on their home or business.

SB849 Relating to Public Utilities, Customer Consent to Install Wireless Smart Meters recognizes that Dominion Energy or any other utility or 3rd party vendor should NOT install wireless Smart Meters without express written permission from the homeowner or business owner, who should be given full information about any potential dangers or risks associated with the meter and the right to decline without penalty if the customer decides against having the smart meter installed.

SB849 Prohibits a public utility from installing a wireless smart meter, defined in the bill, on the premises of a customer without first obtaining such customer's consent to such installation. The bill requires a public utility, for any wireless smart meter installed by a public utility prior to July 1, 2023, to provide the customer an opportunity to consent to the previous installation.

The bill requires a public utility to offer to remove a wireless smart meter without cost to the customer that was installed without obtaining the customer's consent.

The bill prohibits a public utility from (i) discontinuing service to a customer who does not consent to the installation of a wireless smart meter; (ii) charging a fee, assessment, or higher rate to a customer who does not consent to the installation of a wireless smart meter; or (iii) providing or offering to provide discounted rates to a customer in exchange for obtaining the customer's consent to install a smart meter.

"Customers have the right to make well informed and conscientious decisions that could potentially effect the health and well being of both themselves, their family, their employees and their customers from known and unknown risks associated with the use of wireless Smart Meters, without penalty. All we're asking for here is informed consent, full information and acceptable alternatives when the consumer declines. " Senator Amanda Chase

Virginia Senator Amanda Chase will present SB849 Relating to Public Utilities, Customer Consent to Install Wireless Smart Meters, before the Senate Commerce and Labor Committee, Monday afternoon, 15 minutes after session adjourns at approximately 1pm, in the Pocahontas Building in Senate Room A.

Please reach out to the Senators who serve on the Senate Commerce and Labor Committee and ask them to support SB849 a consumer's right to chose.

clean_body: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE | | | | | | == | | | | | | | | ---|--- | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE January 29, 2022 Press Contact: Jody Pyles jody@chaseforva.com 804 912 6007 Scheduling Press Interview: Debbie Gwynn debbie@chaseforva.com 804 393 2715 Are Homeowners Being Fully Educated and Informed about the Potential Dangers of Smart Meters that Dominion Is Installing on Homes; Many Homeowners Are Saying Without Permission? SB849 Chase Bill Requires Dominion Energy to Receive Written Homeowner Consent Before Installing Smart Meters Senator Amanda Chase will present SB849 Relating to Public Utilities, Customer Consent to Install Wireless Smart Meters Monday Afternoon Before A Senate Commerce and Labor Committee CHESTERFIELD, VA. Virginia Senator Amanda Chase will present == before the Senate Commerce and Labor Committee, Monday afternoon in an effort to ensure consumers reserve the right to decline without penalty wireless Smart Meters being installed on their home or business. SB849 Relating to Public Utilities, Customer Consent to Install Wireless Smart Meters recognizes that Dominion Energy or any other utility or 3rd party vendor should NOT install wireless Smart Meters without express written permission from the homeowner or business owner, who should be given full information about any potential dangers or risks associated with the meter and the right to decline without penalty if the customer decides against having the smart meter installed. SB849 Prohibits a public utility from installing a wireless smart meter, defined in the bill, on the premises of a customer without first obtaining such customer's consent to such installation. The bill requires a public utility, for any wireless smart meter installed by a public utility prior to July 1, 2023, to provide the customer an opportunity to consent to the previous installation. The bill requires a public utility to offer to remove a wireless smart meter without cost to the customer that was installed without obtaining the customer's consent. The bill prohibits a public utility from (i) discontinuing service to a customer who does not consent to the installation of a wireless smart meter; (ii) charging a fee, assessment, or higher rate to a customer who does not consent to the installation of a wireless smart meter; or (iii) providing or offering to provide discounted rates to a customer in exchange for obtaining the customer's consent to install a smart meter. "Customers have the right to make well informed and conscientious decisions that could potentially effect the health and well being of both themselves, their family, their employees and their customers from known and unknown risks associated with the use of wireless Smart Meters, without penalty. All we're asking for here is informed consent, full information and acceptable alternatives when the consumer declines. " Senator Amanda Chase Virginia Senator Amanda Chase will present SB849 Relating to Public Utilities, Customer Consent to Install Wireless Smart Meters, before the Senate Commerce and Labor Committee, Monday afternoon, 15 minutes after session adjourns at approximately 1pm, in the Pocahontas Building in Senate Room A. Please reach out to the Senators who serve on the Senate Commerce and Labor Committee and ask them to support SB849 a consumer's right to chose. | Friend,

Happy Kansas Day! As I continue to fight for Kansas families in the halls of Congress, I am constantly reminded of our state's motto: **Ad astra per aspera****— to the stars through difficulties.**

| As a lifelong Kansan, it's an honor to represent so many families and small businesses who work tirelessly to make our state the best place in the world to live and raise a family. After two years of one-party Democrat rule in Washington, I am committed to delivering on the promises Republicans made to the American people and getting our country back on track.

**I will never stop fighting for our shared beliefs and putting conservative Kansas values FIRST in Washington. God Bless!**

Yours truly,

Jake

That means that EVERY patriot has to pull a little bit of extra weight - and that includes you.

name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: What happens in Nevada will decide Senate control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Friend, I know a thing or two about winning tough races.
| | |
---
Friend, I know a thing or two about winning tough races.

In 2016, I overcame $50 million in GOP spending to win my first Senate race by 2 points. And in 2022, I defied the polls and pundits again – winning by _less than 1 point_ – and defended our Democratic Senate majority.
**What happens in Nevada over the coming months will again decide Senate control – so we need to do everything in our power to keep this battleground state blue. That's why I'm writing to you today.**

My friend and colleague Sen. Jacky Rosen is back on the ballot, and experts at _The Hill_ say the GOP is zeroing in on her as one of its TOP targets for defeat. Jacky is the fighter Nevada needs in the Senate – but she simply cannot fight back and WIN without grassroots supporters like you by her side.
**Ahead of the next election cycle's first end-of-month fundraising deadline, I'm personally asking you to help Jacky reach her $100,000 goal.[So please, friend,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57979371/389672984/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2313-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjY4NTEwYi0yYWEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vE8NF0sT7Wjdzl_-p8-G1Cql0_XmsCxaAoFcpU1rWNo=)**[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57979372/389672985/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2313-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjY4NTEwYi0yYWEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vE8NF0sT7Wjdzl_-p8-G1Cql0_XmsCxaAoFcpU1rWNo=)**[_will you give $5 or more now to keep Nevada blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57979373/389672986/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2313-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjY4NTEwYi0yYWEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vE8NF0sT7Wjdzl_-p8-G1Cql0_XmsCxaAoFcpU1rWNo=)**

**Take it from me: Jacky needs critical _early_ support to fight back against the GOP's attacks, get a head start on funding TV ads, and reach voters across the state. But right now, she's falling short of her crucial end-of-month goal and needs your immediate help to close the gap.**

clean_body: Friend, I know a thing or two about winning tough races. | | | Friend, I know a thing or two about winning tough races. In 2016, I overcame $50 million in GOP spending to win my first Senate race by 2 points. And in 2022, I defied the polls and pundits again – winning by less than 1 point – and defended our Democratic Senate majority. What happens in Nevada over the coming months will again decide Senate control – so we need to do everything in our power to keep this battleground state blue. That's why I'm writing to you today. My friend and colleague Sen. Jacky Rosen is back on the ballot, and experts at The Hill say the GOP is zeroing in on her as one of its TOP targets for defeat. Jacky is the fighter Nevada needs in the Senate – but she simply cannot fight back and WIN without grassroots supporters like you by her side. Ahead of the next election cycle's first end-of-month fundraising deadline, I'm personally asking you to help Jacky reach her $100,000 goal.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Republicans need to flip only two seats to win back the majority – and analysts at FiveThirtyEight predict they have a "clear path" to do just that. Take it from me: Jacky needs critical early support to fight back against the GOP's attacks, get a head start on funding TV ads, and reach voters across the state. But right now, she's falling short of her crucial end-of-month goal and needs your immediate help to close the gap. = Thank you, friend. ¡La lucha sigue! The fight continues! Catherine | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Fetterman HQ
subject: Quick update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
**FIRST:** We worked together to elect John to the U.S. Senate
**THEN:** Grassroots donations slowed wayyy down after the election. (No surprise there!)
**NOW:** Our January end-of-month fundraising deadline is less than 72 hours away.
**[John’s counting on this team to reach our $100,000 grassroots goal before Tuesday at midnight. Do you think you could chip in your first $5, $25, or whatever feels right today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230129-1?refcode=em20230129-1-8226&refcode2=8226_434096_wHwLxU&akid=8226%2E434096%2EwHwLxU)**
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230129-1?refcode=em20230129-8226&refcode2=8226_434096_wHwLxU&akid=8226%2E434096%2EwHwLxU)**
Here’s why supporting John’s work is *so* important, even when we’re not in an Election Year, Derek.
As a father of three awesome kids, John understands all too well that our future generations are going to feel the effects of what our national + state governments do today.
On so many issues, from gun violence prevention, to education, to health care, to climate, **our kids are quite literally depending on us to get this right.**
John’s in the Senate fighting for you + your family just the same way he’d fight for his own. That's honestly what we all deserve from our Senators.
**[If you agree, we respectfully ask that you make your first donation before Tuesday’s deadline. This is people-powered work, and we can only get it done if we all pitch in.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230129-1?refcode=em20230129-1-8226&refcode2=8226_434096_wHwLxU&akid=8226%2E434096%2EwHwLxU)**
Thank you for everything,
Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230129-8226-footer&t=1&refcode2=8226_434096_wHwLxU&akid=8226%2E434096%2EwHwLxU)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8226%2E434096%2EwHwLxU)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8226%2E434096%2EwHwLxU)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38ca9550ec9d47488f529647ea0d3ece&_e=Ymv_V-DCcIqphbTjvq_KO0DX52QPavvVW-0FD6InerLhRb7uO4osSsqcROMJZBQLdrtaC3Z-CuCblRJeLeTpSy5RdDSEGiU4h2YZgMZjRbGbHl1-zojzebnaHg6j19S84yX5NrzEJjMTRWAIbNuTpmyHCfH6KjYN6asS0L-k8N6rbnZgHVJjRWlAVlsvQJo5jPD5AvhbTdyZmD_AKte1UKycD3psKAyt-Suz1NCCqihExuCKqBoYKQ_Q9bOehDOJqwTjBTBOcWPDbhNGUqI5mCPm0laeKct6HXZiaWGNXnGhCL6XL6i2cbSFrqb0ZZUUXedm9n6vxLTzpuuAYb3aHQ%3D%3D)

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38ca9550ec9d47488f529647ea0d3ece&_e=Ymv_V-DCcIqphbTjvq_KO0DX52QPavvVW-0FD6InerLhRb7uO4osSsqcROMJZBQLdrtaC3Z-CuCblRJeLeTpSy5RdDSEGiU4h2YZgMZjRbGbHl1-zojzebnaHg6j19S84yX5NrzEJjMTRWAIbNuTpmyHCfH6KjYN6asS0L-k8N6rbnZgHVJjRWlAVlsvQJo5gRk_nEZiU5KQ81l0q8E-CThjGC8rxDKHYuWPwvH4XWw-Kt7t-BDnnl9J4G3MedIct-ziBfowTEFnifFD6FavP5gjLBvU7S5EP5-QLExxmedatc8bsF01DUykpL3YzdL9DnTsH7LmkCmAlYwA1D1nOA%3D%3D) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38ca9550ec9d47488f529647ea0d3ece&_e=Ymv_V-DCcIqphbTjvq_KO0DX52QPavvVW-0FD6InerLhRb7uO4osSsqcROMJZBQLdrtaC3Z-CuCblRJeLeTpSy5RdDSEGiU4h2YZgMZjRbGbHl1-zojzebnaHg6j19S84yX5NrzEJjMTRWAIbNuTpmyHCfH6KjYN6asS0L-k8N6rbnZgHVJjRWlAVlsvQJo5iIEe1zTbu4rbMCz7HUgGFkTKtegxKa1EaOAgP_5FF7TOeFi98X7Prg80fp4RB7PzU4RCkPB5pohj_RadQBKPEbw7WSLcaALkxOP8V5Yg8hvwyKjrMilacOwIYVnzDtcKJ1eLvGJEE9V2jj9L-zdFdA%3D%3D) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can 't help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who've been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang ...while hoping that the guards wouldn't show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they're being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn't even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he's been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven 't held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38ca9550ec9d47488f529647ea0d3ece&_e=Ymv_V-DCcIqphbTjvq_KO0DX52QPavvVW-0FD6InerLhRb7uO4osSsqcROMJZBQLdrtaC3Z-CuCblRJeLeTpSy5RdDSEGiU4h2YZgMZjRbGbHl1-zojzebnaHg6j19S84yX5NrzEJjMTRWAIbNuTpmyHCfH6KjYN6asS0L-k8N6rbnZgHVJjRWlAVlsvQJo5ABqI762BXfxFqDVQ-JVjbqTSJup5CGXSb-9Dus8fup7n4vSXFo7nLNwhkn8Gx1T7tUqTdT7P8sAdMl5n4qY_W9ZKlfTwSey_qAnECR--MaAPLuQsgXYsrZN7jngfgBJB6FWnswWdQ7oG93etL3Zigg%3D%3D)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38ca9550ec9d47488f529647ea0d3ece&_e=Ymv_V-DCcIqphbTjvq_KO0DX52QPavvVW-0FD6InerLhRb7uO4osSsqcROMJZBQLdrtaC3Z-CuCblRJeLeTpSy5RdDSEGiU4h2YZgMZjRbGbHl1-zojzebnaHg6j19S84yX5NrzEJjMTRWAIbNuTpmyHCfH6KjYN6asS0L-k8N6rbnZgHVJjRWlAVlsvQJo5Q1T3QJsPTgT8PpmlA3Z6piLH7MTb8N-NOTWZ7fx0cwB_uTCICDZ-aohqmphrawBegPBztCzAurmFfAWgRWt-ayQAkKyLIOvoIMGPEizXV7BuR-gK8puX97sfjDu65-TLxaTVSMa2A-0aPgbOAkrhrA%3D%3D)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can 't fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38ca9550ec9d47488f529647ea0d3ece&_e=Ymv_V-DCcIqphbTjvq_KO0DX52QPavvVW-0FD6InerLhRb7uO4osSsqcROMJZBQLdrtaC3Z-CuCblRJeLeTpSy5RdDSEGiU4h2YZgMZjRbGbHl1-zojzebnaHg6j19S84yX5NrzEJjMTRWAIbNuTpmyHCfH6KjYN6asS0L-k8N6rbnZgHVJjRWlAVlsvQJo5BRLHa37JHnXXOO282xqAXU0C_yCieWqWRLksjOTvgIEd_co114-652JXA8iLiBTUgUrL-ebvvUvtzupMBvtzFjzHNiFE-uEhFUdHiD_0XaxREfSKTRRdvHEKhembM0tJmvfrNoLD4GQKfFpPf-IS6Q%3D%3D)

name: Team Cori
subject: Tyre Nichols should be alive today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Content Warning: This email contains language about police violence.
#
Peter,
Once again, another unarmed Black man was brutalized and murdered by police. Tyre Nichols should be alive today.
If you are able to at this time, please read Cori’s official statement below.
Take care of yourself and remember that your Congresswoman loves you.
—Team Cori
* * *
_Content Warning: This email contains language about police violence._
“Tyre Nichols should be alive today. He should be playing with his four-year-old son. He should be skateboarding and photographing sunsets. But instead, Tyre was brutally beaten to death by Memphis Police officers. And now, instead of seeing the photographs he took, the world watches Tyre crying out for his mother in his final moments of consciousness.
Charging the officers who brutalized Tyre is not enough. Our country will continue to sanction the taking of Black lives with impunity until it embraces an affirmative vision of public safety and dismantles its racist policing system rooted in enslavement and government control. And let’s be clear: merely diversifying police forces will never address the violent, racist architecture that underpins our entire criminal legal system. The mere presence of Black officers does not stop policing from being a tool of white supremacy.
It is abundantly clear that rogue, militarized policing has never and will never keep us safe. Following a year of record-breaking police killings, prevention is the best path forward. Achieving genuine public safety requires investing in our communities. We need unarmed emergency first responder agencies, 911 diversion programs, civilian traffic enforcement, community-based and -led interventions, safe passage to school and violence interruption programs, behavioral health and crisis support treatment, nutrition support, housing security, and programs for youth and families, survivors of violence, and individuals exiting incarceration or criminal supervision.
St. Louis and I mourn with Tyre’s family and echo their call to disband the SCORPION unit of the Memphis Police Department. I will not stop advocating for a country where our government helps feed, house, educate and support our children, families, and community members, instead of slaughtering them at the altar of white supremacy. Rest in Power Tyre; it is in your name and the name of the thousands of other Black lives killed by police that we will keep pushing to not only end police brutality but dismantle the uniquely American racist and violent policing system.
**To my colleagues in Congress: how many more people have to die at the hands of police for you to join our push for an unequivocal, affirmative public safety agenda that saves lives?”**
—Congresswoman Cori Bush

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230129-1?refcode=em20230129-2089-footer&t=1&refcode2=2089_1082990_sDHNAF&akid=2089%2E1082990%2EsDHNAF) **
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.

clean_body: Content Warning: This email contains language about police violence. Peter, Once again, another unarmed Black man was brutalized and murdered by police. Tyre Nichols should be alive today. If you are able to at this time, please read Cori’s official statement below. Take care of yourself and remember that your Congresswoman loves you. —Team Cori Content Warning: This email contains language about police violence. “Tyre Nichols should be alive today. He should be playing with his four-year-old son. He should be skateboarding and photographing sunsets. But instead, Tyre was brutally beaten to death by Memphis Police officers. And now, instead of seeing the photographs he took, the world watches Tyre crying out for his mother in his final moments of consciousness. Charging the officers who brutalized Tyre is not enough. Our country will continue to sanction the taking of Black lives with impunity until it embraces an affirmative vision of public safety and dismantles its racist policing system rooted in enslavement and government control. And let’s be clear: merely diversifying police forces will never address the violent, racist architecture that underpins our entire criminal legal system. The mere presence of Black officers does not stop policing from being a tool of white supremacy. It is abundantly clear that rogue, militarized policing has never and will never keep us safe. Following a year of record-breaking police killings, prevention is the best path forward. Achieving genuine public safety requires investing in our communities. We need unarmed emergency first responder agencies, 911 diversion programs, civilian traffic enforcement, community-based and -led interventions, safe passage to school and violence interruption programs, behavioral health and crisis support treatment, nutrition support, housing security, and programs for youth and families, survivors of violence, and individuals exiting incarceration or criminal supervision. St. Louis and I mourn with Tyre’s family and echo their call to disband the SCORPION unit of the Memphis Police Department. I will not stop advocating for a country where our government helps feed, house, educate and support our children, families, and community members, instead of slaughtering them at the altar of white supremacy. Rest in Power Tyre; it is in your name and the name of the thousands of other Black lives killed by police that we will keep pushing to not only end police brutality but dismantle the uniquely American racist and violent policing system. To my colleagues in Congress: how many more people have to die at the hands of police for you to join our push for an unequivocal, affirmative public safety agenda that saves lives?” —Congresswoman Cori Bush Follow us on , , , and . This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121. Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

clean_body: We need to crush the Biden-Harris fundraising numbers. | | | Friend, We’re coming up on our FIRST fundraising deadline of 2023. It’s not enough to outraise Biden and Kamala... We need to CRUSH their fundraising numbers. We need to send a message to the Biden White House – and the entire nation – that the American people want a NEW president who will lead our country back to greatness. That’s why I’m emailing every single member of our MAGA movement so that we can post a massive first-month fundraising haul that sends shivers down Biden’s spine. But we can’t do it without YOU, Friend. | | This weekend, I campaigned in New Hampshire to WIN the first primary in the nation. While I was listening to the hardworking people of our country, Biden is about to get wined and dined by his rich special interest donors in New York City. Not only that, Biden is trying to RIG his primary by ENDING New Hampshire’s First-In-The-Nation status after polls showed that he’d suffer a humiliating defeat. That tells you everything you need to know... ...Biden SHUNS voters and tries to RIG and BUY his way into power. ...Our campaign puts the PEOPLE of our country first. So, while Biden collects checks with strings attached from special interest lobbyists, I’m once again turning to the people who built our movement to ensure we CRUSH our first deadline. Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: American Update
subject: Kevin McCarthy’s Star-Studded 118th Republican Majority/Birthday Celebration Dinner
body:
BREAKING: (WATCH) Paul Pelosi Video RELEASED

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657203%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kB2colgoPWx82w2NkT1XeA&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657204%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WoId%2fdJt84gvoLlWvXMMPQ&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657215%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A0kgLeQLZoJxc7EfDIMdrQ&sysid=1 Kevin McCarthy’s Star-Studded 118th Republican Majority/Birthday Celebration Dinner

Last night, a celebration party for the now 58-year-old newly elected Speaker of the House, Rep. Kevin McCarthy, was held in Washington, D.C., on his birthday. The event was attended by members of the Republican Party and their families, as well as several high-profile political figures from around the country. Taking back the House starts here.

There's an open seat in Virginia, sadly, vacated when Rep. Donald McEachin passed away in November. **Progressive Democrat Jennifer McClellan is running for it, and the election's less than a month away!**_** ** [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in making history and adding another Democrat to the House? | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. clean_body: The GOP wants this seat | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Peter, GOOD NEWS: We can shrink the GOP House Majority NEXT MONTH!! It's been painful watching the clown show in Congress, led by Weaker (as I like to call him) McCarthy. He's brought chaos, stupidity and incompetence to the House, and endangered us by putting Marjorie Taylor Greene on the Homeland Security Committee. Yet, his weakness is opportunity. House Republicans have one of the smallest majorities ever and we can shrink it further. There's an open seat in Virginia, sadly, vacated when Rep. Donald McEachin passed away in November. Progressive Democrat Jennifer McClellan is running for it, and the election's less than a month away! Yes, it's a Democratic seat. Yet, so was George Santos' seat. We MUST NEVER take anything for granted. | | | | | | | | McClellan would be the first Black woman elected to the House from this district. She has a long history of civil rights activism and was elected to the state assembly, then state senate, where now she serves. This Includes her role as Vice-Chair of the Virginia Legislative Black Caucus. McClellan's opponent is a MAGA nut who attacked our democracy and endangered election workers by claiming the 2020 election was stolen. He would ban abortion and eliminate all gun laws. Thank you for helping Democrats thrive, passing progressive policy and increasing Kevin McCarthy's suffering as he manages an even smaller caucus. Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Biden’s new Chief of Staff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

President Biden has appointed a new Chief of Staff — and honestly, he
couldn’t be worse. Establishment Democrats have applauded his work and
glorified his results despite his role in corrupt practices for many
years.

This is exactly why we’re here — to challenge and change the Democratic
Party until it actually responds to the needs of the people, not the
wealthy and powerful.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230129-27292&t=1001&akid=27292%2E1203867%2EBF03Mm ]Peter, we’ve
been going up against the political establishment for years and that’s not
going to change any time soon. We need your help to keep going, and reach
our first end of month goal for 2023 — can you rush $3
right now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230129-27292&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=27292%2E1203867%2EBF03Mm ]Contribute $3

So who exactly is the man that Biden hand-picked to be his Chief of Staff?

While tasked with running the federal government’s COVID program, Jeffrey
Zients earned a reputation as an administrator more concerned with forcing
Americans back into work than following trusted public health guidance.
His qualifications for the job?

He invested in multiple health care companies and held executive roles,
which supposedly made him a policy expert who deserved the authority to
override medical and health professionals.

And it gets worse.

Zients personally invested in multiple health care companies, including
one he founded himself. Several were found to have defrauded Medicare and
Medicaid recipients for millions of dollars — some companies were even
investigated by the Department of Justice.

This is the man appointed to one of the highest-ranking positions in the
White House — seriously? If this is what passes for leadership in the
Democratic Party, we have a problem.

It’s past time for the party to be moving forward, not falling back on the
same old corrupt patterns that have helped cause so many Americans to lose
faith in our political system. That’s why Justice Democrats is here to
stay.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230129-27292&t=1021&akid=27292%2E1203867%2EBF03Mm ]It’s our job to keep pushing relentlessly to transform the Democratic
Party, and we can’t do it without your help. We’re coming up on our end of
month fundraising deadline — can you chip in $3 or any
amount today?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=27292%2E1203867%2EBF03Mm ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=27292%2E1203867%2EBF03Mm ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230129-27292-footer&t=1024&refcode2=27292_1203867_BF03Mm&akid=27292%2E1203867%2EBF03Mm

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=27292%2E1203867%2EBF03Mm

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Team Kilmer
subject: Derek needs support from 18326
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
FIRST deadline of the year
We're coming up on our **FIRST** end-of-month fundraising goal for the 118th Congress. And Derek is counting on support from 18326 to ensure that House Democrats hit the ground running in February.

Derek is fighting for affordable, safe housing, defending reproductive rights, and working to get America's fiscal house in order -- all while holding the GOP accountable. He can't do this important work alone.
