name: Sara Jacobs
subject: THANK YOU for taking the time to share your thoughts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Hey - thank you so much for taking the time to share your thoughts. It’s pretty great when this whole “creating a dialogue” thing works out!
(If you haven’t filled out the survey I sent you last week, I’d still love to hear your thoughts! Click here - it’ll take about 60 seconds. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/9MaE4oQGW0a9H1y_j5o1zA2] )
But seriously: creating a dialogue is part of the goal of these emails... The last thing your inbox needs is a droning monologue on a topic you don’t care about (or worse, an appeal that makes you roll your eyes at the entire concept of political communication).
I asked what you cared about most. Here’s what you said:
— 75% of you said tackling the climate crisis is critical, and I couldn’t agree more. It’s a big fight - actually existential - and that’s exactly why we can’t let up on it. My, and future generations, will have to live with the consequences. The Inflation Reduction Act was our country’s biggest investment in addressing climate change ever, and we have to build on that work this year.
— More than half of you flagged that reproductive freedom and abortion rights are important to you. I hear you. As a young woman, this is a huge priority for me, too, and I am not taking my foot off the gas when it comes to restoring and expanding access to abortion care. I’m also going to keep pushing for policies that keep people safe in our post-Roe reality. This past week, I introduced the SAFER Health Act, which expands HIPAA to make sure doctors can’t share health information about abortion or pregnancy loss without consent.
— And a lot of you mentioned rethinking the social safety net, protecting LBBTQ+ rights, and rebuilding trust in our institutions - issues that are not only top of mind for me, but also critical for Congress to focus on if we want to truly represent and support the people we’ve been elected to serve.
I really appreciate your willingness to answer my questions, and I look forward to sharing more information about the priorities you’ve highlighted over the course of the year.
Your feedback is an important part of this job - so thanks again.
Sara
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District
P.S. Here’s that survey link again [https://secure.ngpvan.com/9MaE4oQGW0a9H1y_j5o1zA2] , in case you haven’t filled it out yet. We’ll keep checking in on the responses to make sure your voice is heard.

Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
Sara Jacobs for Congress
PO Box 120085
San Diego, CA 92112
United States
https://www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/ [https://www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/] https://www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/ [https://www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/] https://twitter.com/sarajacobsca [https://twitter.com/sarajacobsca]

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/hyl6jC1aX0el_nwy_DShOA2?unsubscribedata=ZUOk0klaNbZfBolIA7XBczY8PwoppgDeJqNL4zRvEe5K2UZ2VtlKDUCAWgJ0tdWjPzm8knBQsyCBWnpgR45%2FflSFIglcgXhBp1cDKFVl41%2F4mVedgjctknp2CdTIq70gP6aWSXWYxLDbBKc208fT6IZiWdjYW0x%2FJCTQaJDPG%2BaZuuteVmP9sm7GHQ628doy9vy6mwEFH2Q9ehrKeRW8S7tFY7ItfJJQScSwfaq83Wn8y%2FRMfv2HvrFez9ovCjH4DdoOo%2FSZCMhxaP5tfMT9oejNLnaKq5ubeUNkj%2FjAqX05m6eCAWAZy5y6Iy7ut43vjiJwgA4XbjzIS%2FShUxHtAZ1gnfAReKOR5JHJA0PGnjnfQfpzaLHYTOnNTMPNGGSrelAlGg7f7Ecs2v9w%2Fn51RQLYSnjCNEi3eJK4LfMGg9Tp5e5bGcmX4y2Cnm7ORt6Z

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I’m running for Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I am sorry that politicians like Senator Sinema have let you down. I’m going to change that.

| Peter -

I wanted you to hear it directly from me: I’m going to be challenging Kyrsten Sinema and running for the United States Senate in Arizona.

If that’s all you need to hear, I am asking you to become a Day One, Founding Donor to our historic campaign. The amount of the donation is not nearly as important as the number of people contributing today. Use this link to split a donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress: [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gallego**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57976680/389662113/880176479?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230129-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIwYTJkMDM3LTEwYTAtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VYOIxPq9dcSwydUhYAswhhZqgdyOFaP7Qp8YUVV5AsU=)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE NOW ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57976681/389662114/1783009624?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230129-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIwYTJkMDM3LTEwYTAtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VYOIxPq9dcSwydUhYAswhhZqgdyOFaP7Qp8YUVV5AsU=)
---
Here is the truth: The rich and the powerful don’t need more advocates in the Senate. It’s the people deciding between groceries and utilities who need help.

For too long, Senator Sinema has used her position of power to help those who already have it all. She has stood in the way of raising the minimum wage, protecting voting rights, lowering the cost of prescription drugs, and more.

Now, we can argue about different ways to do the job as a United States Senator, but at the core of it all, if you are more likely to be meeting and helping the powerful than the powerless, you are doing this job wrong.

I am sorry that politicians like Senator Sinema have let you down.

I am going to change that.

But in order to win this race against Senator Sinema and whoever the Republicans nominate, it’s going to take a historic grassroots effort. From day one. And that is why I am asking:

[_**Can you please split a $5 contribution between my campaign and Fight for Progress to become a Founding Donor to my campaign for U.S. Senate today? It all adds up when we’re all chipping in, and that’s how we’ll win this race. clean_body: I am sorry that politicians like Senator Sinema have let you down. I’m going to change that. | Peter - I wanted you to hear it directly from me: I’m going to be challenging Kyrsten Sinema and running for the United States Senate in Arizona. If that’s all you need to hear, I am asking you to become a Day One, Founding Donor to our historic campaign. The amount of the donation is not nearly as important as the number of people contributing today. Use this link to split a donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress: = | = Here is the truth: The rich and the powerful don’t need more advocates in the Senate. It’s the people deciding between groceries and utilities who need help. For too long, Senator Sinema has used her position of power to help those who already have it all. She has stood in the way of raising the minimum wage, protecting voting rights, lowering the cost of prescription drugs, and more. Now, we can argue about different ways to do the job as a United States Senator, but at the core of it all, if you are more likely to be meeting and helping the powerful than the powerless, you are doing this job wrong. I am sorry that politicians like Senator Sinema have let you down. I am going to change that. But in order to win this race against Senator Sinema and whoever the Republicans nominate, it’s going to take a historic grassroots effort. From day one. And that is why I am asking: = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Ruben Gallego * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
January 29, 2022

Press Contact:
Jody Pyles
jody@chaseforva.com
804 912 6007

Scheduling Press Interview:
Debbie Gwynn
debbie@chaseforva.com
804 393 2715

Most Virginians
Don't Trust That We Have Safe,
Secure Elections
SB884 Chase-sponsored
Voter Confidence Restoration Act Attempts to Restore That Confidence

SB884 Chase Bill Restores Voter Confidence By Putting the Guardrails Back on Virginia's Elections to include Eliminating Voter Computers and Tabulators

Senator Amanda Chase will present SB884 The Voter Confidence Restoration Act, This Tuesday Afternoon at the Capitol, Before a Senate Privileges & Elections Committee

CHESTERFIELD, VA. Virginia Senator Amanda Chase will present [SB884](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UaUAqDAtb_w2nADlAErLV0DerJtvhdT4o3KatNsPo9HbrAfn1BJCNM2JuV56D5i50-LERGmoiS5YJ9CTRUSBXCXIMHu80k7MISFpL8vxdY2YQseft6J6b-5BpVZnNwnth8QI-nrwVOPs1HNhBGh0b-7GFJkZcEMYfO_TPJMnGQkSJN3KxnmpweO3v8-D8CTRlefhG8guS3E=&c=WxREuIzucUAcauk2b6eabJq1x1_Qm-pdcnOhW4NUPIQ0kN5QAd8ICw==&ch=ibVUuXX_NKCWkVl4spSwsecIbvAH93xKd0C9xPV6r7XG5CzyBD7zog==) An Election Integrity Omnibus bill called The Voter Confidence Restoration Act before the Senate Privileges and Elections Committee, Tuesday afternoon in an effort to restore Virginians' confidence in their elections.

SB884 The Voter Confidence Restoration Act recognizes that most Virginians don't trust our election processes and therefore the results. This bill understands the importance of restoring that confidence by getting back to the basics of election integrity and ensuring safe, transparent elections that all voters can trust.

SB884 addresses many of the concerns voters experienced during the 2020 Presidential Election and seeks to ensure these issues never happen again.

The Voter Confidence Restoration Act repeals provisions of the law permitting same day registration; requires a legitimate excuse to vote absentee in limited cases like active duty military serving overseas . Anyone who meets the limited criteria for voting absentee will have to notarize their mail in ballot.

Voter are encouraged to vote in person on Election Day and present a valid government issued photo identification. The 45 day election season is completely eliminated. Absentee drop boxes are completely eliminated.

All ballots must be received by the general registrar by 7pm, the close of polls on election day in order to be counted.

This Act requires presentation of a form of identification containing a photograph in order to vote; repeals the provisions of law permitting a voter who does not have one of the required forms of identification to vote after signing a statement that he is the named registered voter he claims to be.

The Voter Confidence Restoration Act eliminates the use of electronic poll books and voting machines and requires that ballots be manually tabulated in order to determine the results of an election.

An amendment will be added to the bill to eliminate the use of Soros sponsored [Electronic Registration Information Center (ERIC)](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UaUAqDAtb_w2nADlAErLV0DerJtvhdT4o3KatNsPo9HbrAfn1BJCNNGEtkau3vPTon6XX9RwHPuT_YNZqW50JOaUVihFXGD1PskD9fTiH3Z-cX42mHUvAF37qoGPjl1tra4nkBVEHelS9BBCPBAung==&c=WxREuIzucUAcauk2b6eabJq1x1_Qm-pdcnOhW4NUPIQ0kN5QAd8ICw==&ch=ibVUuXX_NKCWkVl4spSwsecIbvAH93xKd0C9xPV6r7XG5CzyBD7zog==)

"In 2020, many Virginians either went to the polls to cast a vote only to find out that for the first time since they registered to be a voter, that their sacred vote had already been cast. Election officials reported nefarious and questionable thumb drives that just happened to have enough votes to change the results of a Congressional race and the list goes on.

The bottom line is that beginning in 2020, many Virginians for the first time ever questioned the sanctity, processes and results of our elections and we've yet to restore that trust. After listening statewide to many Virginians, I'm doing something about it. Virginians don't trust voting computers and tabulators. They want hand counts and ballots that have a serial number for tracking purposes. They want a return to showing a government issued photo identification to vote and an end to mail-in ballots and drop boxes which do not protect the chain of custody of voter's sacred ballot. They also don't trust all the moving pieces involved with a 45 day voting season. It's time to return to a voting day with an actual deadline. Life is full of deadlines and Election Day shouldn't be the exception. " Senator Amanda Chase

Virginia Senator Amanda Chase will present SB884 The Voter Confidence Restoration Act, before the Senate Privileges and Elections Committee, Tuesday afternoon, 15 minutes after session adjourns at approximately 1pm, at the Capital in Senate Room 3.

Please reach out to the Senators who serve on the Senate Privileges and Elections Committee and ask them to support SB884 The Voter Confidence Restoration Act.

Public comments can be made in person or online at:
[https://virginia-senate.granicus.com/ViewPublisher.php?view_id=3](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UaUAqDAtb_w2nADlAErLV0DerJtvhdT4o3KatNsPo9HbrAfn1BJCNMJ59-HJiOZRKWR2UHgP_K5FQBxvJ7eUPeg1Px5lcP9srhE8BfIBJIQ7nPNV2BUktxQiAG_oTBunO_vAOxiuoFtSF3FX68XQqZp06SlrBNir98E2J3OyqR8I8ol7HaYMBd-p5WF9-fdr92OVbTTtczg=&c=WxREuIzucUAcauk2b6eabJq1x1_Qm-pdcnOhW4NUPIQ0kN5QAd8ICw==&ch=ibVUuXX_NKCWkVl4spSwsecIbvAH93xKd0C9xPV6r7XG5CzyBD7zog==)

clean_body: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Chase sponsored SB 884 Presented This Tuesday | | | | | | == | | | | | | | | ---|--- | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE January 29, 2022 Press Contact: Jody Pyles jody@chaseforva.com 804 912 6007 Scheduling Press Interview: Debbie Gwynn debbie@chaseforva.com 804 393 2715 Most Virginians Don't Trust That We Have Safe, Secure Elections SB884 Chase-sponsored Voter Confidence Restoration Act Attempts to Restore That Confidence SB884 Chase Bill Restores Voter Confidence By Putting the Guardrails Back on Virginia's Elections to include Eliminating Voter Computers and Tabulators Senator Amanda Chase will present SB884 The Voter Confidence Restoration Act, This Tuesday Afternoon at the Capitol, Before a Senate Privileges & Elections Committee CHESTERFIELD, VA. Virginia Senator Amanda Chase will present == An Election Integrity Omnibus bill called The Voter Confidence Restoration Act before the Senate Privileges and Elections Committee, Tuesday afternoon in an effort to restore Virginians' confidence in their elections. SB884 The Voter Confidence Restoration Act recognizes that most Virginians don't trust our election processes and therefore the results. This bill understands the importance of restoring that confidence by getting back to the basics of election integrity and ensuring safe, transparent elections that all voters can trust. SB884 addresses many of the concerns voters experienced during the 2020 Presidential Election and seeks to ensure these issues never happen again. The Voter Confidence Restoration Act repeals provisions of the law permitting same day registration; requires a legitimate excuse to vote absentee in limited cases like active duty military serving overseas . Anyone who meets the limited criteria for voting absentee will have to notarize their mail in ballot. Voter are encouraged to vote in person on Election Day and present a valid government issued photo identification. The 45 day election season is completely eliminated. Absentee drop boxes are completely eliminated. All ballots must be received by the general registrar by 7pm, the close of polls on election day in order to be counted. This Act requires presentation of a form of identification containing a photograph in order to vote; repeals the provisions of law permitting a voter who does not have one of the required forms of identification to vote after signing a statement that he is the named registered voter he claims to be. The Voter Confidence Restoration Act eliminates the use of electronic poll books and voting machines and requires that ballots be manually tabulated in order to determine the results of an election. An amendment will be added to the bill to eliminate the use of Soros sponsored == "In 2020, many Virginians either went to the polls to cast a vote only to find out that for the first time since they registered to be a voter, that their sacred vote had already been cast. Election officials reported nefarious and questionable thumb drives that just happened to have enough votes to change the results of a Congressional race and the list goes on. The bottom line is that beginning in 2020, many Virginians for the first time ever questioned the sanctity, processes and results of our elections and we've yet to restore that trust. After listening statewide to many Virginians, I'm doing something about it. Virginians don't trust voting computers and tabulators. They want hand counts and ballots that have a serial number for tracking purposes. They want a return to showing a government issued photo identification to vote and an end to mail-in ballots and drop boxes which do not protect the chain of custody of voter's sacred ballot. They also don't trust all the moving pieces involved with a 45 day voting season. It's time to return to a voting day with an actual deadline. Life is full of deadlines and Election Day shouldn't be the exception. " Senator Amanda Chase Virginia Senator Amanda Chase will present SB884 The Voter Confidence Restoration Act, before the Senate Privileges and Elections Committee, Tuesday afternoon, 15 minutes after session adjourns at approximately 1pm, at the Capital in Senate Room 3. Please reach out to the Senators who serve on the Senate Privileges and Elections Committee and ask them to support SB884 The Voter Confidence Restoration Act. Public comments can be made in person or online at: == | | | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Last week, the Attorney General’s office secured another $83 million settlement against Walgreens in the opioid litigation. This is just another example of how West Virginia is leading the way on the fight to hold our pharmaceutical suppliers accountable. “We think we have a very strong case, and I’m hopeful they are going to appreciate that we are going to pursue justice in the State of West Virginia—this is going to be no quick out,” Morrisey said.

clean_body: | | | | | | | Updates from Attorney General Patrick Morrisey Earlier this month Attorney General Patrick Morrisey delivered an update to the people of West Virginia. In his video he shares his big wins of the year, discusses his next steps, and reminds us all to keep the faith. AG Morrisey on the War Room Last week, Attorney General Patrick Morrisey was on Steve Bannon's War Room to discuss the current senate representation in West Virginia, and how all West Virginian officials should be moving in the same direction to promote the America First Agenda. He added that this is how you take down the swamp and win. A Big Win in Women’s Sports Earlier this month, Attorney General Morrisey went on Newsmax to discuss the “big win” it was that the U.S. District Court for the Southern District of WV ruled that the state legislature’s definition of “girl” and “woman” in the Save Women’s Sports Bill is “constitutionally permissible.” | | $83 million settlement against Walgreens Last week, the Attorney General’s office secured another $83 million settlement against Walgreens in the opioid litigation. This is just another example of how West Virginia is leading the way on the fight to hold our pharmaceutical suppliers accountable. “We think we have a very strong case, and I’m hopeful they are going to appreciate that we are going to pursue justice in the State of West Virginia—this is going to be no quick out,” Morrisey said. | | Team Morrisey Storefront | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | PAID FOR BY TEAM MORRISEY a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915.

Now that we’ve beaten the Georgia GOP **_three years in a row_** , we fully expect them to work harder than ever before — and to spend more money than ever before — to defeat us this time around.

That’s why we need to start strong in 2023 to show the nation that we have what it takes to win again. **But right now, we’re on track to _fall short_ of our very first fundraising goal of the year.**

**That’s why we’re launching a $10 donation drive. If even just one out of every four people reading this email chips in $10 (or whatever you can!), it will go a long way toward helping us meet our January goal so we can keep Georgia blue.**
**Will you pitch in?**

* If we do our parts and keep the Peach State BLUE, we can help Democrats take back the House and elect a Democratic president.

name: Nat Flanagan, VP at United Rural Democrats
subject: Poverty in rural America is a crisis, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
We need to act now. | | | Hi Peter – January is Poverty Awareness Month, and as a native to rural America, I can tell you that our country – especially folks in rural America – are experiencing a poverty crisis. **Around 15% of rural Americans live in poverty.** Peter, this number is _unacceptable_. Poverty affects every part of life in rural communities. Healthcare. Education. Job security. Mental health. Infrastructure. Life expectancy. **The truth is, rural communities have been ignored and deprioritized in politics for too long.** Our resources and support have been cut, our towns have seen business after business close, and our future generation face conditions that make it difficult to stop the cycle. Our organization, United Rural Democrats, is determined to bolster the political will needed to make a much needed change and help communities succeed. We elect Democrats who put rural Americans first, address the underlying roots of poverty, and fight for a better future. **[Our Republican opponents are determined to stop support for rural communities – failing to address the poverty crisis. Will you chip in $5 or contribute a recurring donation – no matter how big or small – to United Rural Democrats to help break the body:
| | | The GOP has proven that they are incapable of leadership.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57977622/389665991/339029266?amount=10&sourceid=&refcode=LVF_EM_FR_3MO_20230129_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWFjN2IyOS0xOGEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8P3wYIoZZ7NsqldLNYwg_sWui1PU2VqAD2GXqjFAMu0=)
Picking a speaker for the party should be a mere formality — but it took Republicans 15 votes and four days to complete the most basic task on the list for the next two years.

In the end, Kevin McCarthy became Speaker ONLY because he agreed to the demands of Matt Gaetz, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and other far right members of his caucus.

**Right now, we’re looking ahead to two years of gridlock from _within_ the GOP.** That means two years of stalled legislation and a House majority unable to get anything done on behalf of Americans.

[_Will you chip in $25 right now to lay the groundwork to flip critical CA House seats blue before our first end-of-month fundraising deadline? name: Dan Goldman
subject: Why these emails are so important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
Peter, it's time to get big money out of politics. |
#
---
Peter, Last week, we marked the 13th anniversary of the Supreme Court’s disastrous ruling in _Citizens United v. FEC_ , which opened the floodgates for special interest dark money to run rampant in Washington and corrupt American democracy. Since then, this unrestricted spending has made it possible for dark money special interests to distort the democratic process and wield immense influence over our elections — turning them into bidding wars between big monied interests rather than honest debates over policy. When I was elected to Congress, I pledged that the only people I would answer to are the voters who elected me — and that’s exactly how it should be for every elected official. That’s why I just co-sponsored the _Democracy for All_ amendment, a constitutional amendment to overturn _Citizens United_ and reaffirm our commitment to a government of, by, and for the people. Peter, one unacceptable consequence of the _Citizens United_ decision is that the amount of money spent in our democratic elections has exploded. The ability of outside groups — and ultra-wealthy donors through unrestricted Super PACs — to tilt the scales for their preferred candidates has made it a necessity for political candidates to raise extraordinary sums to fend them off. **So until we can overturn _Citizens United_ and take dark money out of politics, donations from supporters like you made through emails like this one are so important for our work in Congress.** **[Peter, if you are able, please chip in any amount ahead of Tuesday’s end-of-month deadline. Your support is an investment in the work we’re doing to ensure that our democracy works for the people, not special interests.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57977979/389668126/1288870341?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230129_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzU5MzMxNi0xY2EwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sPNeHFO84Z5Ym8JYpiJxX26MnQ36NBZx1y9pfcXeGCA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57977991/389668139/1288870341?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230129_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzU5MzMxNi0xY2EwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sPNeHFO84Z5Ym8JYpiJxX26MnQ36NBZx1y9pfcXeGCA=)

## Please disregard the last title. That meeting already past.
---
## The current mission
---
|
---
Give me Liberty or Give me Death! I will die on this mountain!
Only 46% of Christians are registered and only 23% of Christians vote. We must close this gap if we want any chance of taking our country back.
I have taken this volunteer position to shift the tide and save our Nation. I need your help, every little bit counts. We are gearing up to head out up and down the state. We will be hitting college campuses, churches, church events, community events, festivals, and much more.
The goal is to register new voters, conduct workshops on constitutional authority, God-given rights, voting, precinct strategies, and empower churches to get into the fight.
We are competing with a monster machine called the Liberal Left. Those like Soros and others control the narrative with billions flooding into political races around the world.
Conservatives and Christians just stand by and complain and most do very little to help solve the problem. The left looks polished and successful, we must look like we are successful to bring people in.
If we could get 100 people to give $50 we could tackle this goal and turn up the heat.
I will die on this mountain, I will keep fighting for you and for our kids. I refuse to turn and run. Give me liberty or give me death! Who can help?
The links are in the comments.

| | We've seen this movie before, Peter: In 2020, national Republicans and a shady gang of special interest groups dumped millions of dollars into Oregon's Fourth Congressional District to attack Peter DeFazio and pump up Donald Trump's hand-picked candidate. **Thousands of grassroots supporters like you[stepped up to power our movement](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57978101/389668701/-1599294071?refcode=2023-01-29-eom&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=160dd270-1fa0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjBkZDI3MC0xZmEwLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7O1mTIj2Cvb0KI9S2WiQls74HkhTYkJxeySF8uY1T2Y=), and even though we were outspent nearly 2-to-1, we kept the seat. ** In 2022, Kevin McCarthy and his cronies targeted the district again. They spent millions of dollars to spread lies about Val Hoyle and try to gloss over their candidate's anti-union crusades, his stunning ignorance, and his gross misogyny. **Thousands of folks contributed, and even though we were outspent – again – the voice of the people prevailed – again – and we sent Val to Congress to fight for us.** In 2024, they're going to target this seat. Again. Thousands of grassroots supporters like you=, and even though we were outspent nearly 2-to-1, we kept the seat. In 2022, Kevin McCarthy and his cronies targeted the district again. They spent millions of dollars to spread lies about Val Hoyle and try to gloss over their candidate's anti-union crusades, his stunning ignorance, and his gross misogyny. Thousands of folks contributed, and even though we were outspent – again – the voice of the people prevailed – again – and we sent Val to Congress to fight for us. In 2024, they're going to target this seat. Again. They're already raising money to come after Val. These races are some of the first crucial special elections of 2023 – but we’re anticipating _over a dozen more._ There are no “off-years” for state Democrats, so we’re counting on your support. Special elections are expensive and often come down to just a handful of votes – just a few weeks ago, we flipped a VA Senate seat by less than 700 votes – so every last dollar counts.
There's no cavalry – the only people standing in the way of Republican special election victories are you and the people reading this email. **And right now, with an urgent special election on the horizon and every dollar having 3x the impact, there's never been a better time to have a personal stake in this fight.**

clean_body: In less than two weeks, Democrats have a chance to solidify our margins in the Pennsylvania House | | | | | In NINE DAYS, Democrats have a chance to solidify our margins in the Pennsylvania House, building our Democratic momentum with three more key victories in special elections. If we win, Democrats have a fighting chance at winning a majority in this chamber this year. If we lose, Republicans stand to gain ground, and they're itching to use these wins to further their extremist agenda – pushing dangerous abortion bans and barriers to the ballot box. Winning these three ultra-important races is critical for a Democratic majority in this chamber, so Republicans will be throwing everything they have into these elections and we need to be primed to fight back. We’re committed to putting in the work to compete in every last election we can. Majorities are built one seat at a time, and coming together to win races like these in Pennsylvania is key to breaking Republicans’ tight grip on our statehouses. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | These races are some of the first crucial special elections of 2023 – but we’re anticipating over a dozen more. There are no “off-years” for state Democrats, so we’re counting on your support. Special elections are expensive and often come down to just a handful of votes – just a few weeks ago, we flipped a VA Senate seat by less than 700 votes – so every last dollar counts. There's no cavalry – the only people standing in the way of Republican special election victories are you and the people reading this email. And right now, with an urgent special election on the horizon and every dollar having 3x the impact, there's never been a better time to have a personal stake in this fight. Thanks, DLCC Team | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
We need to hold him and his crooked family accountable
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdUMtugzAQ_BpzA9nLMwcOTdPHpZV6SK6WHwuxCgYZo5a_ryG0lSJZlnfGOzs7WLOizCkcqiyLdJ2BYI2KTA0UUsrgAEAZZYlG3TBZgsiBVrlWJKPYC9MljUP0V2M_0elQL4ka-uha00qxjAqFBQVJZZpTJpFVrNBKSUQadfXV-3Ei6QOB53AmVLPD5MtYh3oVCZiwepGmbaf1LfmIng89b7zm0uhYuZFLx3-NkvR59j3vUZu5J-lps0egWMFpmJ3CAFrVcdGPnWmWnVKhFKa1gbzpxNtEHlwYhypM7JZ-NGrVFfx-29UIWq4G5-bRm8EGR0MgRYv_xvZBg_Vo_c1E_O6Px-_qu3htAs1tZ3Qg7sCr0SGfk_78eNUvT23kaj1-ma4zU1GG_Nst_zXufaOalEcCsLUBbMnC7NOLOJ_f3BK3Bxe_5BdoVxIew-2XEf9-7iLJnhuQ8vQDwqSwKg)

| Friend,
The pieces of the Biden family corruption puzzle are coming together and it’s time to expose their fraud and hold them accountable.
**_Here’s what we know:_**
* Biden mishandled classified documents in the same garage Hunter Biden used frequently
* Biden’s lawyers and the DOJ covered it up before the midterm election
* Democrats have weaponized the DOJ to paint Trump as a villain
* **Hunter Biden rented his dad’s house for the same amount as his shared office with several Chinese business associates**

What we know already is enough to launch a full-scale investigation, **[but I need your help to put pressure on my colleagues in Congress to get moving quickly.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdUE1PhTAQ_DXlBqHL13sHDurz6cWDBz9uTelueY1QsJQo_96CqIlJ03RnurOzQzUvqyKF4yHPI6xzkFyryNSQQpZyOAKkPOUJEmreVCALSA8FKpan1EvTJdoR-Yuxb-Qw1Euihj661Knm-YHzTJeVRg1lwfOGS9QFrnIHHXX1xftxYtkVg3M4E6nZUfJhrCNcRQImLS6NadtpfTdiJC-GXmiPojEYKzeKxokfoyw7z74XPaGZe5adNnsMyhWchtkpCqBVnZD92Bm97JQKpTStDeS3TrxNFMGFcaTCxG7pR6NWXSn-b7saISvU4Nw8ejPY4GgIpGzpz9g-aLCerP82Eb-X6uF88_I5vQZa2M5gIP6BF4MhnxO-Pd7j3W0buRrHD9N1ZiqrkH-75b_GvW9Us-qaAWxtAFuyMPvsWT49Pbglbo8uviueoV1JuAm3X0b6_bmLJHtuwKrTFyj6sAM)** | | | | [INVESTIGATE JOE BIDEN](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdUEFugzAQfI25gWAhkBw4tEmTXnrooVFvlu1dHCtgkDGt-H0Npa1UybK8M97Z2aE6K6tdCod9UURYFyCyRkWmhhTyNIMDQJqlWYKETSYrEDtI9ztUrEipE6ZNGkfkb8beyWGo50T1XXSrZVFWWQWSQAjcoxSCKsr3CCgLVZRZ1NY374eR5Q8MzuGMpCZHyaexjnARCZiwOEuj9bi8JR_I877jjUcuDcbKDVw6_mOU5efJd7wjNFPH8tNqj0G5gGM_OUUBtKrlohta08wbpUIpjLaB_NaJ14k8uDCOVJjYzt1g1KIr-P9tFyNkueqdmwZvehsc9YEUmv6MbYN668n6bxPx8Uqlnz_e9T3Q3LYGA_EPvBkM-Zzw_vqMlycduRqHT9O2ZiyrkL9e81_i3jaqWfXIANY2gDVZmHx-FW9vL26O9cHFl90V9ELCMdx-Huj35yaSbLkBq05fGx6xgw)
---
That’s why I am petitioning House Republicans to investigate and prosecute everyone involved in the coverup of Joe Biden’s mishandling of classified docs to influence elections and the Biden family’s corrupt business dealings.

There’s so much to uncover and we need to hold the Biden family accountable. Democrats have gotten away with corruption for far too long and now we have the unique opportunity to take them down.

**I’m ready to get started today**...But I’ll need your help to rally my fellow Republicans together and launch a transparent investigation to expose Biden and his Deep State friends.

**[Sign the petition right away to investigate Biden, his family, the DOJ, and everyone else involved in this scandal>>](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdUE1vpTAM_DXhBiLmQeDAoe3rx6WHVnq9RiE2EBUCCkEV--s3ULorVYqieCYej4dqXog8haq8XCKsL6B4qyNTQwpZyqECSHnKEyRseSNA5ZCWOWp2SWlUZkhaR-R7Yz_JYai3RE9j1NecKiUEFlxXTZ4JIuA5lqWoWlJQEI-Guvd-Xlh2x-ApnIX06ij5MtYR7iIBUxa3xnTdsr8bOZOX0yhbj7IxGGs3y8bJH6Mse1r9KEdCs44sux72GBQ7uEyr0xRAqwepxnkw7XZSOpTKdDaQ3zrxMVEGF8aRDhOHbZyN3nWV_L3tboSs1JNz6-zNZIOjKZCqo__GzkGT9WT9t4m4bfrb-5_y8Q0DLe1gMBC_wN5gyOeKn28v-PzYRa7G-csMg1kKEfLvjvz3uM-NaibuGcDRBnAkC6vPPtTt9uq2uKtc_Jx_QLeT8BBuv8307-cpkpy5ARPXv8SDsGc)**

Your signature means everything here, Friend because it will show Congress that the American people are sick of the lies and ready for real action to be taken.

Thank you in advance for your participation.

Yours in Liberty,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5

clean_body: = In the first month of the GOP controlling the House, we've seen votes to further restrict abortion rights and make it easier for billionaires to avoid paying their fair share of taxes. We've seen proposals to cut SNAP benefits. We've seen promises of brinksmanship on the debt ceiling and government funding. We've even seen dangerous extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene and Paul Gosar put on key committees. House Republicans have done nothing but show their out-of-touch priorities and willingness to cause chaos. We can't waste a moment in working to flip the House back in 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = I just faced my closest race ever, and Glenn Youngkin came up short in VA-10 by just 2 percent in 2021. There's no doubt that the GOP will double down this cycle to flip my seat red. Putting districts like VA-10 safely in the blue column is the first step to taking back the majority next year. And to do that, we need to meet all of our early cycle fundraising goals. = Thank you, Jennifer Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. body:
#
Peter,
We’re going to keep this short, because we know your time is valuable, and we really appreciate your continued support for Pramila. As one of her most engaged supporters, you know just how important it is that we maintain a strong position on our campaign year-round.
Right now, we’re gearing up for our first major deadline of 2023: we need to reach **$50,000 raised for the month of January by midnight on Tuesday.** That’s where you come in -- we’re hoping you can join our critical fundraising efforts and make a donation of your own.
[**Can you rush a $3 donation to ensure Pramila starts off 2023 strong? With your support, we can reach our $50,000 goal, but we’re counting on your help.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/27517?refcode=em20230129-2103&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2103%2E420207%2ECF-FJh)
**_Here’s our situation, by the numbers:_** **January End of Month Goal:_$50,000_** **Amount to Raise:_$12,807_** [**Suggested Contribution: $27**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/27517?refcode=em20230129-2103&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2103%2E420207%2ECF-FJh)
---
**[Contribute $27](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/27517?refcode=em20230129-2103&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2103%2E420207%2ECF-FJh)**
Pramila never has and never will accept a cent from corporate PACs. Our entire campaign is driven by the principles that our government should be powered by the people -- and that’s why our grassroots base is the foundation of all our work.
Our $50,000 fundraising goal is the first test of 2023. It’s a milestone we need to reach if we want to stay on track with our targets and continue to pull off the scale of advocacy and organizing we do year-round.
Right now, we’re not that far from reaching our End of Month goal, so every donation counts. **Peter, Pramila is counting on you.**
[**Whether it’s $5 or $500, we value your contribution. Any amount gets us that much closer to our End of Month goal. With that in mind, can you donate anything today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/27517?refcode=em20230129-2103amounts%3D5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2103%2E420207%2ECF-FJh)
In solidarity,
Jayapal HQ

Team, House Republicans have officially taken control, and they're _already_ threatening MASSIVE cuts to Social Security!

President Obama says Social Security is a promise -- one this nation has kept to _**generations**_ of American seniors -- and we can't let far-right, ultra-MAGA Republicans destroy it!

**We need to prove that we'll NEVER let House Republicans cut millions of Americans' Social Security benefits.** We’ve launched an urgent Democratic petition to demand that Republicans uphold this CRITICAL obligation -- _but we’re still short 32 signatures in Pennsylvania! _

name: Katie Porter
subject: Good enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I’m running for the U.S. Senate because “better than the way things were” isn’t good enough.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=16787%2E3422442%2E4Ya8Kg)
Derek,
**I’m running for the U.S. Senate because “better than the way things were” _isn’t good enough._ **
* It’s not “good enough” that huge corporations are making record profits while families can’t afford necessities.
* It’s not “good enough” that my kids had to ask me if they were safe at school after nearby shootings.
* It’s not “good enough” that extremist politicians could ban abortion nationwide if they win just a few more Senate seats.

It’s not good enough that corporate special interests play an outsized role in our politics, and I’m running for the Senate to hold them accountable and create a better California and better country for all of us.
This is going to be a tough and competitive race, and I need your help. **[We have an end of month deadline coming up on Tuesday, can you please pitch in today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230129-2?refcode=EMAF29_2_GOO_20230129_V1_F&refcode2=16787_3422442_4Ya8Kg&akid=16787%2E3422442%2E4Ya8Kg)**

name: Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate
subject: 5 reasons why we really can flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
And Peter, your early support could make all the difference.
#
Hey Peter, we know it’s Sunday so we promise to keep this quick.
**Here are five reasons why you should[add a donation of $5 (or more) toward Lucas’ very first end-of-month fundraising goal](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27410?refcode=em20230129-2793&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2793%2E614464%2EKJMVYc) before Tuesday at midnight:**
1. **Lucas Kunce is Democrats’ best chance to defeat an incumbent GOP Senator in 2024.** And since he launched his campaign to replace Josh Hawley earlier this month, he’s put a national spotlight on Missouri’s U.S. Senate race.
2. **Josh Hawley is the GOP’s most vulnerable Senator this cycle** — with a crumbling support base in-state and a _39% approval rating_ in a poll just months ago.
3. **Lucas’ bold message is already resonating with voters.** Whether it’s calling out Hawley for being a fraud or the corrupt politicians stealing from the American people with unchecked insider trading, Lucas has earned in-state and national media attention for speaking truth to power.
4. **From the moment Lucas entered this race, national Republicans have been on the attack because they know Lucas is a threat.** Hawley’s campaign and the NRSC know Lucas has what it takes to flip this seat — and they’ll do whatever it takes to tear him (and our grassroots movement) down.
5. **If we start strong, we can win — that’s why your early investment could make all the difference.** If we have the resources right from the start to get Lucas’ message in front of voters and stave off GOP attacks, we really can defeat Josh Hawley and take this seat back for everyday Missourians.

**So what do you say, Peter?[Will you chip in $10 or more toward Lucas’ first end-of-month fundraising goal today so we’ll have the resources to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat in 2024?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27410?refcode=em20230129-2793&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2793%2E614464%2EKJMVYc)**

It’s time to elect a real warrior for working people to represent Missouri in the U.S. Senate — not a fraud and a coward like Josh Hawley.
This is our shot to get it done.
Thanks for being part of it,
Team Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230129-2793-footer&t=10&refcode2=2793_614464_KJMVYc&akid=2793%2E614464%2EKJMVYc)**

| | By now, you've probably started to hear about the "debt ceiling" and how critical it is that we raise it. Here's why it matters: **Extremist Republicans in Congress are using this moment to demand massive cuts in programs we all depend on— including Social Security, Medicare, veterans benefits, environmental protection, higher education, and more.** _We're not going to let them._ Make no mistake, this extreme GOP position has nothing to do with fiscal responsibility. After all, we reduced the deficit with the Inflation Reduction Act, and could reduce it a lot more by making billionaires and big corporations pay their fair share. Instead, House Republicans are trying to gut enforcement so tax cheats can get away with it. **This is all about rigging the economy even more so the fat cats can get even fatter.** Far too many Republicans in Congress want to slash the social safety net, undermine our work to combat the climate crisis, break our promises to seniors and veterans, and gut critical programs – like education and health care – that our families depend on. _No way. clean_body: | | | | By now, you've probably started to hear about the "debt ceiling" and how critical it is that we raise it. Here's why it matters: Extremist Republicans in Congress are using this moment to demand massive cuts in programs we all depend on— including Social Security, Medicare, veterans benefits, environmental protection, higher education, and more. We're not going to let them. Make no mistake, this extreme GOP position has nothing to do with fiscal responsibility. After all, we reduced the deficit with the Inflation Reduction Act, and could reduce it a lot more by making billionaires and big corporations pay their fair share. Instead, House Republicans are trying to gut enforcement so tax cheats can get away with it. This is all about rigging the economy even more so the fat cats can get even fatter. Far too many Republicans in Congress want to slash the social safety net, undermine our work to combat the climate crisis, break our promises to seniors and veterans, and gut critical programs – like education and health care – that our families depend on. No way. Not on our watch. name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: extra extra read all about it
body:
|
---
| | The Idaho Freedom Caucus is making headlines this week! I

Between committee meetings, my real job, and events, I feel like butter scraped over too much bread (thanks for that analogy, Bilbo Baggins).

But it's all good because this is what I signed up for - the fight for our way of life is relentless!

So, this week...

I was on Kevin Miller's show, had [my bill presented to protect parental freedoms when it comes to vaccines](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=f4558e9ac7&e=dea908e0fe), [had a kerfuffle in Senate Ed](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=e300b06c76&e=dea908e0fe), was supposed to present my bill to repeal the anti-religion Blaine Amendment (but now it's [Monday's main event](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=6c15a2b690&e=dea908e0fe)). and we even had [Corey DeAngelis come out](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=493c6665c0&e=dea908e0fe) and talk about school choice with us. As always, it's great to see you all at the Capitol (when you can swing by).

Back at it in the morning to continue the fight for health freedom, education freedom, and financial freedom.

(Also, I'm sure I forgot tons of stuff so just ask me about anything you're wondering about and I'll let ya know)

Cheers,

Brian

**p.s.**

My darned grocery tax bill is STILL sitting on the shelf.

Can you real quick, email Chairman Monks ([jmonks@house.idaho.gov](mailto:jmonks@house.idaho.gov)) and ask him to hear it (did you know [82% of Idahoans](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=2e10efd5ff&e=dea908e0fe) want it GONE??)

**p.p.s.**

We finally have a date for an introductory hearing on our school choice ESA bill.

It's Tuesday, Jan 31st! This is the first of many steps toward educational freedom in Idaho.

Please email Chairman Lent ([dlent@senate.idaho.gov](mailto:dlent@senate.idaho.gov)) and tell him THANK YOU for putting it on the calendar.

Also, email the Governor ([https://gov.idaho.gov/contact/contact-us/](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=235bc99f42&e=dea908e0fe)) and let him know you want this thing to pass.

**p.p.p.s.**

[The Idaho Press Tribune is out here selling my books now](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=2bfe1f3182&e=dea908e0fe)... (and I'm not complaining)

[](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=099e5bf664&e=dea908e0fe)

\---

1) To make sure you keep getting these emails, please add [blforidaho@gmail.com](mailto:blforidaho@gmail.com) to your address book or whitelist me.

2) Want to get off this list? [Unsubscribe from this list](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7&e=dea908e0fe&c=5d153941bf).

3) My postal address: PO Box 3753, Nampa, ID 83653-3753

4) Want to support the cause? [Click here to contribute](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=80899bc0ea&e=dea908e0fe "get in the fight").
---

name: Sharice Davids
subject: the next deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Hi there,

In their first month in the majority, House Republicans have shown us exactly how they plan to govern the House.

After a protracted and embarrassing Speaker election, they’ve passed legislation that offers tax breaks to their rich friends and donors and attacks reproductive freedom nationwide.

Instead of addressing inflation, cutting costs, or creating jobs, they’re putting their energy into baseless political “investigations”.

You and I both know that people are sick and tired of negativity in politics... They want leaders who focus on governing, not scoring petty political points. That’s what I’m dedicated to doing every day. As our new Leader, Hakeem Jeffries put it, I’m in Congress to champion normalcy instead of negativity, democracy instead of demagogues, and economic opportunity instead of political extremism. That’s what I want to see Congress get back to.

That’s why it’s critically important to retake the House majority in 2024, so we can get back to delivering for the American people.

**We’re up against our first big test of 2023: The end-of-month fundraising deadline on Tuesday.** We need to raise another $10,000 by the end of January to stay on track with our goals, and I’m asking you to step up.

clean_body: | Hi there, In their first month in the majority, House Republicans have shown us exactly how they plan to govern the House. After a protracted and embarrassing Speaker election, they’ve passed legislation that offers tax breaks to their rich friends and donors and attacks reproductive freedom nationwide. Instead of addressing inflation, cutting costs, or creating jobs, they’re putting their energy into baseless political “investigations”. You and I both know that people are sick and tired of negativity in politics... They want leaders who focus on governing, not scoring petty political points. That’s what I’m dedicated to doing every day. As our new Leader, Hakeem Jeffries put it, I’m in Congress to champion normalcy instead of negativity, democracy instead of demagogues, and economic opportunity instead of political extremism. That’s what I want to see Congress get back to. That’s why it’s critically important to retake the House majority in 2024, so we can get back to delivering for the American people. We’re up against our first big test of 2023: The end-of-month fundraising deadline on Tuesday.
